| | _ _**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**** ** CONTACT: Oregon Republican Party LaJuana Decker, Communications Chair communications.chair@oregon.gop Release Date: February 28, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: **Portland, OR** – Last night Oregon Republican Party’s newly elected Chairman Jerry Cummings joined the ranks of thousands of Portland area victims of motor vehicle theft. While attending an event in Portland Thursday night, his car was stolen from its on-street parking spot in the city. Portland Police took the crime report at the scene. While Portland Police Bureau attempts to find stolen vehicles, fewer than 80% are recovered. Many end up in chop shops where thieves dismantle and sell them for parts. High crime rates, along with high taxes, and business-unfriendly regulatory policies have forced many Oregon businesses to flee Portland. [_Crimegrade.org_](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/q9bXt9Y82YQr/ckJRQnpKYzJsYmIwMnlLKzVNMkFydWpSYThLVGpKREZJQ0J5VGxEMTFqQmNmN3YrRllyRE0yUkJoRVg1dG1Day82UFdJbDUyRjNJUkt2LytBdWYxOVRBN2FxYjl4UEM2UlB0Mldtdm9wYkE9S0/) gives Oregon a D- grade for property crimes including motor vehicle theft, listing Oregon in the 12th percentile for public safety. Oregonians deserve a government that prioritizes crime-free neighborhoods and city streets to ensure that neighborhood businesses prosper and people enjoy our once beautiful cities. ####

name: Oregon GOP
subject: For Immediate Release: Oregon's Motor Voter Program
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/ZyvVQkmPrZfR/b3BTUG5IUndwQmdzcVBoMUNNak9ZNS9GemU1NHdzNDhXQXNXUHlHcy9UbVpBNDRxN0RPaElybEVSU3crRWdHcUQwOGhVbDJyZ2tPRTFDVWhETk5lWVpNY0RXeEY2cWhpc2IwQVJhbVlkN3M9S0/)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ** CONTACT: Oregon Republican Party LaJuana Decker, Communications Chair communications.chair@oregon.gop Release Date: February 28, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: **Salem, OR** – This week Oregon Secretary of State Tobias Read announced that Governor Tina Kotek has reinstated Oregon’s Motor Voter Program following the implementation of new "protections." While we appreciate the acknowledgment of previous data issues and the effort to improve system accuracy, these actions fail to address the broader concerns surrounding election security in Oregon. Ensuring fair, secure, and transparent elections must be the highest priority. However, the Oregon Secretary of State’s Office has yet to address critical issues, including an [_ongoing _ _lawsuit_](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/g8Y9hrXjV~Tq/b3BTUG5IUndwQmdzcVBoMUNNak9ZNS9GemU1NHdzNDhXQXNXUHlHcy9UbVpBNDRxN0RPaElybEVSU3crRWdHcUQwOGhVbDJyZ2tPRTFDVWhETk5lWVpNY0RXeEY2cWhpc2IwQVJhbVlkN3M9S0/) regarding violations of the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) for denying access to voter registration list maintenance records supplied by the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC). Additionally, [_another lawsuit_](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/LrX3tmG30dc3/b3BTUG5IUndwQmdzcVBoMUNNak9ZNS9GemU1NHdzNDhXQXNXUHlHcy9UbVpBNDRxN0RPaElybEVSU3crRWdHcUQwOGhVbDJyZ2tPRTFDVWhETk5lWVpNY0RXeEY2cWhpc2IwQVJhbVlkN3M9S0/) asserts Oregon has failed to comply with NVRA requirements to remove inactive voter registrations, as mandated by federal law. Oregon’s election laws continue to raise concerns. For example, under ORS 254.470, ballots are accepted up to seven days after Election Day if postmarked by Election Day. However, an alarming provision states that if a ballot lacks a postal indicator or the indicator is illegible, it is assumed to have been mailed on Election Day and is counted. This loophole undermines confidence in the electoral process and must be addressed. Nationally, Oregon ranks among the lowest in election security, [_ranked #48_](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/d84ahZVAXKfR/b3BTUG5IUndwQmdzcVBoMUNNak9ZNS9GemU1NHdzNDhXQXNXUHlHcy9UbVpBNDRxN0RPaElybEVSU3crRWdHcUQwOGhVbDJyZ2tPRTFDVWhETk5lWVpNY0RXeEY2cWhpc2IwQVJhbVlkN3M9S0/) __ based on extensive research by The Heritage Foundation. While Secretary Read’s announcement focuses on technical and audit fixes to data systems, true voter roll protections require substantive policy changes to ensure transparency, accountability, and public trust in Oregon’s elections. The Oregon Republican Party remains committed to advocating for meaningful election security reforms and urges state leaders to take decisive action to restore confidence in Oregon’s electoral process. ####
---
---
---

| I have a personal ask, Peter. My End of Month fundraising deadline is tonight, and we’re still $4,291 short of our February goal. clean_body: will I see your name? | = | Hi there: How are you? I hope you are well. This has been a tough month for us at the California Democratic Party. Watching Donald Trump tear apart our government and batter our constitution just to pay for tax breaks for his billionaire friends is devastating. The only silver lining is knowing that we flipped three seats from red to blue in 2024, and because of that, we have three strong Democrats fighting for us in DC who would otherwise be Republicans bending to Donald Trump’s will. = = Our grassroots movement is so important because Republican oligarchs with deep pockets have their eyes on California. Elon Musk has relentlessly attacked California by name, and he invested millions of dollars to elect Republicans in our state. It’s safe to say that he’s likely to do the same in 2025 and 2026. We were able to overcome this dark money in 2024 because we had the early support of everyday folks who fueled our Forever Organizing program. Forever Organizing means that we WON’T wait until a few months before the election to mobilize, but instead work around the clock and over a year ahead of time to lay the groundwork. That’s what we are looking to do again in 2025. We are about to make big decisions in the coming month on where we will invest, and how much. So, this is truly a critical moment for us to hit our End-of-Month goal of raising another $6,450.75 or more. = = = = = = Sincerely, Camille Finance Director CADEM.org | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. | Our February deadline is tonight, and I wanted to make sure I reached you.

I already have **TWO** Republican opponents vying for MI-03 to keep control of the House. House Republicans know they have a historically narrow majority and will be fighting to cover more ground to keep control.

We’re much better positioned now to challenge this administration because of the work we put in to sustain this district year after year. Now, we need to continue building the foundation to defend this seat, take back the House, and reign in Elon Musk and the Trump administration.

body:
The earlier we can identify, recruit, and train women leaders who are ready to step up and fight for their communities, the better our chances of flipping the seats we need to take back the House in 2026.

| Peter,

Over the last 20 years, Emerge has helped recruit and train thousands of women across the country to run for office and _**win**_ elections. With the Trump Administration threatening to take us backward and undo decades of progress, our work has never been more important.

**Here’s the deal, Peter:_House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities in nearly a hundred years!_**

The earlier we can identify, recruit, and train women leaders who are ready to step up and fight for their communities, the better our chances of flipping the seats we need to take back the House in 2026.

The investments we make today mean more women candidates on the ballot next year, who will serve as a strong firewall against Trump's dangerous policies. Your support will allow us to tap into the growing grassroots energy on the ground and identify women leaders who are ready to run for office.

[_**Will you rush a donation ahead of our midnight fundraising deadline to help us reach our $25,000 February goal so we can continue investing in women leaders across the country year-round?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102984549/530901335/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-02-28_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkZjYzYTEyLTMzZjYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNiNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_mr3EqpRbcr_7cr_SFnVhLHCCxMT7JcbXIbvdvVJ-7g=)

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: personal note from Andrea
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102985022/530902873/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJiYjg5Yy0zM2Y2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYZ8Oe1Eh05L6N5q4_t76lSy720Nq5S9CJ8GELYIQ6A=) In the last five weeks, we’ve seen a dizzying number of attacks on our economy, on the rule of law, and on hardworking American families. But now, all across the country, we’re seeing the American people fight back. We need to build on that energy, and we need to keep it going. We need to show House Republicans that if they keep giving in to Trump’s demands — attacking Medicaid, cutting food stamps, and giving more and more tax breaks to billionaires — that they’re going to pay for it dearly at the ballot box. [_**Today, I’m humbly asking you to help me send that message.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102985023/530902874/1745489160?recode=email_022825_personal-note&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJiYjg5Yy0zM2Y2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYZ8Oe1Eh05L6N5q4_t76lSy720Nq5S9CJ8GELYIQ6A=) Let me explain: We have a critical end-of-month deadline in just a few hours, and we need to show national Republicans that the grassroots energy is with _us_ in this fight — and _against_ their extremist attacks on our families. They may have billionaires like Elon Musk in their corner, but we have hardworking folks all across this country, who aren’t going to take these attacks on their dignity lying down. **If we’re going to send that message, then we need to show that our grassroots army is building up a war chest to kick Republicans out of the majority in this next election — and I need your help to do that.** [_**Let’s show these extremists that they will pay for their attacks — and their capitulation to Trump — at the ballot box. Will you pitch in before our midnight deadline tonight, help us reach our goal, and show these far-right extremists just how powerful our grassroots movement is?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102985024/530902875/-533866197?recode=email_022825_personal-note&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJiYjg5Yy0zM2Y2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYZ8Oe1Eh05L6N5q4_t76lSy720Nq5S9CJ8GELYIQ6A=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102985025/530902876/-533866197?recode=email_022825_personal-note&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJiYjg5Yy0zM2Y2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYZ8Oe1Eh05L6N5q4_t76lSy720Nq5S9CJ8GELYIQ6A=)

clean_body: = In the last five weeks, we’ve seen a dizzying number of attacks on our economy, on the rule of law, and on hardworking American families. But now, all across the country, we’re seeing the American people fight back. We need to build on that energy, and we need to keep it going. We need to show House Republicans that if they keep giving in to Trump’s demands — attacking Medicaid, cutting food stamps, and giving more and more tax breaks to billionaires — that they’re going to pay for it dearly at the ballot box. = Let me explain: We have a critical end-of-month deadline in just a few hours, and we need to show national Republicans that the grassroots energy is with us in this fight — and against their extremist attacks on our families. They may have billionaires like Elon Musk in their corner, but we have hardworking folks all across this country, who aren’t going to take these attacks on their dignity lying down. If we’re going to send that message, then we need to show that our grassroots army is building up a war chest to kick Republicans out of the majority in this next election — and I need your help to do that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hey there, Peter – I know you're busy, so I’ll make this quick.
I've been sounding the alarm about how devastating Trump’s scheme to illegally withhold federal funds from communities who rely on the support, his dangerous Cabinet picks, and his enabling of Elon Musk’s hostile government have been and will continue to be for families in Washington state and across the country.
There is a lot going on – and we’re __so close__**** to hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal, but we need just $2,019 before midnight to close the gap and show the groundswell of support Democrats have in opposition to Trump, Musk, and every other dangerous Trump yes-man.
But if we come up short, Republicans will take it as a sign that our movement doesn’t have what it takes to put a check on their pro-billionaire, anti-middle-class agenda.
**So what do you say, Peter? Can I count on you? If so, here’s your customized link to chip in:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm-email-2025-q1-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102985358/530906392/-1308448140?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk462-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWYyZTA1Mi0zNGY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GjCatqrj746WOZRZp76Nb-1AHfnB7FTAYKqv1E4BZZM=)**

body:
| | Peter,

In the first two months of the new Congress, I’ve been hard at work ensuring my constituents have a seat at the table where decisions are made. But, at town halls, at daycare drop off, and from many calls and emails, I’m hearing from constituents that they’re frustrated by what is happening in DC.

Working families in Southwest Washington don’t want to see petty political fights, or billionaires dismantling our government. They care about good schools, safe streets, and being able to afford eggs without reaching for the credit card. They want our government to function so that we can access the services we pay for. **So that’s what I’m focused on.**

**I came to Congress to put our issues first, and I’m keeping my word – but I need your support to keep up this work.** [Will you help us reach our $25,000 February goal by chipping in $10 before the deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102985466/530907263/-97049590?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250227_1_1&refcode2=dc659aa4-34f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1OWFhNC0zNGY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAmp3Sw9YZ8C_sokyK20_KgteOwthbK6zBe65poVDMA=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102985467/530907265/-97049590?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250227_1_1&refcode2=dc659aa4-34f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1OWFhNC0zNGY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAmp3Sw9YZ8C_sokyK20_KgteOwthbK6zBe65poVDMA=)**

While I’m focused on the issues I’m hearing about from Washingtonians, another major battle is looming in 2026.

The Cook Political Report has officially rated WA-03 a “toss-up” for next year. And, national GOP donors are *already* looking for candidates they can run against me, and they’re preparing to spend big to flip this seat.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2977179948bf4ead967bd6a463de9308&_e=knFSVGoNpnf33fYarTYG5ibtUaIQORA2OZfq5GL-v6QW1d3LWTh8CHPOBcOQEH5V7S7BRB2C9isIS4iK1SzqUWiL2yidUOdrAtQbyfLgVWxZUbp4AZxlSi6qjD-NKlPOkO0NJtySVb67mkQeELIkcnUHv33H0fJDlYrVNXeZvED7vCENDQryzFl1zkDoZlk9pj_o83nTmRBrcNE7et7LB45yGckeWmbYqAQRGX_67QyPEiRoDLZ-lfmr0GsWOjOR3j75_vgXgaA2KKmREIK8fEcYcXccYSkWMYRBYTZl_zeZ9uQbj8Kw0zJ6JAczYMKE1X_RvByGD4BgVacqmPKmm-aHPzxXs7yjSJfPIjVwDm_h7u9BeDD28z4bskWmqXOMAbWvlm9NIFkUyU21z-dvnA%3D%3D)

| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2977179948bf4ead967bd6a463de9308&_e=knFSVGoNpnf33fYarTYG5ibtUaIQORA2OZfq5GL-v6QW1d3LWTh8CHPOBcOQEH5V7S7BRB2C9isIS4iK1SzqUWiL2yidUOdrAtQbyfLgVWxZUbp4AZxlSi6qjD-NKlPOkO0NJtySVb67mkQeELIkcnUHv33H0fJDlYrVNXeZvED7vCENDQryzFl1zkDoZlk9pj_o83nTmRBrcNE7et7LB45yGckeWmbYqAQRGX_67QyPEiRoDLZ-lfmr0GsWOjORgQlOl1vAnJUppqlR8qMVXWtBRb9-9wEDzOe629z23zdwlh1rnxDFEmkNBgnDJrLdGZfRscLinQRyKMhJuUW8ADGJznSdgC5X1LhPMRcyBioJtRY2pn_Vhgfy97dzOZxecitADTs-uWNb2IqzquAbxA%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. name: Michael Bennet
subject: The fight for our freedoms has never been more important.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250228_febeom_3_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250228_febeom_3_act]
Hi friends, it’s Michael.
Whether it was as a Superintendent or a U.S. Senator, throughout my career I’ve always been guided by what I believe are four essential freedoms every American is entitled to.
The freedom to rise, which we can achieve by prioritizing working families, fighting childhood poverty, and building an economy that works for everyone, not just folks at the top.
The freedom to learn, through investing in our public schools, our educators, and our students – not banning books or dismantling the Department of Education.
The freedom from violence, by passing common-sense gun safety laws, fighting the opioid epidemic, and ending the extremism that flourishes on social media.
T he freedom to govern ourselves, which we can realize by reforming our electoral system so our voices – not dark money – have the most power, while keeping the government out of our doctor's office and our bedrooms.
I know that achieving these freedoms to their fullest extent seems far-fetched right now. But no matter how long the odds may feel, they will always be worth fighting for.
I’m not giving up anytime soon. If you’re doing this with me, I would love to have your support before our campaign’s fundraising deadline at midnight. Can you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250228_febeom_3_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250228_febeom_3_act]
And if you're in this with me for the long haul, consider becoming one of our monthly donors to make a real and sustained impact in this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250228_febeom_3_act&recurring=1]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250228_febeom_3_act&recurring=1]
Thank you,
Michael Bennet

Denver, CO 80201
United States

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://www.rushernbaker.com/links [https://www.rushernbaker.com/links]
Friends and Neighbors,
I won’t take up too much of your time—I know it’s late. But we have just a few hours left before our final fundraising deadline, and I need you with me one more time.
Everything we’ve worked for comes down to these last moments. Every call we make, every door we knock on, every voter we reach—it’s all powered by this grassroots team. And right now, we still need 100 more people to chip in before midnight.
This is your last chance to be part of this final push. Will you make a donation before the clock runs out?
Rush Donation Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
No regrets. No missed opportunities. Just all of us, fighting for the future of Prince George’s County. Let’s bring this home.
With appreciation,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive
P.S. Your support today will help us reach more voters and build the momentum we need to win. Please consider donating whatever you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We the people need this right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voters desperately need a " private right to action " to protect their rights. All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections.
This 8th Circuit decision strips us of that -- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice(DOJ). And we're starting four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing attacks from a hostile presidential administration.
There's so much at risk, Team. RUSH $25 or more right now so we have the resources we need to fight rulings like this one and protect our right to vote across the country >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue
Folks,
As we assess threats with Trump back in office, this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
With former Florida AG Pam Bondi confirmed as Attorney General as a"big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=15&amtOpts=&recurringAm=15&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=96kJGVvPpQWdiQmip224OnRKtCNcug3jlY7mr82s7I0=&contactdata=dXhXrwIDYlnyjNfpPQRbvXtiGllg3pjWctjrbC661Ci0RbEDBDNpUslX2VyyF+SqRA4SyiO4pLq1q3eensBhRaxgiV4Jn8V22b+4HrcpumU=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25&amtOpts=&recurringAm=25&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=96kJGVvPpQWdiQmip224OnRKtCNcug3jlY7mr82s7I0=&contactdata=dXhXrwIDYlnyjNfpPQRbvXtiGllg3pjWctjrbC661Ci0RbEDBDNpUslX2VyyF+SqRA4SyiO4pLq1q3eensBhRaxgiV4Jn8V22b+4HrcpumU=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=96kJGVvPpQWdiQmip224OnRKtCNcug3jlY7mr82s7I0=&contactdata=dXhXrwIDYlnyjNfpPQRbvXtiGllg3pjWctjrbC661Ci0RbEDBDNpUslX2VyyF+SqRA4SyiO4pLq1q3eensBhRaxgiV4Jn8V22b+4HrcpumU=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=96kJGVvPpQWdiQmip224OnRKtCNcug3jlY7mr82s7I0=&contactdata=dXhXrwIDYlnyjNfpPQRbvXtiGllg3pjWctjrbC661Ci0RbEDBDNpUslX2VyyF+SqRA4SyiO4pLq1q3eensBhRaxgiV4Jn8V22b+4HrcpumU=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250&amtOpts=&recurringAm=250&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=96kJGVvPpQWdiQmip224OnRKtCNcug3jlY7mr82s7I0=&contactdata=dXhXrwIDYlnyjNfpPQRbvXtiGllg3pjWctjrbC661Ci0RbEDBDNpUslX2VyyF+SqRA4SyiO4pLq1q3eensBhRaxgiV4Jn8V22b+4HrcpumU=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=dXhXrwIDYlnyjNfpPQRbvXtiGllg3pjWctjrbC661Ci0RbEDBDNpUslX2VyyF+SqRA4SyiO4pLq1q3eensBhRaxgiV4Jn8V22b+4HrcpumU=]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=dXhXrwIDYlnyjNfpPQRbvXtiGllg3pjWctjrbC661Ci0RbEDBDNpUslX2VyyF+SqRA4SyiO4pLq1q3eensBhRaxgiV4Jn8V22b+4HrcpumU=]

subject: Last chance, Peter!
body:
Now is the time to channel our outrage into a clear path forward. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102988248/530924090/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE263_20250228_FebJMCloser_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055761&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFjYjhkYi0zOGY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aJZeW55fcsASBhh8YADptKpPu-Oj77PWVmxOC-PIn0=) Hi Peter,

We're just one month into Trump's presidency, and already the new administration and its self-dealing cronies — like billionaire Elon Musk — are wreaking havoc on vital American institutions and relentlessly attacking our fundamental rights. The onslaught from Republicans is overwhelming, and that's exactly their strategy. Their aim is to exhaust us. But now is not the time to fall back. Now is the time to channel our outrage into a clear path forward.

[**I know that EMILYs List candidates and our pro-choice community are ready to fight back. That's why we set an ambitious goal to raise $150,000 by midnight tonight. Donate today to help us reach it:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102988256/530924099/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE263_20250228_FebJMCloser_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055761&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFjYjhkYi0zOGY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aJZeW55fcsASBhh8YADptKpPu-Oj77PWVmxOC-PIn0=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102988261/530924127/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE263_20250228_FebJMCloser_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055761&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFjYjhkYi0zOGY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aJZeW55fcsASBhh8YADptKpPu-Oj77PWVmxOC-PIn0=)
---
Here are some important dates I've marked on my calendar:

**March 5:** In just a few days, it will be one year since I took on my role as president of EMILYs List. I've been reflecting on when I first joined this organization as an intern years ago, filled with hope and determination to build a better future by electing women up and down the ballot, all across this country. I am more determined than ever as I see Democratic pro-choice women stepping up across the country, into the center of the most critical fights in front of us, including how we take back power.

**April 1:** Electing **Judge Susan Crawford** to the Wisconsin Supreme Court could be the first pro-choice victory since the 2024 elections. But just last week, Elon Musk's PAC poured over $1 million into supporting the anti-choice extremist running against Judge Crawford. The future of abortion access is on the line, and we’re sending a clear message in our support of Judge Crawford: our movement will never back down.

**November 4:** Every Election Day presents an opportunity to elect Democratic pro-choice women. This year, there will be EMILYs List races up and down the ballot in Virginia, a gubernatorial race in New Jersey, and more. Once elected, women like **Abigail Spanberger (VA-Gov)** and **Rep. Mikie Sherrill (NJ-Gov)** will be ready to lead on day one. Peter, with the support of this community, we can help prepare the next generation of EMILYs List women to fight the toughest battles of 2025 — and WIN.

[**Don't miss your LAST CHANCE to chip in toward our End-of-Month goal! Donate today to support Democratic pro-choice women running for office right now: **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102988264/530924133/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE263_20250228_FebJMCloser_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055761&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTFjYjhkYi0zOGY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aJZeW55fcsASBhh8YADptKpPu-Oj77PWVmxOC-PIn0=)

clean_body: Now is the time to channel our outrage into a clear path forward. | = Hi Peter, We're just one month into Trump's presidency, and already the new administration and its self-dealing cronies — like billionaire Elon Musk — are wreaking havoc on vital American institutions and relentlessly attacking our fundamental rights. The onslaught from Republicans is overwhelming, and that's exactly their strategy. Their aim is to exhaust us. But now is not the time to fall back. Now is the time to channel our outrage into a clear path forward. = | = Here are some important dates I've marked on my calendar: March 5: In just a few days, it will be one year since I took on my role as president of EMILYs List. I've been reflecting on when I first joined this organization as an intern years ago, filled with hope and determination to build a better future by electing women up and down the ballot, all across this country. I am more determined than ever as I see Democratic pro-choice women stepping up across the country, into the center of the most critical fights in front of us, including how we take back power. April 1: Electing Judge Susan Crawford to the Wisconsin Supreme Court could be the first pro-choice victory since the 2024 elections. But just last week, Elon Musk's PAC poured over $1 million into supporting the anti-choice extremist running against Judge Crawford. The future of abortion access is on the line, and we’re sending a clear message in our support of Judge Crawford: our movement will never back down. November 4: Every Election Day presents an opportunity to elect Democratic pro-choice women. This year, there will be EMILYs List races up and down the ballot in Virginia, a gubernatorial race in New Jersey, and more. Once elected, women like Abigail Spanberger (VA-Gov) and Rep. Mikie Sherrill (NJ-Gov) will be ready to lead on day one. Peter, with the support of this community, we can help prepare the next generation of EMILYs List women to fight the toughest battles of 2025 — and WIN. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Mike (personal)
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
Peter, my priority will always be to work for my constituents and fight for all Americans’ rights and freedoms.

I know these past few weeks of Republican leadership in the House, Senate, and the White House may have some people feeling defeated but we can’t stop now. I need to know my supporters are with me as we look ahead to 2026.

Our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year is only 72 hours away. We need 500 contributions to start this new year and launch a new campaign on the right foot. Will you please contribute $10 or anything you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $200 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?express_lane=true&amount=200] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?express_lane=true]

2026 is our next chance to take back the House. Even though 2026 seems far away, the work we do now will help us win.

In Congress, I will work across the aisle but I can’t ignore the GOP attempts to destroy sensible and responsible policy solutions that bolster the middle class, eliminate jobs, raise the cost of housing and health care, and endanger our communities.

Peter, I need your support. Please, chip in before Friday night to help us meet our goal of 500 contributions. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-jan-25?amount=10]

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

name: WWIII??
subject: This Tantrum Has Threatened Democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Donald Trump is playing a dangerous game—with global stability on the line.
When Ukrainian President Zelensky reaffirmed the U.S.-Ukraine alliance, Trump erupted, dismissing him with a sneer, claiming he "didn’t have the cards," and kicking him out. This isn’t strength—it’s reckless, unhinged behavior, and an unacceptable way to treat an ally of the U.S.
I’m Gay Valimont, and I’m running for Congress because we cannot let Trump’s tantrums dictate our future. I’m relying on you, the American people, to help me now; we need it more than ever to win this election.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/77435675467159383736325732385634625A32306E764662736D355939694D76664F6A595362314632496F4A6652787A3256376D4B6C734D6A33535558515030/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-28%20at%206.26.50%E2%80%AFPM.png]
If this administration won’t stand by our allies, how will they handle real crises? We’ve seen the cost of failed diplomacy before, and we can’t afford to let history repeat itself. Trump told Zelenskyy “you are gambling with World War III,” and we cannot afford to find out whether this is another Trump scandal, or an international catastrophe waiting to happen.
It’s time to put an end to this chaos. The corruption at home is now fueling instability abroad, and the only way to stop Trump from leading us further down this disastrous path is by flipping this Congressional seat BLUE.
We need to act now. Chip in $9 today—every second counts. Let’s send a message that we will not allow reckless leadership to endanger our country or the world. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/77435675467159383736325732385634625A32306E764662736D355939694D76664F6A595362314632496F4A6652787A3256376D4B6C734D6A33535558515030/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-26%20at%208.43.55%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This is our moment. Let’s rise to it. There are only 35 days until special elections, and every minute is valuable when democracy is on the line.
Thank You,
Gay Valimont
Candidate for Congress, Florida’s 1st District
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States

body:

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Just checking in
body:
Here's what's going on with us

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4ae1b633ddc6/just-checking-in?e=632a01d7cd)
---
| | | | |
# Checking in with Matt Cartwright

| | | | | Well, February made us shiver, but Eagles fans sure got a treat from a big Birds performance at the Super Bowl! Marion and I enjoyed cookies baked by Renee Castaldi. After the election, while I decide if I have any more politics left in my system, I accepted a Visiting Professorship at my old school, Hamilton College, in upstate New York. Once a week, I'm teaching a senior seminar on Serving in Congress. Otherwise, you can find me at my office, 227 Penn Ave. in Scranton. Our sons, Jack and Matty, are doing well. Jack is practicing law at a fine firm in Atlanta, doing interesting work on election law cases and business litigation. Matty is at the M.I.T. School of Business, for his master's in business administration. He got engaged this summer, to a beautiful, smart young lady, Celeste Pallone, who just was awarded her Ph.D. this summer from Columbia University. She's in a Research Fellowship at M.I.T. So, we're getting lots of M.I.T. swag! Marion is hard at work as usual on her law cases and getting ready to serve as the President of the American Association for Justice in two years. She got named to the top 10 lawyers in Pennsylvania by SuperLawyers, for the second year in a row. The boys and I are busting our buttons with pride. Be safe and well, and [stay in touch!](mailto:matt699dw@gmail.com?subject=Hi%2C%20Matt&body=)
Matt
---
| [Email Matt](mailto:matt699dw@gmail.com?subject=Hi%2C%20Matt&body=)

subject: R.C. Maxwell, Newsmax & Project Veritas is joining “Frozen Odds” as expert
body:

---
**I had planned to pay for the filming, production, and marketing for my new movie. But I wanted to open it up for people to help finance the film. Your contribution will help finance the film and you will be invited to private early screenings and opening. You will get a Frozen Odds physical and digital copy of the movie, you will also get a custom shirt and coffee cup. Finally, Your name will be featured in the credits of the movie. "Frozen Odds" we will start filming this spring / summer and I plan to bring some great people from around the country to Alaska and do interviews with Alaskans about their experience with Lisa Murkowski, Ranked Choice Voting, and the hard push by out of state interests to take over Alaska.****This project will be filmed with Netflix approved Red Digital Cameras, used on popular movies like Guardians of the Galaxy, Matrix, Skyfall, Wednesday and thousands more.**
---
[_ _ Click Here to Join Frozen Odds Film Project _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67c26b9333953f74aef9ea09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67be7e3965768c161637adec&l=en-US&s=R4IrrFmQekfoa6IZVyZwZD2mfpI%3D)
---
#### **ANNOUNCEMENT 02/28/2025: RC Maxwell Joins Frozen Odds as Featured Expert**
**We’re excited to announce that RC Maxwell, a fearless journalist and advocate against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV), will be featured in Frozen Odds, a groundbreaking documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight to repeal RCV.****RC Maxwell has an incredible story to tell. Years ago, he exposed Sen. Lisa Murkowski’s ties to RCV, helping reveal the system’s deeper implications. His investigative work with Project Veritas, with James O’Keefe, played a key role in spreading awareness about the dangers of RCV. He has since continued his work with at Newsmax, even interviewing me last year as we battled RCV in Alaska.****Personally, RC Maxwell was pivotal in my journey to challenge RCV. His early reporting helped shape my understanding of the issue, ultimately leading me to write the repeal and lead the grassroots movement against RCV in Alaska. Over the years, I’ve had the privilege of meeting him at CPAC and in Arizona, where I was educating others on the dangers of RCV.****We are honored to have RC Maxwell join us in filming Frozen Odds this summer. His firsthand experience and relentless commitment to election integrity will bring critical insights to this documentary.****Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to uncover the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections!**
---
#### **ANNOUNCEMENT: Captain Seth Keshel and Dr. Chris Mattmann Join Frozen Odds Movie as Featured Experts**
**We’re honored to announce that Seth Keshel, MBA, will be featured in Frozen Odds, the powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).****Seth Keshel is a former Army Captain of Military Intelligence and Afghanistan veteran. His analytical method of election forecasting and analytics is known worldwide, and he has been commended by President Donald J. Trump for his work in the field. He most recently made headlines by correctly forecasting a 312-226 Trump victory in the Electoral College, with accurate picks in all 56 races for electoral votes.****Captain Keshel proposes 10 Points to True Election Integrity and has identified Ranked Choice Voting as one of the eight cardinal sins of election administration. He toured Alaska in the spring of 2022 while fighting the information battle associated with promoting election integrity.****In Frozen Odds, Captain Keshel will bring his expert analysis and firsthand experience to expose the flaws of RCV and its impact on election integrity.****Dr. Chris Mattmann Joins Frozen Odds as Featured Expert****We’re thrilled to announce that Dr. Chris Mattmann, a leading AI and data expert, will be featured in Frozen Odds, a powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).****Dr. Mattmann’s career is nothing short of extraordinary. He is the Chief Data and AI Officer at UCLA, former Chief Technology and Innovation Officer at NASA JPL, and President of Mattmann.ai. An accomplished author and industry leader, he has played key roles in advancing AI, big data, and technology across multiple fields.****With firsthand experience in RCV from his time at the Apache Software Foundation, Dr. Mattmann will break down its flaws in Frozen Odds, sharing his expert insights and concerns based on real-world applications.****Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to reveal the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections.**
---
---
|
---
**Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---

body:
They want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102993329/530936374/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWVlYmQ5OC00MWY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6C9Ex3wW12BF_SxmirzQplFsz1F9a2qnXzEZlT7eFOU=)

Hi, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride — New Dems said I could reach out to you about something important.

You may have heard that I recently gave my first speech as Delaware’s Congresswoman on the floor of the House of Representatives. And you may have also heard that the Republican who recognized me when I came to the podium used the moment to refer to me as the “Gentleman” from Delaware, “Mr. McBride.” A thoroughly unoriginal schoolyard taunt against trans people.

In truth, they want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech: the MAGA effort to gut our government at the expense of working people and my focus on bringing down costs and building a government that respects everyone.

Really, their attacks are about more than just me. The truth is they are using trans people as a pawn in their scheme to gut the federal government and line the pockets of Donald Trump’s best friends.

**But I refuse to be a pawn. I refuse to give them that power. And I refuse to let them get away with it.**

That’s why I’m going to spend every day fighting against their attempts to dismantle the federal government, and fighting for the things Delawareans elected me for — regardless of what kind of personal insults Republicans want to throw my way.

Republicans know what they’re doing right now is unpopular, and that’s why they’re desperate to change the conversation. It’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it.

[**If you’re with me, New Dems and I could really use your support at this moment. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today and help us keep up the fight, no matter what gets thrown our way? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102993330/530936375/244284265?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250228_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWVlYmQ5OC00MWY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6C9Ex3wW12BF_SxmirzQplFsz1F9a2qnXzEZlT7eFOU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and New Dems will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102993331/530936376/244284265?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=NDCAF_20250228_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWVlYmQ5OC00MWY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6C9Ex3wW12BF_SxmirzQplFsz1F9a2qnXzEZlT7eFOU=)

clean_body: They want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech. | = Hi, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride — New Dems said I could reach out to you about something important. You may have heard that I recently gave my first speech as Delaware’s Congresswoman on the floor of the House of Representatives. And you may have also heard that the Republican who recognized me when I came to the podium used the moment to refer to me as the “Gentleman” from Delaware, “Mr. McBride.” A thoroughly unoriginal schoolyard taunt against trans people. In truth, they want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech: the MAGA effort to gut our government at the expense of working people and my focus on bringing down costs and building a government that respects everyone. Really, their attacks are about more than just me. The truth is they are using trans people as a pawn in their scheme to gut the federal government and line the pockets of Donald Trump’s best friends. But I refuse to be a pawn. I refuse to give them that power. And I refuse to let them get away with it. That’s why I’m going to spend every day fighting against their attempts to dismantle the federal government, and fighting for the things Delawareans elected me for — regardless of what kind of personal insults Republicans want to throw my way. Republicans know what they’re doing right now is unpopular, and that’s why they’re desperate to change the conversation. It’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and New Dems will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you again to New Dems for letting me reach out. Peter,

In a moment, [**I’m going to ask you for $5,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102993686/530936805/120040556?refcode=em25_250228_eom4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250228_eom4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8032a2d6-42f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDMyYTJkNi00MmY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qd0AkvoEVfqyhFRUJYmuhzOB-eTi-vl-ltZnGh-a44I=) but before I do, I need to make sure you understand what’s at stake.

February is a short month, **but our goals aren’t any smaller.**

In fact, they’re only growing – because the work ahead is immense, and the road to re-election in this district is never easy.

➡️ We need to take back the House. It is the way to put a check on this dangerous president and Elon Musk, and the Republicans who enable them.

➡️ We need to put the focus back on the people we represent.

➡️ We need to fight back against the GOP’s attacks on our healthcare, our rights, and our democracy.

**But let’s be clear:** _Republicans aren't going to make this easy._

Look – no one wins on Election Day without putting in the work first. And the work starts right now. That's why my team and I have set a $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, and we have until midnight tonight to reach it.

[**So I'm asking: Can I count on you to pitch in $5 – or whatever you can – to help us stay on track ahead of tonight's crucial | | _ _**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**** ** CONTACT: Oregon Republican Party LaJuana Decker, Communications Chair communications.chair@oregon.gop Release Date: February 28, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: **Portland, OR** – Last night Oregon Republican Party’s newly elected Chairman Jerry Cummings joined the ranks of thousands of Portland area victims of motor vehicle theft. While attending an event in Portland Thursday night, his car was stolen from its on-street parking spot in the city. Portland Police took the crime report at the scene. While Portland Police Bureau attempts to find stolen vehicles, fewer than 80% are recovered. Many end up in chop shops where thieves dismantle and sell them for parts. High crime rates, along with high taxes, and business-unfriendly regulatory policies have forced many Oregon businesses to flee Portland. [_Crimegrade.org_](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/XaEqBxdVrRJL/TlNLaHZmODRWQU5OU28wWlJTKzlrNlZHSkQ0T3ZPUmRVQUVLVCtEZXdVQUNoVHRCeUZwZ2NEaVp0VUl5VFE5bjJPQXNwQVBidG1DSnl5OVdRZEhYSVJLS054T3FneS8yeUVyS3o2Y01HVDQ9S0/) gives Oregon a D- grade for property crimes including motor vehicle theft, listing Oregon in the 12th percentile for public safety. Oregonians deserve a government that prioritizes crime-free neighborhoods and city streets to ensure that neighborhood businesses prosper and people enjoy our once beautiful cities. ####

body:

Elon Musk is using federal workers as pawns in his latest stunt—demanding they respond to an arbitrary email or be fired, only to later admit it was just a “test.” Playing with people’s jobs isn’t a joke, and we need to push back against this reckless abuse of power. [**Please chip in now to help us hold Musk and Trump accountable for their attacks on working Americans, and continue reading down below:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102994818/530938316/144130607?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250228_FR_EOM_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_3_8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTYwMzJhMC00NmY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WUYljlNp3HBLKrpAm2S86QfegR2IAOUxyOJnmaIMdL4=&emci=c808b615-b4f3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e96032a0-46f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=32394541)
* * *
_**Begin forwarded message:**_

Hi Peter,

Elon Musk thinks job security is a game and his latest stunt? Sending federal workers an arbitrary email demanding proof of their weekly accomplishments—then threatening to treat non-responses as resignations. _And now, Musk admits it was just a test to see if employees “had a pulse.”_

Let’s be clear: **this isn’t leadership, it’s cruelty.** Playing with people’s livelihoods, families, and futures to is reckless, ruthless, and un-American. But this is exactly what happens when Trump and his billionaire allies take control—disrespect for workers, chaos in government, and blatant disregard for public service.

clean_body: | Peter – did you see the latest message from my team? Elon Musk is using federal workers as pawns in his latest stunt—demanding they respond to an arbitrary email or be fired, only to later admit it was just a “test.” Playing with people’s jobs isn’t a joke, and we need to push back against this reckless abuse of power. Begin forwarded message: Hi Peter, Elon Musk thinks job security is a game and his latest stunt? Sending federal workers an arbitrary email demanding proof of their weekly accomplishments—then threatening to treat non-responses as resignations. And now, Musk admits it was just a test to see if employees “had a pulse.” Let’s be clear: this isn’t leadership, it’s cruelty. Playing with people’s livelihoods, families, and futures to is reckless, ruthless, and un-American. But this is exactly what happens when Trump and his billionaire allies take control—disrespect for workers, chaos in government, and blatant disregard for public service. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. = = = = = Thank you for your support, Team Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States ** **

name: Sydney Kamlager
subject: They Own These Cuts!
disclaimer_text: paid for by slashing programs for children, the elderly, the sick and the middle class
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0fbd3a714904/congressmember-ro-khanna-is-all-in-13472355-asktlzi9fq-14054121?e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Peter: **_ The cliff note version: I VOTED NO!_**
Last week, constituents in Republican districts demanded to know why their representatives were giving their voice to Elon Musk **AND** preparing to vote to cut Medicaid and social security. Nobody heard any real answers.

A handful of Republicans _said _they wouldn’t vote for a bill that cut Medicaid, social security, food assistance for new mothers, and veteran’s benefits.

**Hmm ...**_Watch what they do, not what they say. _

On Tuesday night, Republicans called for votes. The first vote was to count how many Democrats were present - the fewer the Democrats, the lower the number of Republicans needed. Sneaky.

**Well, we showed up.**

_They had to keep the vote open for 45 minutes_ so the Speaker could strong-arm vulnerable Republicans to vote for the Billionaire Boys Club Tax Cut bill. Suddenly, they announced they were leaving for the night and walked off the floor.

Democrats began to leave too, but I smelled fishy. These cats are shady like that.

Sure enough, after a few minutes, the Speaker called the big vote and they rushed back in.

**So did we! **Our full presence forced every Republican to vote on the bill - those vulnerable Republicans turned into weak Republicans.

That's how you do it.

Make them show that they stand against the American people and for Musk and the Billionaire's Boy Club. They now own this $4.5 Trillion tax cut for the richest of the rich, paid for by slashing programs for children, the elderly, the sick and the middle class. We will all feel the pain of these cuts. The sick will get sicker, the working class will have to work harder for less or the same and the rich get richer. It’s Marie Antoinette 2025-style.

What can we do?

**Keep telling the truth!**
---
| [Click for Some Fun Truth](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=02a260e5f2&e=e6ba7d1bc4 "Click for Some Fun Truth")
---
| The truth is that the majority of Americans do not want these cuts, but they also **don’t understand these cuts**.

The truth is the majority of Americans don’t want government waste, but they don’t want Elon Musk controlling our money, data, constitution, the Oval Office, ... **AND he still hasn’t found any waste.**

The truth is the majority of Americans might not always be happy with our democracy, but **they don’t want a king!**

**Our job now is to fight back by telling the truth. We need to keep telling it until we get to 2026.**

This is not about Democrats or Republicans right now, because Donald Trump and Elon Musk are neither. This is about what is right for the whole of this country, our communities and liberty.

_My commitment to you is that I will keep:_

1\. Telling the truth,
2\. Signing on to amicus briefs – bringing the fight to the courts,
3\. Voting NO on the nonsense – and there is lots of it,
4\. Boycotting spineless companies – enough said, and
5\. Calling out the lies and illegalities.

Join me in this fight!

---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=378de7f197&e=e6ba7d1bc4)

$3. One time. That is the donation we’re asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight. $3 because we can’t stand idly by and let Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress do whatever they want. $3 because this moment requires a strong, robust Democratic Party to fight back and organize against Trump and his allies’ disastrous Project 2025 agenda. $3 because the DNC is the organization best positioned to move resources to the places they’re needed most in 2025, 2026, and beyond as we work to elect the Democrats who will be a check on Trump’s power. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Don’t let them distract you, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is all their design. But we won’t take our eyes off the ball.
| We knew that Trump would use his first month in office to unleash his extreme MAGA agenda on Americans. And friend, that’s exactly what he and his cronies have done from day one.

Trump and his allies are throwing so much at us all at once in hopes they can beat us down, sneak dangerous policies into law, and strengthen their full-fledged bro-ligargy — **_and that’s exactly why we can’t take our eyes off the ball._**

[Friend, with the onslaught of attacks on our rights, I’m working with Democrats like the folks at Voter Protection Project to make sure you’re alert, informed, and ready to join us in the fight to protect our freedoms at a moment’s notice. Can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to support our fight? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87447?t=6&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87448?t=7&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87449?t=8&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87450?t=9&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87451?t=10&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87452?t=11&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)
It’s easy to focus on the scary topical stuff: Elon proudly giving the Nazi salute, Trump’s team scrubbing key offices from the White House website, and more is all a show of MAGA’s values (or lack thereof). _But friend, those are designed to distract us._

**Trump and his team are working behind the scenes every day to eradicate reproductive rights, end prescription drug price caps, and make life hell for Americans like us. That’s why we need to stand together, keep each other alert and engaged, and keep holding him accountable.**

[Are you with us? Split a contribution to my campaign and Voter Protection Project so we can continue fighting on the frontlines against the MAGA mob. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87447?t=12&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)
[DONATE TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87447?t=13&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)
---
Friend, we’ll have to take this administration day by day, and goal by goal — but it starts with you.

Thanks for being in this fight,
Eric Swalwell
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19097%2E878179%2E-TTn9f)

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. subject: Once-popular names you never see anymore
body:

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Personally asking you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=gW4u25sd0tUHdiV3j%2Big4tVXWd2PkFvUhBPw5P%2FVoGFwFZh3efbIWq5inA8TdeNu8LJJuvhzoGeNwP59hGvqu4kfmIqkNg6ythmqq3R15chFDx054kiqERss7KK25067Zlef07LJ9aucfe%2FCxQ5idR80D6BHxuAR6U%2F%2FSuMzyGim%2Fa%2F8zmkmicqpV561vtmI2XsgNK%2FSsQY6g1Tqr8IZcFlc8R5O%2FaYxIifcZ7eKuCtUMkEDhOG4YiDNwDKFR%2FKSqtZi%2FgTALRk6BQrHwcXnarZYhn%2FmlVK3jsUQteEANGmcReu5slOFQK9Jj%2BAQVbHs5Uo70lxZo5ycdeMARikai1sCiwX4KWwYOU3VscPtjqeiOrguv8602Sg9V1xr6752A9Y5QaqSoNlWWDGMQRX8NSQzdTHKwnT0jiXYkhPUHNvfLpzOKBvnm1TkSNxznsud]

I wanted to reach out one more time before tonight’s midnight deadline. My team tells me we still need to raise $3,021 to meet tonight’s big goal and stay on track for our reelection plan.

If that’s all you need to hear, you can chip in here: secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-feb25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-feb25?amount=]

The House GOP budget will cut huge amounts of money from Medicaid and SNAP. Musk’s DOGE program has illegally fired everyone from the workers maintaining our nuclear weapons to cancer researchers to FAA safety crews.

The agenda is clear: they want to make the American people poorer, sicker, and less safe. And in return, they’ll use that money to give billionaires tax cuts.

I’m working day and night to push back against that agenda in the House, but I can’t do it alone. Especially not this year, after my district became one of the GOP’s top targets for 2026.

They’re gearing up to spend millions of dollars on districts like CA-25. I can’t take them on without your support.

That’s why I’m asking you again. Can you make sure I have the resources to keep fighting back by donating before midnight tonight? Any amount makes a major difference toward our goal: secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-feb25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-feb25?amount=]

Dr. Raul Ruiz
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

| | _**REST IN PEACE!... To George Soros’s life’s work!**_ My team and I have perfected the strategy to reverse every bit of damage he’s done to our country over the last 50 years. **_If you’re not familiar with George Soros, let me give you a briefing in the words of Elon Musk and Tucker Carlson._** Elon Musk: “[Soros] is doing things that erode the fabric of civilization... He fundamentally HATES humanity!” Tucker Carlson: “Soros has spent decades waging a political, social, and demographic war on the west.”

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv3eerl2r60052d2bg2chbdm8ef2cr0sp3caegvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o71cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbhe8362gqiv2vnl40droakgc2k32khv3e8upkso_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o71cph2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

1600 Daily
