name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc8nri93l940e33gqtv5hj4p2dl0fe0c4hfasmcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o76cph2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbf5s2kt5m801a8vu2dctd60csrkhthepjndg58o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o76cph2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zii0tei6nvutf9gr9rihl7d3ec61jve5ggk1asq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o76cph2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn9is82hi3h3gr2sqb3um2bgneb8a1vabasabbi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o76cph2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z030p20mt8jeri8pjrjoh0gukpu2o26kij5cne30_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o76cph2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp6go7sv5kjcbv53gf3pri4i23un9b51fihipj88_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o76cph2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrrfrsksc0clduh4jdrmpppcf53j882oisdivlug_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o76cph2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. body:

Friend - on days like these, I like sitting back with a nice cup of coffee and thinking about all of the things I'm grateful for as an American.

And I'm thankful to President Donald Trump for Making America Great Again.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4pndv0to9vqbqdedbdjcfjc50efr2p1vnuca5c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h66o77cdh2bs)**_

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9f6llq4u2k5r7jie49h0omiuiahmm1k8hhvn2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h6epr1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6ln99lr7ina6dl7bubo61cgv4raahjsfsi6s18_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h6epr1c1h2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Will you grade our performance, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have just released our 2025 Progress Report to see how we are doing so far this year.

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj3ln15qnio8scdlpnda2cau382e0srbacokiie8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2c9h2bs)
---

I'd love to hear your thoughts, Friend.

House Republicans have just released our 2025 Progress Report to see how we are doing so far this year.

And you were identified as a top Republican supporter willing to share your feedback.

**[Will you please complete the 2025 House GOP Progress Report?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0lpgh3nvaleb96a6056aped347bsb9e1qcbm860_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2c9h2bs "Will you please complete the 2025 House GOP Progress Report?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE 2025 PROGRESS REPORT](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zim03gte3rr69dmq4607karn4kkf9v946qkjfv7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2c9h2bs "COMPLETE 2025 PROGRESS REPORT")
---

Our GOP trifecta has been hard at work in 2025, and we've accomplished so much already.

_**Cutting wasteful spending. Finding the fraud. Eliminating woke government programs. Ending the abuse of taxpayer dollars.**_

Don't get me wrong, there's still PLENTY of work left to be done to save our country and make America Great Again. But I'd say we're off to a great start.

Do you agree?

**[Let me know by completing the 2025 House GOP Progress Report today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zolp8l326o2nrbh59q84rqgr2bq24e1ee7r65kd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2c9h2bs "Let me know by completing the 2025 House GOP Progress Report today.")**

**Friend 's Secure Link: [https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/gop-progress-report-mj](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5rfqgv9qpugj1dpebraomdsrcg7jq73m33l0afg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2c9h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/gop-progress-report-mj")**

---

---

My team is reviewing responses first thing tomorrow morning, so please don't miss out on your chance to share your thoughts.

I look forward to seeing what you have to say.

Thank you,

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zr1kvokm4o6hmukagj0u316jtgvl90h1jod1gamo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zuk5jtaaievpev8tu4n1t9f2nepaujqintgl4p2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zq09t4dibfofg5dj7gdr29k7eojs3nq1esr8h2s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zodn2on3aonthrkhp4lkjd1ri2v974loj9vhqdd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjjrknovh4nqjuhi2hkecofnhurn1o5a72to39j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztm7bpgisqoimh37qc4jf6u83u68etnni0j2vebo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7g56ceu9opf8ll65jjfuf6339hitc333otfj7oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z4f0fggstao0rqbu9hsoljhn7rm12ddl8g9aotk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zo49i605tmkjvealvanba8euv3j7u8m2ovdhmc0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfm05q3tf4eodq4fcmh2q8hedt3lagni6jnliteo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1ce6nqhhim3capdqkp2n33ve6496h9vh05qm03g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z4k6lidru1gfp3n7bgdjqlo4n5pbqj1upaaegl6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvfg9h6n7oe9hlrhaj99600rdchi7kmvo3lap2u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbar8qoufseosoqikvs6r3mir2h6ssb6ivk66vvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zml23fs3drlff4q966elnd0psoivjifqjfd96640_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h61or2cth2bs)**_**_

The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Will you grade our performance, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have just released our 2025 Progress Report to see how we are doing so far this year.

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zshocrf9ethamehnuvgdctgbbpvcjddh4l1lcat8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h69pb4clh2bs)
---

I'd love to hear your thoughts, Friend.

House Republicans have just released our 2025 Progress Report to see how we are doing so far this year.

And you were identified as a top Republican supporter willing to share your feedback.

**[Will you please complete the 2025 House GOP Progress Report?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdv42h9pp0vtc40l0tl3tbgfi2jo131tkv0360hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h69pb4clh2bs "Will you please complete the 2025 House GOP Progress Report?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE 2025 PROGRESS REPORT](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zj41fqqk6nffa143n92qp7g4bquiqe4i1sd5f3ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h69pb4clh2bs "COMPLETE 2025 PROGRESS REPORT")
---

Our GOP trifecta has been hard at work in 2025, and we've accomplished so much already.

_**Cutting wasteful spending. Finding the fraud. Eliminating woke government programs. Ending the abuse of taxpayer dollars.**_

Don't get me wrong, there's still PLENTY of work left to be done to save our country and make America Great Again. But I'd say we're off to a great start.

Do you agree?

**[Let me know by completing the 2025 House GOP Progress Report today.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zq42hacr2tn31onft2c7c5v57hrilaoflqof2rbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3h69pb4clh2bs "Let me know by completing the 2025 House GOP Progress Report today.")**

---

---

My team is reviewing responses first thing tomorrow morning, so please don't miss out on your chance to share your thoughts.

I look forward to seeing what you have to say.

Thank you,

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaj7a8mcf9dtjl2lqq9euad2ju40ev9bhamn6de0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc4bp6ac4hmnvcjfv71gpf8a4cejiq685kucmkuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob2c3h2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

Your America
---

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m thankful for PRESIDENT TRUMP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are you, friend?

Friend - on days like these, I like sitting back with a nice cup of coffee and thinking about all of the things I'm grateful for as an American.

_**[I'm thankful for living in the greatest country in the history of the earth.

And I'm thankful to President Donald Trump for Making America Great Again.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbe0evdp3khnhhm9u6shbepnrhi1a6dkabs0otco_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs)**_

No matter how much hatred or lies the Democrats want to spew, nothing will change the fact that America is now on the path to our golden age, all thanks to conservatives like YOU.

******************************************************[KEEP AMERICA STRONG](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdk66dhfmphcvsiq6f82dlpi6b0h41te63400m6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs)******************************************************

But our recent success is now under threat by the same radical liberals who destroyed our country under the Biden-Harris regime. The Democrats are deviously plotting their next moves to:

**[➔ Impeach and remove President Trump from office
➔ Pack the Supreme Court with activist judges](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zriqrge73k8p60apti9fg9q6b4nt38uihlt7o5b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs)**

This is a **[CODE RED](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrkio2qs01lhohbh15a63q9ktv6qg85luu999hq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs) **situation, and I will need every patriot reading this email to step up if we are going to put an end to these schemes.

Republican leadership has tasked me with identifying _**[10,000 like-minded conservatives](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z898tdi3f0t7nj8dm62sprs9lnon7iidtkdo1g8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs)**_ who want to defend President Trump from the Democrats' attacks to ensure the MAGA agenda is fully realized during the next four years.

**[So please dig deep and rush whatever donation you can; just $5 could make all the difference between us and a repeat of the same failures our country underwent with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris at the White House.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrkmmb444ropq1l8pfjasauk37qn7fdor5bg8e20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs)**

God Bless,

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We have to take this seriously
body:
Writing this off could come back to haunt us.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeso6kfd2d894d9cou8rer2iue3kgodtqretfqcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I forgot what it feels like to see America WIN – and it sure feels great!
---
President Trump is back in the White House, and our unified Party is working to usher in a Golden Age for America.
---
_But I can’t say the same for the Democrats. They would rather see our nation FAIL than let America win with President Trump at the helm._
---
So, they’re resorting to the same old tactics...
---
**“Donald Trump Impeachment Articles Filed. Here's What Happens Next”** [Source: _Newsweek_]
---
**But I want to be clear: We _MUST_ take this threat _seriously_.**
---
With imminent special elections coming up, our House Majority could fall to a mere **TOSS-UP!**
---
...And Democrats certainly know that. In fact, they’re __BANKING__ on it!
---
They see a TOSS-UP majority as an opening to successfully IMPEACH President Trump in the House.
---
**Over the course of the 2024 election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ away from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
_I say that because I firmly believe that elected officials need to put skin in the game and fight right alongside you._
---
And fighting together, our shared efforts paid off: we held the House, flipped the Senate, and won back the White House.
---
**But now, with multiple special elections just weeks away, I’m calling on _2.5 million_ grassroots patriots like YOU to defend our TOSS-UP majority and stop the Democrats’ impeachment plot dead in its tracks.**
---
[**Please make a contribution of any size to DEFEND our House majority that could soon be a mere TOSS-UP._**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z18up9jvt7koss1f3i9t58tkk2efjfduh4ts5vn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j60ob6cph2bs)

# **[A 'father of Europe' is one step closer to beatification](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9NTQyNTMifQ/HF4-wnn55ih0KURaKFx-KQ)**
---
Alcide De Gasperi delivers a speech in Bologna, Italy, in 1951. / Credit: Democrazia Cristiana, Public domain, via Wikimedia Commons Madrid, Spain, Feb 28, 2025 / 15:30 pm (CNA). The closing ceremony of the diocesan phase of the beatification process of Servant of God Alcide De Gasperi (1881–1954), an Italian politician recognized as one of the “fathers of Europe,” was held Friday at the Lateran Palace in Rome.Along with the former French minister of foreign affairs, Robert Schuman, already declared venerable by Pope Francis, and German Chancellor Konrad Adenauer, after the Second World War De Gasperi was one of the promoters of the project for a united Europe, inspired by the values of Christian humanism. He was a leading figure in the Christian Democratic Party in Italy.

clean_body: Volodymyr Zelensky squandered an opportunity and his people will continue to die if he doesn't learn to show some humility and gratitude. | Volodymyr Zelensky squandered an opportunity and his people will continue to die if he doesn't learn to show some humility and gratitude. Read More Credit: (Screenshot), IndyStar, via YouTube Sadly, the legendary actor Gene Hackman is no longer with us. We are left only with the stories of his friends and family, and his huge and amazing body of work. One of the toughest actors to ever strut across the screens of classic cinema, Gene Hackman, died early this week Citigroup erroneously credited $81 trillion, instead of $280, to a customer’s account and took hours to reverse the transaction, a “near miss” that shows up the bank’s operational issues it has sought to fix, The Financial Times reported Friday. The error, which occurred last April, was missed by a payments employee and a second official [...]...Click to read more Rachel Maddow’s rant at her MSNBC bosses about firing Joy Reid and other non-white hosts has backfired... with her fellow liberals now calling on her to resign in solidarity. The $25 million a year host took her bosses to task live on air this week saying it was ‘disturbing’ that ‘nonwhite hosts in primetime were [...]...Click to read more Alcide De Gasperi delivers a speech in Bologna, Italy, in 1951. / Credit: Democrazia Cristiana, Public domain, via Wikimedia Commons Madrid, Spain, Feb 28, 2025 / 15:30 pm (CNA). The closing ceremony of the diocesan phase of the beatification process of Servant of God Alcide De Gasperi (1881–1954), an Italian politician recognized as one of the “fathers of Europe,” was held Friday at the Lateran Palace in Rome.Along with the former French minister of foreign affairs, Robert Schuman, already declared venerable by Pope Francis, and German Chancellor Konrad Adenauer, after the Second World War De Gasperi was one of the promoters of the project for a united Europe, inspired by the values of Christian humanism. He was a leading figure in the Christian Democratic Party in Italy. P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m thankful for PRESIDENT TRUMP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are you, friend?

Friend - on days like these, I like sitting back with a nice cup of coffee and thinking about all of the things I'm grateful for as an American.

_**[I'm thankful for living in the greatest country in the history of the earth.

And I'm thankful to President Donald Trump for Making America Great Again.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt5b002a65mq8690fquh4ujrjhg4pons1i1vep2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs)**_

No matter how much hatred or lies the Democrats want to spew, nothing will change the fact that America is now on the path to our golden age, all thanks to conservatives like YOU.

******************************************************[KEEP AMERICA STRONG](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmom4h56j3rmpmq14a3l9mu9dh6jbms632gvkrd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs)******************************************************

But our recent success is now under threat by the same radical liberals who destroyed our country under the Biden-Harris regime. The Democrats are deviously plotting their next moves to:

**[➔ Impeach and remove President Trump from office
➔ Pack the Supreme Court with activist judges](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj1g379teofvqhmcp8gl9hfdlufudb4qnv0oq500_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs)**

This is a **[CODE RED](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgjisg1r6i0tv5q7fjm0ca2ob7vj66okcplrumj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs) **situation, and I will need every patriot reading this email to step up if we are going to put an end to these schemes.

Republican leadership has tasked me with identifying _**[10,000 like-minded conservatives](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8c0f2561lf0nq6eluneamp7pe5f9scjl12vdjl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs)**_ who want to defend President Trump from the Democrats' attacks to ensure the MAGA agenda is fully realized during the next four years.

**[So please dig deep and rush whatever donation you can; just $5 could make all the difference between us and a repeat of the same failures our country underwent with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris at the White House.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj22n851boa6af44dcp0rlusud2d9hu97sj8ins0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs)**

God Bless,
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7as4fbnr29nt0jse5qs6fhis5tituitlohds2cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs)
Senator Marsha Blackburn

******************************************************[KEEP AMERICA STRONG](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsfer6iog1lr9pf21hcr8v586523qnvj77hei1so_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6cp30cdh2bs)******************************************************

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: Surrendering to God’s will.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Hi, it’s Monica again. The TV pundits – who hate pro-Trump Latinos like me – said I’d never win here.

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5mqkegb6kj855vlr1cmkr7ps3r6mps9s70qkmo0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62o34c3h2bs)
---

I'm surrendering...

...to God's will.

But don't confuse that with giving up the fight. This is Monica De La Cruz - even when the odds are against me, I never throw in the towel.

_I kept fighting even though a Republican had never won in TX-15.

I kept fighting when the political pundits said a MAGA Latina would never win here.

And I'll keep fighting now despite the Democrat machine pledging - within DAYS of being sworn in - to drop up to 50 million bucks on my head._

I promise you I'll keep fighting to the bitter end, but I can't go it alone. **[So I'm asking you for a small donation to help me destroy the Democrat machine and humiliate the TV pundits who hate pro-Trump Latinos like me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8r67rp7f93up323edcrkcknr73etri7c0f3eu98_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62o34c3h2bs "So I’m asking you for a small donation to help me destroy the Democrat machine and humiliate the TV pundits who hate pro-Trump Latinos like me.")**

The ONLY way I'll prevail is with your support right now:

If all you can afford right now is a prayer, that's OK too. **All I ask is for every patriot reading this to pitch in SOMETHING. Even a few bucks really helps. **

I'll never forget your support at a time like this.

God bless you,
Monica

body:
We work for you. I want to make sure we're fighting for the things YOU care about, addressing YOUR concerns, and prioritizing what YOU want us to.

| |
---
| | | My fellow American:

Humbly, I'm requesting your feedback on my brand **_[new DOGE survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztni3dh6n4qfir8otcoium4p2l9btsle0sprrc98_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62o34cjh2bs "new DOGE survey.")_.** The White House and Congress are moving fast to slash waste, streamline inefficiencies, and expose fraud...

It's important that I check in with you along the way.
| | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY ->](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq5rphdovdmdq4qjo02s11hb1ve7qkodv4q8rulg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62o34cjh2bs "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY →")
---

You were critical in getting all of us to where we are today.

We work for you. I want to make sure we're fighting for the things YOU care about, addressing YOUR concerns, and prioritizing what YOU want us to.

Please fill out **_[this survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z46j7o8mfrhn4jljnk362mre964alpfjiu8ipmd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62o34cjh2bs "this survey")_** so we're on the same page.

Sincerely,
Steve Scalise

| |

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsqn2rdj012fem63bf4ki779d42aill6alrjct28_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62o34cjh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Steve Scalise

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m thankful for PRESIDENT TRUMP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are you, friend?

Friend - on days like these, I like sitting back with a nice cup of coffee and thinking about all of the things I'm grateful for as an American.

_**[I'm thankful for living in the greatest country in the history of the earth.

And I'm thankful to President Donald Trump for Making America Great Again.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z85n690pm4n2ae5iubi4krkanjva5i3qpupb3bdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62p72c3h2bs)**_

No matter how much hatred or lies the Democrats want to spew, nothing will change the fact that America is now on the path to our golden age, all thanks to conservatives like YOU.

******************************************************[KEEP AMERICA STRONG](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zppjtqan7139p2vtnq9uk06t8m5f25vhqr92bpl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62p72c3h2bs)******************************************************

But our recent success is now under threat by the same radical liberals who destroyed our country under the Biden-Harris regime. The Democrats are deviously plotting their next moves to:

**[➔ Impeach and remove President Trump from office
➔ Pack the Supreme Court with activist judges](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zap54ql28vlno6cdh1e8pm17q9cvcnhp6e27reso_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62p72c3h2bs)**

This is a **[CODE RED](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zot50oce331uj1f275modhvm5jn2kaai73e2ljdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62p72c3h2bs) **situation, and I will need every patriot reading this email to step up if we are going to put an end to these schemes.

Republican leadership has tasked me with identifying _**[10,000 like-minded conservatives](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbf1lqio5ekkieo773fo48mvhalao6sks9gg5ee0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62p72c3h2bs)**_ who want to defend President Trump from the Democrats' attacks to ensure the MAGA agenda is fully realized during the next four years.

**[So please dig deep and rush whatever donation you can; just $5 could make all the difference between us and a repeat of the same failures our country underwent with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris at the White House.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zouicl8utuu4je2mr8m6sdv13qpi5l7ihfs96iuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62p72c3h2bs)**

God Bless,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp93le07fv8rbmut5p31j1dqgm0df5up1us32918_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j62p72c3h2bs)

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: Surrendering to God’s will.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Hi, it’s Monica again. The TV pundits – who hate pro-Trump Latinos like me – said I’d never win here.

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z41u2e7ov9dtkinl4b49a0ipf6362p6uvgphcoeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c3j6eor4cjh2bs)
---

I'm surrendering...

...to God's will.

But don't confuse that with giving up the fight. This is Monica De La Cruz - even when the odds are against me, I never throw in the towel.

_I kept fighting even though a Republican had never won in TX-15.

I kept fighting when the political pundits said a MAGA Latina would never win here.

And I'll keep fighting now despite the Democrat machine pledging - within DAYS of being sworn in - to drop up to 50 million bucks on my head._

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Gov. Healey & her allies have to go!
body:
A special election is just weeks away...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mOBZegzvqbRa7iTjcj1QvdqdSSXSUjSIJwIu3D5x3Gqyx4r-0UiYimfyUnfrvhQRy8ikiai3tZAO-VY8lhfwd2DPp6nYczJ8l0Nn9mI1xdc_7u6JM_rNKLmQPX2bIKvSOmdvFZe-yHNXj0mMw8p7A==&c=DS7GibLYNoVoTVwBl8_L9jlk3s_bigiAgFDhj7BzVBnouz5p1m6GyA==&ch=QJ8MPE05AjyRAvw7yrXQeF2JCP2D3xS8j1ArKc9Y_sMu35AnoceGMg==)
---
| Dear Peter,
While reading the morning news, I can only seem to think about one thing...
Governor Maura Healey and her allies in the State House have to go!
While I look forward to defeating her in 2026, the reality is that we need to do everything in our power to stop the Democratic Supermajority's dangerous policies right now.
That's why it is crucial to win the upcoming special elections for the Massachusetts House of Representatives. The first is just weeks away. MassGOP is ready to go! Are you?
Republicans have the plan, the candidates, the winning formula, and the determination. But it's you and your support that will make Republican wins this year & next a reality.
[Will you help by making an emergency donation to fund our voter outreach through the weekend?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mOBZegzvqbRa7iTjcj1QvdqdSSXSUjSIJwIu3D5x3Gqyx4r-0UiYqxIvApP_SIBPF1hSlL7Fa5Vga4Pj47KNn-yCojGlcD1d0iwiPgdlCkbYDrV7BeG1erVBB2e_O3qU-KMoXCLm7UQTAEXFkpGM2k76f1fe1tB4mmzYV0HQWcX_vRH4g2QeFj_LwbMxFhJ&c=DS7GibLYNoVoTVwBl8_L9jlk3s_bigiAgFDhj7BzVBnouz5p1m6GyA==&ch=QJ8MPE05AjyRAvw7yrXQeF2JCP2D3xS8j1ArKc9Y_sMu35AnoceGMg==)[ ](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mOBZegzvqbRa7iTjcj1QvdqdSSXSUjSIJwIu3D5x3Gqyx4r-0UiYqxIvApP_SIBPF1hSlL7Fa5Vga4Pj47KNn-yCojGlcD1d0iwiPgdlCkbYDrV7BeG1erVBB2e_O3qU-KMoXCLm7UQTAEXFkpGM2k76f1fe1tB4mmzYV0HQWcX_vRH4g2QeFj_LwbMxFhJ&c=DS7GibLYNoVoTVwBl8_L9jlk3s_bigiAgFDhj7BzVBnouz5p1m6GyA==&ch=QJ8MPE05AjyRAvw7yrXQeF2JCP2D3xS8j1ArKc9Y_sMu35AnoceGMg==)
We need YOU to help us pound the pavement and chip away at holding the Democratic Supermajority accountable for their staggering failures.
Time is short. Take the next 30 seconds to do your part to make Republican wins a reality.
---
| | [RUSH IN A DONATION - A SPECIAL ELECTION IS JUST WEEKS AWAY](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mOBZegzvqbRa7iTjcj1QvdqdSSXSUjSIJwIu3D5x3Gqyx4r-0UiYqxIvApP_SIBPF1hSlL7Fa5Vga4Pj47KNn-yCojGlcD1d0iwiPgdlCkbYDrV7BeG1erVBB2e_O3qU-KMoXCLm7UQTAEXFkpGM2k76f1fe1tB4mmzYV0HQWcX_vRH4g2QeFj_LwbMxFhJ&c=DS7GibLYNoVoTVwBl8_L9jlk3s_bigiAgFDhj7BzVBnouz5p1m6GyA==&ch=QJ8MPE05AjyRAvw7yrXQeF2JCP2D3xS8j1ArKc9Y_sMu35AnoceGMg==)
---
To Victory!
---
| |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP

P.S. - Since being elected your State Party Chair, Republican candidates have won every competitive special election. Like you, I want to keep building on this success. And with your help today, we will. Make an emergency donation now --> https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/specials

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 2.28.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-ciuirul-didthutlhu-yk/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciuirul-didthutlhu-r/) **February 28, 2025** Friend --This weekend will mark 30 days until the April 1st Spring General Election that will decide the future of our state. On the ballot, we have Judge Brad Schimel for Supreme Court, Brittany Kinser for DPI, Voter ID Constitutional Amendment, and numerous local candidates across the state, and they all need YOUR help to win! Tell your friends, families, and neighbors to request an absentee ballot, vote early, or vote on April 1st. To see where to vote, go to myvote.wi.gov. We CANNOT let far-left Democrats take over our state!Read our latest update below!-Team WisGOP**WisGOP News** In case you missed it, WisGOP had a successful Spring Primary Election on February 18th. Over 80% of WisGOP Farm Team candidates and Brittany Kinser for DPI are advancing to the April 1st Spring General Election.Heading into the February Primary Election, the WisGOP Farm Team trained over 200 candidates and activists to run and support campaigns, knocked on thousands of doors, and provided resources to local campaigns. These efforts didn't stop on February 18th; in fact, they have now ramped up as we head into the final 30 days.Not only has the Farm Team been on the ground to elect Republicans across the state, our Election Integrity team has been making moves and taking names to ensure election security in February and for April 1st. On February 18th, the Election Integrity team announced a record number of election observers for a February Election with over 1,500 shifts scheduled. Going into April, they plan to increase this number to ensure every vote cast is counted. Additionally, they are working to clean the voter rolls to ensure those ineligible to vote are not allowed to. Over the last few weeks, they sent emails to every county clerk detailing various voter roll irregularities they found and asking for those to be fixed or explained. In response, county clerks have been looking into the irregularities and correcting the issues. This is a huge step in the continued effort to secure our elections! **In Case You Missed It****[SHOT/CHASER: Susan Crawford can't be trusted to use sound judgment and protect Wisconsin communities.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciuirul-didthutlhu-y/)**
Susan Crawford cares more about a radical left agenda and coddling criminals than she does about being an impartial Justice for Wisconsin. Her insidious approach to Welton's sentencing was not a one-off; she has repeatedly sacrificed the safety of Wisconsin communities to accommodate her radical views. Unfortunately for Crawford and Democrats, Wisconsin voters know more about the product than she does.**[Complaint Filed over Crawford's Campaign Promise to Sell Van Orden & Steil Congressional Seats](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ciuirul-didthutlhu-h/)**

name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: An Oval Office Meeting for the record books
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wmdqm-vb43wc-kyd76rh2/)
---
# **An Oval Office Meeting for the record books**
---
|
---
| | | | Hello friend, What we witnessed yesterday in the Oval Office was a national disgrace of epic proportions—one that will not be easy for us as Americans to overcome anytime soon. President Trump invited President Zelensky, then invited the press to put on a show for one person. And that one person, sitting comfortably in Moscow, was laughing in amusement. This has Putin written all over it. European and NATO allies watched in horror and shame. We all saw the faces of those in the room—everyone was stunned. Even non-political spectators shared videos and clips because this was truly an unprecedented moment in American—and world—history. This is not how world leaders communicate. You don’t berate, antagonize, insult, or belittle other world leaders—especially not in front of the press. And it wasn’t just Trump. Vice President Vance chimed in, throwing insults, while the so-called “adult in the room,” Secretary of State Rubio, sat there silently, offering nothing. This incident was carefully scripted. Trump and his allies wanted to embarrass and weaken President Zelensky and Ukraine. Zelensky, for his part, likely wasn’t prepared for the ambush—he was probably just as shocked as the rest of us. His request was simple and reasonable: he wants peace and security guarantees. Meanwhile, Trump acts as if simply saying something will make it true. We’re still waiting for the cost of eggs to come down—and yet, they continue to rise. Shocking, right? But beyond the theatrics, what does this mean for global stability? Where do we go from here? Europe isn’t going to sit back and watch as Trump and Putin redraw borders—just as they’re doing with Netanyahu and Israel. At some point, members of Congress must stand up and remind this country that we have three equal branches of government for a reason. But let’s be real: that won’t happen anytime soon. So, the responsibility falls on us—the American people. We did not vote for this. Broad bipartisan support among the American people and Congress favors standing with Ukraine over Russia. We want peace. We want this war to end. But we want Putin to stand down. Russia is the aggressor—Russian and North Korean troops are in Ukraine, not the other way around. It may feel like we are helpless as this travesty unfolds, and individually, we don’t have much say. But together, we have a very big microphone at our disposal. That is what we must rely on. We must continue to speak truth to power. What is Trump getting from all of this behind the scenes? He made a deal with Putin, and we deserve to know what that deal entails. We can’t count on Republicans in Congress to do right by the American people, so we must do it ourselves. Last we checked, the United States—not Russia—is the world’s superpower. Now, to be clear: this is not to say we don’t want this war to end. We do. Desperately. We at _No Dem Left Behind_ were not happy with the Biden administration’s decision to introduce new weaponry into this war in the final days of the last administration. We are not political zombies who follow “red or blue, no matter who” slogans. However, like you, we believe in law, order, and international codes of conduct. At this point, Ukraine’s NATO membership seems to be a non-starter. That’s unfortunate, but it’s likely a condition Ukraine is willing to accept—for now. What they cannot and will not accept is Trump’s (or rather, Putin’s) proposal to carve up Ukraine and hand over its resources to Russia. That has always been Putin’s goal—and that is exactly what Trump appears to be working toward. President Zelensky said no—loudly and publicly—in the Oval Office. And from there, the meeting spiraled out of control. We have plenty of domestic challenges to tackle, and now this, too. But we _can_ and _will_ find a way to help Ukraine—because doing so is in our national interest. A more powerful Soviet Union 2.0 is not what we want. And when I say _we_ , I mean _all_ Americans. We need to unify on this issue. And I believe we will. If you disagree with anything I’ve said here, I want to hear from you. Dialogue is how we grow. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini
---

subject: Trump Boots Zelensky, English Official U.S. Language, and a Daring Rescue
body:
A highly [anticipated White House meeting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGngc5oPBgHChe3octtt0TGTMJsjI1sJ4h9-lW22mbrTzo6-j-u09Wy53D_bzcy5RYnBOwEtALktFj256TqxdyIkNqajLwo6FH3napXYy961rJH0KDJtaoHJJqlGrph0DBAzea9Bi1ICd3Q6qbv-tYtdkaN80KAlQJauMTUfEYOZaWbP-OLUuPiVnuzlrLnqv1X4VjheBxHE2YX6Mhvr3Dco-fCLr9x5UJijc9MFY5f5Cnkx3mKkp7bLn6pSM-c2YqdrCNRrH9kkWwiQTaVVWwcKFmfRXLBykFJ2dfJLPvB3nPWl0rBfbPsfx6Wv4q9DH4HAAD__94vb6Q) on a Ukraine rare earth minerals deal turned confrontational Friday, with President Trump and Vice President Vance clashing with President Zelensky, leaving the deal unsigned.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbKDjbIwZPFSKsqVrR-TYR7jKxgicVPn7irTq1vXe093pfVzGi-PIy-3dJbJlyiMCdjXIGtoxOI7PUVXBTkRIsiLb9goMatOparbYg3OTd2YaFGrwXegn3_fQdmbwanAV22MbSGhb6AapG9MZ6YO7osZrIEChgAKXvDWfmZcy0xSf-UFb43Oqop1LWXch3wSeBZ55edBempQDpXzlSId1IHm-lzTu-b55EvJEyXEUqI9hosD3JORpdRzq1W1loW2fef3l3qXV8W15GX-wNVDLTo4_GVoNclBaotHVZsP6xTHyrnuh4Hacej1b_ov3sPgdAAD__421cJA) | |
# Saturday, March 1, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1872, President Ulysses S. Grant signed legislation establishing [Yellowstone National Park](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQANCvsbeg485gM3jowpauHZHB53CVwRFYifj7qt37A096X_fpHiTL_vgMG_uayoSA3Q3oBu0Ug-RrMjr6xIxMmn1rDTjsXWf06nHmZRkSWegomIEgUh9dshHmlq1DLf5XA4K2hW6gvnGdoyWGGXucIwMqAxyllqP5LrLXlVO-youPZimbzn6t9Xkq-lA4Khwvzrm8z1p2bnauCsdVzlqOS-GoDx-fb8lZzt4qA48tSP5T6n-rl8efAAAA__9MjE6i), making it the world's first federally protected national park. A dramatic scene in New York City resembled an action movie on Friday as window washers hung from broken scaffolding 78 stories high. Learn how first responders rescued them [in the story below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8GbzfCF_yTgaGLt3TtaGG42LQYIiCx_PaVu3f7pCMdfTpfj_mhffBx_dQ7qerSjBw74AJ4O1vtwznLxipHhCQaUu0g-Yj92MlmU8YJ2UqHne0GbBdhZM8FN6iXhe5ikI1Xl40L3ra8u4v-NnajMFYv2ONiiSOTnKyvKd--k491IxfO9KZ8M2lvgtpqfRYmPhhODKd4PlOpF2I4XWKGE8drjwynV4FIR2E4HT7adMChy0a5gNVxDQQupx2WnH4oQjHauRSsjyvoCvE0sPl1g-wLwUIuZQKr84UzFfMihlOTlX0ePgRf-oFJvu7ah7-f9b9ub4W_AQAA__9mnG-5). We're sponsored today by [Mode Mobile](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbKDjbIwZPFSKsqVrR-TYR7jKxgicVPn7irTq1vXe093pfVzGi-PIy-3dJbJlyiMCdjXIGtoxOI7PUVXBTkRIsiLb9goMatOparbYg3OTd2YaFGrwXegn3_fQdmbwanAV22MbSGhb6AapG9MZ6YO7osZrIEChgAKXvDWfmZcy0xSf-UFb43Oqop1LWXch3wSeBZ55edBempQDpXzlSId1IHm-lzTu-b55EvJEyXEUqI9hosD3JORpdRzq1W1loW2fef3l3qXV8W15GX-wNVDLTo4_GVoNclBaotHVZsP6xTHyrnuh4Hacej1b_ov3sPgdAAD__421cJA); be sure to check them out in today's edition.
|
---
## Trump Spars With Zelensky
A highly [anticipated White House meeting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGngc5oPBgHChe3octtt0TGTMJsjI1sJ4h9-lW22mbrTzo6-j-u09Wy53D_bzcy5RYnBOwEtALktFj256TqxdyIkNqajLwo6FH3napXYy961rJH0KDJtaoHJJqlGrph0DBAzea9Bi1ICd3Q6qbv-tYtdkaN80KAlQJauMTUfEYOZaWbP-OLUuPiVnuzlrLnqv1X4VjheBxHE2YX6Mhvr3Dco-fCLr9x5UJijc9MFY5f5Cnkx3mKkp7bLn6pSM-c2YqdrCNRrH9kkWwiQTaVVWwcKFmfRXLBykFJ2dfJLPvB3nPWl0rBfbPsfx6Wv4q9DH4HAAD__94vb6Q) on a Ukraine rare earth minerals deal turned confrontational Friday when President Trump and Vice President Vance clashed with President Zelensky, leaving the deal unsigned. The meeting [exposed rifts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8GNiy4_MQZGLp4S9eO1k24iWkwtoDEcp--cvdun_RJ50jn6zJeMKaYH584k2_3ZQQJVkgtpBoDxrSPhgd_JwLSnLw6GdmD663hk6czmRNZhQBOawrKaqvPJNHaYNE5Hv1Bk1oqJe1Zu663vb4FvIKDayAJzEgKsS2l-15ibhPd0768qXS3ZebJT62tlekPBgODYdu27natmbZ6_AyGYzIYXs-CMZMoWEgQljaJOWYqmKpo5TWv4ocS5frcdwYDLz6sW0wpVndiRj5mjOlP2P4L8PbwGwAA__8GP15T) between the two nations, with Zelensky arguing that the U.S. was emotionally removed from the war due to geographical distance. At the same time, Vance accused him of ingratitude and disrespecting U.S. efforts to prevent Ukraine's destruction. Sources indicated that [tensions escalated before](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFzhCAUhH-Ndjj4UNSCIs11lzalA_I4SZ7iAHfE_PqM6dNssd_M7sz3cZ_v2pPfH-96Q5VdmIFDz7hgvJ2t9nTOXW2VQwQUNap26PgIcuy7elV6wrEH44wxEp1bpsWBbYXEYWjN1He1V9caF7xteT8J2Yz9KBarDUgwFjlUHUfrc4jNZ_B7XtHRGV4YmyVsNak15yNV4q2CWwW3UkrjwveOJV38akIkW8FtxYiJRdR0RQo7y_G5HewHCff0dZ6J2QsawsKeBwsvTSw45xeso7JH8UQ-yaHq-GPTnv7u8386Xgp-AwAA__-1iGUI) the meeting. Zelensky sought assurances of protection against a further Russian invasion and was unwilling to sign the mineral deal without such guarantees. This refusal frustrated both Trump and Vance. Following the meeting, [Trump told Zelensky](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFzhCAUhH8NdjjPByoWFGnoLm1KB-V5kkO5Ae4c8-szpk-3xTe7O9_XbbxZH_x-_7Qb6bLEEQFbDoJDMzrrwznKyumFCElUpJtegsJOtbJatRzk0LcWCS0J7B115Bac3KBo6CZFlddXGwhoGmgH0dWqVWJ2dsIOJ0eATAI5X2Kqv6Pfy0pLOOObUj3HrQp6LeWZmfhgaBia4zjqV7YlOnteAEOTS0wnQ7PTkS8ipuAYmmuVoQG8smJoSnptT_5Dgfb8OE8-B5tXHt828Lgsfib-eiTrd2JoFCipEAGgZ2iqpN3z8CH43PVMwn2zPvzdK__pemv8DQAA___JomqU) to leave the White House, releasing a statement saying, "_He disrespected the United States of America in its cherished Oval Office. He can come back when he is ready for Peace_."
## Iowa First to Remove Transgender Protections
Iowa became the first state to [remove gender identity protections](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFurDAQheGnMZ2RGRsMhYvb0O1tUyJjDzCJF6_MCLRvH5HUqX_p09H5eEwPT4n29b9_ouMlT6CglUpL1UzRU3pPpopuQQTUFbrGGtVD17em2pzCxls1z6iDBwWNGVo7wGLBRhvQQkXu1pRWTaPaQXd13_Y6RD9DB3NEBcIojMS51J-Zdt5wSe98YqlDflbJbcyvQ-h_AkYB43Vd9VcIdEcBoy9MIaGAkfLl5Yp7xCIp4s7Eb_kqmTEw5f2QgU5KstC68SF94N948CHPzLfQ6aHtjemq4uLropTo6Kwwan16Sj9j-K9zTgffAQAA__8eKGe2) from its civil rights code on Friday, legally defining a person by their reproductive organs at birth and rejecting the idea that a person can transition to another gender. Over 1,000 protestors [occupied the capital](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD9vpDAUxD-N6Yz8B1i2cLGnE1ftFYmUlMjYD3iJsZHtYG0-fcT2qd6TZjSa-b3fx7tGh375rzdQeQ6jYKKlTFLGR6vRPcamsmoGECArUPzSsF50fdtUq7oy6OdZcN3Ok265FNrOjJm2M9Z0F95XqM40JhnnrL3Kru7bXhqrJ9GJyQITpGFgMYdYfwT0eYXZPcIBsTZhq5xac94TkTciBiKGUkq9JX9qRAzg6VciYvBQzvP8MRRNnS6b_oSY6K5TohM6RyNs4UC_0By1T9TggY5GXNac6B5DBpMx-EQTeHvaMNMc6HJW8SESMehIbzf-_WZf_hE5BIOWyL9_Tm5Q0ivEvYrK7gWdw9RdSMOWTaN7zsi_YT2U-AkAAP__LB19ZA) when legislators voted 60-36 to pass the bill, claiming that it will expose transgender people and other Iowans to discrimination. Gov. Kim [Reynolds disagreed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdKBljTkoXKShu7Qpkc9eYBNjn2zrrPv7iPTpRprRPOl93de7Yc9h_zQn6bLFFQFVC7KFfnWG_XsdGqc3IiTZkO5vA0w4TmpoDq3IynmiflDWopwtwDySBQRybpMSG9bXG0joe1CzHLtJTdI688ARH44AxQDkuMTUfUcO5aDNv-OLUmfj2Xh9lPLMQn4IXAQutdbOPnKgmq9e4HJFgUtJJuSdgqPUJt6PkttnioVs4Rhyy7Ga1pt6mh9K175J2j0re895vIkB9tOw_0OW_xS8NP4GAAD__zFuX68), stating that removing transgender identity protections from the state’s civil rights code aligns Iowa with federal civil rights regulations that recognize only two sexes. GOP lawmakers also argued that [the bill was necessary](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQheGnwR3RMGBCCorbuMttt7SwmdizwiaLZxPl7VfZfusjfUf6P67jNXHhffmfNopyqyMC9hqsBjPmxOU1ui7HGxGS7Sias4OAPvSuW-MlWJiCn9EZZw3Y2XhvggeXwDnX247jWwMLxkB_sf4U-mDnnCb0OGUCVA4os9R2-qy8y0q38qoPaqe5bl2Jq8j9UPafwkHhICutXMp7UzisdaOdnofCoSyTfCkceuMDOK-5PpMutPBRknw30o22-qBDL7Rnapoz7cLy0vdWhWahrOeSjjfVtZjvTy6FD39WDpYt8e9jJ3_VeUT8CQAA___XUGaO) to prevent gender identity from taking precedence over women’s rights and creating a protected class based on personal feelings.
## List: Most Shocking Weather Event in Each State
A list of the most [shocking weather events](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQRb_GdEZmDKwpXDzpiW7TpkSGGcCJsZEZwfL30aZPd4uro6Pz-Ryezgcflw-3keU5DaCgkUpLVQ3ofLiHukA7EwHpgmz1qJWB1jR1sdpuotForWp8zDiiAaeoa9xIY1NrmFXh7ZumtKoq1XS6LU1j9IRuhBZGJAWiVoSeUy6_ko-80hzudFIup7QVwa7M-yH0PwG9gP66rjKkk-i1h5R9XN4vAf3iQqB804spIqGA3rRd1QnoeSW5pYPlsabp28dFXuR4pSzppMjSx_fItzzYMUkXUeIkdL-7hYT-XxXZ4n75EPzRPkStls358OvGf7U6LfwEAAD__y-7bYE) in each state highlights the wide range of extreme weather in the U.S., from hurricanes, tornadoes, and floods to wildfires and snow storms. Hurricanes frequently appear on the list, affecting states from the Gulf of America to the Northeast. One of the most powerful storms was the [Great New England Hurricane of 1938](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngc0RXDDBA0MXb-na0cLmYt8KQ4RpIr995e7dP52j_-sxPTwlyuun39G1WCYQ0HdCdUJOwVM6J82Di4iAiqOTdy0sGNtrvjlt4jBYGWKAKOPdeJAWvB_AzGY2ZubkrjWhhJSiH5S52d6qJfgZDMwBBTAtMFAr9fZdKLcNYzrLC-ttKTtPbmvteTD1wWBkMGZ8Y16Tz2Gjo5VKi09HWQjbeXkG41rRt04OynbbT71ARgYjry4835QSHebOtFh3T-nvov2X_HLwGwAA__8x3Fkl), which struck several states with winds exceeding 100 mph and waves reaching over 30 feet. Flooding also affected several states, including Oregon, North Dakota, and Nevada. Ohio experienced a particularly devastating event, [the Great Flood of March 1913](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71ugzAUQOGnsbcgc_3L4KELW7p2RAZf8K1MHBmLirevkj3bmT7p_Nyne6BMj-077OjbWiYQoG9C3kQ_xUD5mhSPfkUElBx9b5VwYJxWPHlptEUh-xlWrbWz8zCYYJQFVMaZRXHyL01I0fdCD9J0Tju5xDCDgTmiAKYERmqldr-FHi3hmq9yYu2WsvPsU2vPg8kvBiODsSQqO-6lXt0rEx3t3XVjMIa6JDrxYDBqZyyvPj7_KGc6jGVKbHug_Fbbp8vTw38AAAD__-MjU1Y), which submerged Dayton under 20 feet of water. Snow has significantly impacted several regions too. Destructive blizzards affected New Mexico in 1967, New York in 1888, and Wyoming in 1949. Notably, the severe "Snowmageddon" in the District of Columbia in 2010 prompted the U.S. Post Office to suspend operations. [See all the weather disasters here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQRb_GdEZmDKwpXDzpiW7TpkSGGcCJsZEZwfL30aZPd4uro6Pz-Ryezgcflw-3keU5DaCgkUpLVQ3ofLiHukA7EwHpgmz1qJWB1jR1sdpuotForWp8zDiiAaeoa9xIY1NrmFXh7ZumtKoq1XS6LU1j9IRuhBZGJAWiVoSeUy6_ko-80hzudFIup7QVwa7M-yH0PwG9gP66rjKkk-i1h5R9XN4vAf3iQqB804spIqGA3rRd1QnoeSW5pYPlsabp28dFXuR4pSzppMjSx_fItzzYMUkXUeIkdL-7hYT-XxXZ4n75EPzRPkStls358OvGf7U6LfwEAAD__y-7bYE).

clean_body: A highly on a Ukraine rare earth minerals deal turned confrontational Friday, with President Trump and Vice President Vance clashing with President Zelensky, leaving the deal unsigned. | | | | | | Saturday, March 1, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1872, President Ulysses S. Grant signed legislation establishing , making it the world's first federally protected national park. A dramatic scene in New York City resembled an action movie on Friday as window washers hung from broken scaffolding 78 stories high. Learn how first responders rescued them . We're sponsored today by ; be sure to check them out in today's edition. | Trump Spars With Zelensky A highly on a Ukraine rare earth minerals deal turned confrontational Friday when President Trump and Vice President Vance clashed with President Zelensky, leaving the deal unsigned. The meeting between the two nations, with Zelensky arguing that the U.S. was emotionally removed from the war due to geographical distance. At the same time, Vance accused him of ingratitude and disrespecting U.S. efforts to prevent Ukraine's destruction. Sources indicated that the meeting. Zelensky sought assurances of protection against a further Russian invasion and was unwilling to sign the mineral deal without such guarantees. This refusal frustrated both Trump and Vance. Following the meeting, to leave the White House, releasing a statement saying, "He disrespected the United States of America in its cherished Oval Office. He can come back when he is ready for Peace." Iowa First to Remove Transgender Protections Iowa became the first state to from its civil rights code on Friday, legally defining a person by their reproductive organs at birth and rejecting the idea that a person can transition to another gender. Over 1,000 protestors when legislators voted 60-36 to pass the bill, claiming that it will expose transgender people and other Iowans to discrimination. Gov. Kim , stating that removing transgender identity protections from the state’s civil rights code aligns Iowa with federal civil rights regulations that recognize only two sexes. GOP lawmakers also argued that to prevent gender identity from taking precedence over women’s rights and creating a protected class based on personal feelings. List: Most Shocking Weather Event in Each State A list of the most in each state highlights the wide range of extreme weather in the U.S., from hurricanes, tornadoes, and floods to wildfires and snow storms. Hurricanes frequently appear on the list, affecting states from the Gulf of America to the Northeast. One of the most powerful storms was the , which struck several states with winds exceeding 100 mph and waves reaching over 30 feet. Flooding also affected several states, including Oregon, North Dakota, and Nevada. Ohio experienced a particularly devastating event, , which submerged Dayton under 20 feet of water. Snow has significantly impacted several regions too. Destructive blizzards affected New Mexico in 1967, New York in 1888, and Wyoming in 1949. In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/RbskIF19XKWCQShgVD3SJlNiKNxnclQ_MH-Cpdtq85UaXCbA5GWeGVqBkiSbjT9A7AO9o5DhcXBySvUfsIKCiRXit6RPOEKMVjvA2o-QtUYJfIa-veAmaLi7x27WKzPsa2u0EA5b3SSnN0dI6cBwVgMm-Md6noywha6FzoSNkAcZMeOWo-x7jFHdiJdxmTmUemYyBo2HIeaNh-frifJiOBZ4NvbN8rciGvxa-y10OsnTf0FODMQTH4dJG26vNqL1YHtMgeNf8xZqBbx5T7oCJ-yckUoD3ryAFLzMegcszYTCDPntzxA_n6rhipXbLm_69smqHLJZ-rAp6etm8Cym8TW7_yT0JIZAtH-8SPo_KHPWQTTzj7M7MAM9Dj3YgUA9HpBKV5xQ3SX8WyeM-oKy-ikTFtR_mbzOtg264mFFWucgP-IZjHTV/hnk0XsVsR396KT832FNk0ChBWo-9X1Wa/6)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/7LwjDaPCYc5s_JKRUYqBE7IGMd9cY7sc3XGbXNn4lNS-YKDMbr66JlGgtBKI_K1alUFEHQ0OrGOX3IJ0zDqOPu6H6yMAHe7sW6wQdB1h2eWnnBl26jcjtt1q3eRa4TNxfQL8ZJkRZeVDU7FUPbiVg85QgM8ElWI39y60dDOTovBxczj8KlfMFIAuFHWdy2DThFGZuKql6WV5pdnkhk6_ZZ7Q1-APISG4fruMNiq43V8d80WU7EPTO3AKETS2NjNDF4OR5heCSNa-cULNm_n4eI-9tLPxGqyrjvDhp2ZLZ93yVJ0Pmu0d8LE_geTDiZJEWp7uXXhuj3fJ6mSWLK_ZRnoITnjXCsHsgnSL1LvJLzZWOwGdTCKthip7zRybCI8zS7U13i1Cogb3L8XRszRkTmG7RCPWq8ysgIaeLiOVsYOKd0py_3sp/fiB2oBoDn8IkopTYijghWg0xOMx0eCxP/6)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbba810b-be79-4988-8918-0a17f0e9b22b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, we can’t stress enough how important the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency is to our election security. CISA helps state and local election officials deal with threats that they’d never be able to handle on their own, like hackers. But now this key agency is being threatened by the Trump administration. Even though CISA was created from a law that Trump HIMSELF signed in 2018, the GOP’s massive election misinformation campaign has put this CISA in danger – especially since it called out MAGA lies that the 2020 election was “rigged”. Peter, we need to show our “leaders” that CISA can’t be taken away without a fight. We need to defend this important agency so that our elections remain safe from foreign influence and cyber threats. [If you agree, will you sign our petition to save CISA today? We need 150 people in Newington to step up and show that people across America are committed to preserving the integrity and safety of our elections.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59407f96-3259-4c28-97e4-568bd318f93b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80e9d4e1-843c-4038-9bde-87d739718c62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
