name: Alan Cohn
subject: Supreme Court Targets Marriage Equality
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103027667/530988351/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4NWNlMGQtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3mZynVFuLDddG3eUqphXHzq__RSz6OAEpx-ZGinSsSg=&emci=de650993-4af6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=7a85ce0d-b2f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
We told you Trump’s radical right-wing MAGA majority on the Supreme Court wouldn’t stop their assault on our freedoms after robbing women of their right to make their own healthcare decisions.

Now, they’re teeing marriage equality.

Five states, Michigan, Idaho, Montana, North Dakota, and South Dakota, are introducing measures asking SCOTUS to overturn its landmark ruling, which made same-sex marriage legal.

Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito are already on the record supporting doing just that, even though polls show over 70% of Americans support marriage equality.

Thomas and Alito don’t have to worry about what Americans think because they have lifetime appointments with no consequences.

We’re about to change that with your help.

This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress, including Adam Schiff and Sheldon Whitehouse, to enact 18-year term limits.

We’re raising what’s needed to back candidates in the mid-terms who pledge to support the TERM Act.
We need majorities in the House and Senate. We’re mounting a public pressure campaign to push it through. And we need your help to get it done.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103027668/530988355/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4NWNlMGQtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3mZynVFuLDddG3eUqphXHzq__RSz6OAEpx-ZGinSsSg=)

**[>>>Yes, there is something you can do to stop this assault on our rights and freedoms. But we need to act now. And if we work together, we will.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103027669/530988356/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4NWNlMGQtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3mZynVFuLDddG3eUqphXHzq__RSz6OAEpx-ZGinSsSg=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103027670/530988357/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4NWNlMGQtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3mZynVFuLDddG3eUqphXHzq__RSz6OAEpx-ZGinSsSg=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103027671/530988358/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E4NWNlMGQtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3mZynVFuLDddG3eUqphXHzq__RSz6OAEpx-ZGinSsSg=)

clean_body: Hi Friend, We told you Trump’s radical right-wing MAGA majority on the Supreme Court wouldn’t stop their assault on our freedoms after robbing women of their right to make their own healthcare decisions. Now, they’re teeing marriage equality. Five states, Michigan, Idaho, Montana, North Dakota, and South Dakota, are introducing measures asking SCOTUS to overturn its landmark ruling, which made same-sex marriage legal. Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito are already on the record supporting doing just that, even though polls show over 70% of Americans support marriage equality. Thomas and Alito don’t have to worry about what Americans think because they have lifetime appointments with no consequences. We’re about to change that with your help. This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress, including Adam Schiff and Sheldon Whitehouse, to enact 18-year term limits. We’re raising what’s needed to back candidates in the mid-terms who pledge to support the TERM Act. We need majorities in the House and Senate. We’re mounting a public pressure campaign to push it through. And we need your help to get it done. = = Alan Cohn Term Limit the Court The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court. Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court. =** = SPONSORED BY TERM LIMITS YES, INC. 7903 HAMPTON LAKE DR. FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC

COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS

Now through April 15, 2025

Tuesdays at 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET

What does freedom mean to you—and how can we ensure it thrives for future generations?

Just in time for the launch of our BRAND-NEW High School Credit-Earning Curriculum, Moms for America is thrilled to present
Cottage Meetings for Teens, hosted by Cassiopeia Fletcher, Executive Director of Membership & Education.

Building on Kimberly Fletcher’s foundational Cottage Meetings program, this interdisciplinary course weaves together American
history, classic literature, and the power of personal story to help teens explore the timeless themes of freedom and liberty.
Together, they’ll uncover the principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious freedom—core values
enshrined in the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution.

But freedom isn’t just a lofty ideal—it begins at home. By nurturing strong values and leadership within the family, we empower
teens to create freer communities, stronger states, and ultimately a thriving nation. This course is a powerful step toward
raising the next generation of leaders who understand, value, and protect the legacy of liberty.

Will your family take the first step in safeguarding freedom for the future?

Don’t miss this opportunity—sign up today to join the journey!

Missed the first few lessons? That's okay, register anyway and catch-up with the on-demand replays!

THE HEALING OF AMERICA

Now through May 27, 2025

Tuesdays at 5pmPT/ 6pmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET

In the wake of the monumental 2024 election of Donald J. Trump, there’s no better time to embrace the principles of liberty and
take action to safeguard the future of our nation. Join Al & Juleen Jackson for Healing of America, a transformative 16-week
webinar series that explores the foundation of our republic, the structure of the Constitution, and the forces threatening our
freedoms. Discover practical strategies to overcome these challenges and heal America from the grassroots to the highest levels.

Through this series, you’ll gain a deeper understanding of the Constitution’s original intent, the ideals that make America
exceptional, and the steps needed to restore unity and strength across the nation. Whether you’re a seasoned patriot or new to
civic engagement, this is your opportunity to join a nationwide movement to preserve liberty for generations to come.

Don’t wait—reserve your spot today and be part of the solution. Together, we can protect and preserve our freedoms and rebuild
America’s greatness from the ground up.

Think, Discuss, Grow: Prager U Meets Cottage Meetings for Teens (Part 1 – Lessons 1–6)

MARCH 10, 2025

1pmPT/ 2pmMT/ 3pmCT/ 4pmET

Ready to elevate your teen discussions to the next level? Join us for Part 1 of this dynamic webinar series, where Jill Simonian
from Prager U will introduce PragerU Kids and show you exactly how to integrate their professional, engaging videos into our
brand-new Cottage Meetings for Teens curriculum—as if it wasn’t robust enough already!

PragerU Kids offers families and educators free edutainment with shows, videos, resources, and books that honor and celebrate
American values and history, designed for students from Kindergarten through 12th grade.

Jill Simonian, known for her vibrant presence and expertise, frequently appears on major media outlets like Newsmax, Fox News,
OAN, and more, passionately discussing the future of education.

True Freedom vs. Faux Freedom: Sparking the Mindset of a Scholar

Monday, March 17, 2025

9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET

In a world where the lines between true and faux freedom are increasingly blurred, how can we prepare the next generation to
recognize the difference—and thrive in the process? The answer: The Jefferson Scholar Program!

This transformative program teaches essential academic and life skills that form the bedrock of authentic freedom, including:
🖋️ Mastering note-taking & research
🗂️ Organizing & presenting information with confidence
⏰ Managing time like a pro

But here’s the best part: As a parent, you can teach others these skills and get paid for it! 💵

Join us for the next Homeschool Mom2Mom as Liz Ackerman and program founder Lisa Mauer dive into how these tools not only equip
students for success—but also cultivate the discernment needed to stand strong in genuine freedom.

📅 Mark your calendar! Don’t miss this inspiring conversation about shaping the next generation of principled, capable leaders.

Removing Disruptive and Violent Students from Your School

Tuesday, March 18, 2025

4pmPT/ 5pmMT/ 6pmCT/ 7pmET

Can students with an IEP be removed from your school?

What our school boards are being told may not be reality. Violent, disruptive students are routinely placed right back into the
classrooms. Our teachers are totally ignored, and the students often live in fear of certain students who are attending classes
who have been identified as violent or disruptive to learning. Why is this happening and what can be done about it? Our guest,
Alyssa Wright will help us understand why this is being done and what can be done to remove these students. An educated school
board is the answer.

clean_body: 🇺🇸 Join us this March for empowering webinars that celebrate faith, family, and freedom—let's stand strong together! ❤️💙 If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] Don't miss ANY of our inspirational and equipping webinars or in-person events! [] [] FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS Now through April 15, 2025 Tuesdays at 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET What does freedom mean to you—and how can we ensure it thrives for future generations? Just in time for the launch of our BRAND-NEW High School Credit-Earning Curriculum, Moms for America is thrilled to present Cottage Meetings for Teens, hosted by Cassiopeia Fletcher, Executive Director of Membership & Education. Building on Kimberly Fletcher’s foundational Cottage Meetings program, this interdisciplinary course weaves together American history, classic literature, and the power of personal story to help teens explore the timeless themes of freedom and liberty. Together, they’ll uncover the principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious freedom—core values enshrined in the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution. But freedom isn’t just a lofty ideal—it begins at home. By nurturing strong values and leadership within the family, we empower teens to create freer communities, stronger states, and ultimately a thriving nation. This course is a powerful step toward raising the next generation of leaders who understand, value, and protect the legacy of liberty. Will your family take the first step in safeguarding freedom for the future? Don’t miss this opportunity—sign up today to join the journey! Missed the first few lessons? That's okay, register anyway and catch-up with the on-demand replays! Register - COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS [] [] [] THE HEALING OF AMERICA Now through May 27, 2025 Tuesdays at 5pmPT/ 6pmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET In the wake of the monumental 2024 election of Donald J. Trump, there’s no better time to embrace the principles of liberty and take action to safeguard the future of our nation. Join Al & Juleen Jackson for Healing of America, a transformative 16-week webinar series that explores the foundation of our republic, the structure of the Constitution, and the forces threatening our freedoms. Discover practical strategies to overcome these challenges and heal America from the grassroots to the highest levels. Through this series, you’ll gain a deeper understanding of the Constitution’s original intent, the ideals that make America exceptional, and the steps needed to restore unity and strength across the nation. Whether you’re a seasoned patriot or new to civic engagement, this is your opportunity to join a nationwide movement to preserve liberty for generations to come. Don’t wait—reserve your spot today and be part of the solution. Together, we can protect and preserve our freedoms and rebuild America’s greatness from the ground up. Register - HEALING OF AMERICA [] [] [] Think, Discuss, Grow: Prager U Meets Cottage Meetings for Teens (Part 1 – Lessons 1–6) MARCH 10, 2025 1pmPT/ 2pmMT/ 3pmCT/ 4pmET Ready to elevate your teen discussions to the next level? Join us for Part 1 of this dynamic webinar series, where Jill Simonian from Prager U will introduce PragerU Kids and show you exactly how to integrate their professional, engaging videos into our brand-new Cottage Meetings for Teens curriculum—as if it wasn’t robust enough already! PragerU Kids offers families and educators free edutainment with shows, videos, resources, and books that honor and celebrate American values and history, designed for students from Kindergarten through 12th grade. Jill Simonian, known for her vibrant presence and expertise, frequently appears on major media outlets like Newsmax, Fox News, OAN, and more, passionately discussing the future of education. Don’t miss this opportunity to think critically, spark meaningful discussions, and help teens grow into informed, confident leaders. Register - THINK, DISCUSS, GROW [] [] [] True Freedom vs. Faux Freedom: Sparking the Mindset of a Scholar Monday, March 17, 2025 9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET In a world where the lines between true and faux freedom are increasingly blurred, how can we prepare the next generation to recognize the difference—and thrive in the process? The answer: The Jefferson Scholar Program! This transformative program teaches essential academic and life skills that form the bedrock of authentic freedom, including: 🖋️ Mastering note-taking & research 🗂️ Organizing & presenting information with confidence ⏰ Managing time like a pro But here’s the best part: As a parent, you can teach others these skills and get paid for it! 💵 Join us for the next Homeschool Mom2Mom as Liz Ackerman and program founder Lisa Mauer dive into how these tools not only equip students for success—but also cultivate the discernment needed to stand strong in genuine freedom. 📅 Mark your calendar! Don’t miss this inspiring conversation about shaping the next generation of principled, capable leaders. 💙✨ Register - TRUE FREEDOM V FAUX FREEDOM [] [] [] Removing Disruptive and Violent Students from Your School Tuesday, March 18, 2025 4pmPT/ 5pmMT/ 6pmCT/ 7pmET Can students with an IEP be removed from your school? What our school boards are being told may not be reality. Violent, disruptive students are routinely placed right back into the classrooms. Our teachers are totally ignored, and the students often live in fear of certain students who are attending classes who have been identified as violent or disruptive to learning. Why is this happening and what can be done about it? Our guest, Alyssa Wright will help us understand why this is being done and what can be done to remove these students. An educated school board is the answer. Register - REMOVING DISRUPTIVE STUDENTS [] BOOKMARK THIS PAGE! 👇👇👇👇👇 [] [] LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! name: Blake Gendebien
subject: a quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’m running to replace Elise Stefanik and chip away at Mike Johnson’s razor-thin majority in the upcoming special election, but I can’t do it alone.
Hi Peter, it’s dairy farmer and Democrat Blake Gendebien. Heartland Patriots said I could reach out with a quick question:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86464?refcode=em20250301-8794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8794%2E614464%2ETaH0ke)

body:

Before midnight: I need 192 gifts to mobilize our Democrats and make Jamie proud. Will you rush $14 to answer Jamie’s call? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Jamie fought tirelessly with me on the Oversight Committee to PROTECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] our Democracy and hold Donald Trump accountable.

BUT THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Mike Johnson spent $141 MILLION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] to buy back the House Majority and put Donald Trump back in the White House.

AND NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Jamie just called on all of us to step up and fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.

name: Tara McGowan || COURIER
subject: We will never bow to a corrupt ruling party intent on stripping Americans of their rights
body:
Your overwhelming support for fearless, fact-based journalism couldn’t come at a more critical moment.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103028031/530989032/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwMTRjYzgtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gXBB_lhV1I6aBUyz2CUpjIm59BycHAoOBG5N74xYO6s=&emci=34014cc8-b2f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=38014cc8-b2f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
First, **thank you.**
Because of your support, COURIER had its best grassroots fundraising month ever—with **5,000 online contributions in February alone.** That’s 5,000 grassroots supporters who believe in independent journalism’s power to hold the line when corporate media won’t.
I want to share a long but important note about why our work (and your support!) has never been more urgent.
Like many of you, I’ve watched the first month of the Trump administration unfold with a mix of anger and shock—not at what they’re doing (they warned us), but at how quickly they’re dismantling democracy and how unprepared too many Democratic leaders seem to be.
Far-right extremists and billionaire oligarchs like Elon Musk have seized total control of the federal government, gutting institutions and consolidating power. Violent insurrectionists were pardoned. Our closest allies are being pushed aside and replaced with brutal dictators.
America is in crisis—the exact constitutional and existential crisis we feared if Democrats lost.
**At the same time, traditional media is in retrea** t. It reaches fewer Americans than ever and struggles to keep up with the flood of illegal and unconstitutional Trump administration actions—including relentless lawsuits and attacks on the free press.
**[Support Fearless Journalism](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103028032/530989033/-1581427288?refcode=20250302_Tara&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwMTRjYzgtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gXBB_lhV1I6aBUyz2CUpjIm59BycHAoOBG5N74xYO6s=)**
Most Americans are tuned out, confused, and exhausted. They catch a headline, shrug, and keep scrolling. Maybe they see a slick political ad and change the channel. And when they do seek out real news, they hit a paywall—**or simply give up.**
Good information is the lifeblood of democracy, but Trump and his allies are counting on apathy and exhaustion to maintain their grip on power.
That’s why **COURIER exists.**
Our mission is simple: **Get fact-based, actionable news in front of Americans** where they already are—whether that’s through a TikTok explainer, a swipeable Instagram post, a long-form YouTube conversation, or a must-read newsletter that tells the real story, not Trump’s distractions.
**COURIER is one of the only fast-growing, independent media organizations explicitly designed to confront this crisis of disinformation and disengagement head-on.**
And unlike corporate media, we will never—and I mean never—bow to a corrupt ruling party intent on stripping Americans of our rights, freedoms, and democracy.
In this urgent moment, COURIER is all in.
**[Support Independent Journalism](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103028034/530989034/-1581427288?refcode=20250302_Tara&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwMTRjYzgtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gXBB_lhV1I6aBUyz2CUpjIm59BycHAoOBG5N74xYO6s=)**
We’re exposing what’s really happening in Washington and holding power accountable without fear or favor. We’re covering the MAGA takeover at the state and local level, elevating new voices in the fight for democracy, and calling out both parties when they fail to meet this moment.
And people are paying attention.
**Just last week on COURIER’s socials:**
* **1.7 million interactions** on Instagram.
* Over **7.2 million likes** , **800,000+ comments** , and **700,000+ shares** on TikTok.

People are engaged—because Americans want real journalism that meets them where they are.
In just the past year, COURIER has opened new local newsrooms, built an audience of nearly **6 million people** , and become a daily news source for millions of young Americans on TikTok and Instagram. We’ve humanized complex stories, interviewed rising movement leaders, and created content people genuinely want to engage with.
The fight ahead won’t be easy. But thanks to you, we’re in it.
Thank you,
Tara McGowan
Publisher, COURIER
**[Stand with COURIER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103028041/530989040/-1581427288?refcode=20250302_Tara&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwMTRjYzgtYjJmNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gXBB_lhV1I6aBUyz2CUpjIm59BycHAoOBG5N74xYO6s=)**

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103031700/530996558/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjI5N2VmMS1iNmY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SL309nhr0QjDWfdD8LGmVECBTYFCYEHC9R1FCgf3hHg=)

Peter, I'm sure you've seen my name in the headlines – and that won't be changing anytime soon.

Our fight for our government, our economy, and our very democracy is only just beginning, and, with fearless fighters like you behind me, **I know I won't have to face it alone.**
Whether it's holding the dark forces that rule this nation accountable or defending to uphold the Constitution and the rule of law, the work we're doing has truly never been more important to the fate of this nation.
Every legal victory, every battle to safeguard the most vulnerable among us and keep our democracy alive is powered by your unwavering belief in the pursuit of justice for _all_ Americans.
With more eyes on our fight than ever, your support gives me the strength to keep going, no matter how tough the road ahead may be.
**So as we prepare to take on more obstacles in the weeks, months, and years ahead, I want to say** _**thank you:

Thank you** _for helping me stand strong against this administration's targeted attacks.

_**Thank you**_ for ensuring New York remains a safe haven for progress in the face of extremism.

And _**thank you** _for playing such a crucial role in defending our democracy.
**Truly, I wouldn't have the platform I do without this grassroots team. Together, we're sending a powerful message to bad actors everywhere: We will not bend, we will not break, and we will not be bullied.

_[And as I continue this fight for our Constitution and our nation, I hope you'll be by my side with your $5 donation here and your $25 donation there. I truly would not be able to succeed in these critical battles without fearless fighters like you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103031701/530996559/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjI5N2VmMS1iNmY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SL309nhr0QjDWfdD8LGmVECBTYFCYEHC9R1FCgf3hHg=)_**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103031702/530996560/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjI5N2VmMS1iNmY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SL309nhr0QjDWfdD8LGmVECBTYFCYEHC9R1FCgf3hHg=)

We'd hate to lose to the Democrats - _and, by extension, lose all of our Party 's historic achievements_ - all because we failed to produce a complete and verified voter census from every zip code in the nation...

Save Our Health Care and protect the Affordable Care Act from MAGA threats to repeal it. expose Trump’s plans to cut Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid. hold extreme MAGA Republicans accountable for their far-right Project 2025 Agenda. help Democrats TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and restore our Democratic Majority – For The People! I know it doesn’t seem like $1 can do all these things. But if we all give, it adds up – and we’ll be unstoppable. = | = = = = = Thank you, NANCY Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. * * *
## This Week's Articles and Podcasts
* **Sunday:** [Trump is Fueling a MAGA Civil War](https://substack.com/redirect/2f25903a-68a8-4028-8d3c-1c2267354b01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A fight between an unelected South African billionaire and unqualified & incompetent Trump appointees
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 160](https://substack.com/redirect/6decc224-9a96-4f46-8f56-e35069a322d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Public health scholar Eve of Gemma Talks joins to discuss abortion access. Also I address anti-Arab hate.
* **Tuesday:** [Corporate Media Has Picked Its Side--We Must Pick Ours](https://substack.com/redirect/ab108fc5-dc33-46b2-94d6-fbc2ab08bab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Invest in the voices speaking truth to power & let's build a Fourth Estate deserving of its name
* **Wednesday:** [The Republican Budget Bill Will Kill Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/a3e5445c-9473-4189-a5b9-a705f80d55f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Facts show the MAGA GOP bill will kill Americans through sickness, homelessness, & starvation
* **Thursday:**[Debunking the Myth that Conservatives Want "Small Govt"](https://substack.com/redirect/d94e26ff-6c75-4801-8bf3-f7ce1b714920?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): We must drop this deeply racist phrase & stop the exploitation of America's working people
* **Friday:**[Ramadan 2025 Has Begun!](https://substack.com/redirect/45aaff64-443c-4bda-a6bc-a3bb08dfd19f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Pick up your copy of Hannah and the Ramadan Gift, join a book reading, and learn about your neighbors

name: Working Families Party
subject: NEXT WEEK: The WFP State of the Union Response toTrump’s Address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Trump and his billionaire allies are waging war on working people, Peter. They’re slashing services so many of us rely on, trying to gut Medicaid, attacking fundamental rights, and funneling even more wealth and power to the ultra-rich — while millions struggle just to afford rent, food, and health care. And next week, Trump will stand before Congress and _lie_ to the American people — spinning his cruel agenda and attacks on our communities as if they’re making us stronger. But we won’t be fooled. **His policies are devastating working families while rigging the system for the elite.** That’s why, before he takes the stage, we’re taking the truth to the people. [**On Tuesday, March 4th, at 8:30 PM ET / 5:30 PM PT, Congresswoman Lateefah Simon (CA-12) will deliver the official Working Families Party Response to Donald Trump’s first six weeks in office — right before he addresses a joint session of Congress.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxhQ3A1i_f6xd1i1rk79rtB_K-3eyCR_zu5Jbqd88W1uZ_Zo0o_VxitePD4wIaIx46sEJkXT6ASk-wBRgDc6uvLFWr-43mjhxv3aOwguSxU8zIKcOo-6MVPoTrD8e0TEB-iqLUQnhXcfiRpp0ieMsOEMAv__lUO6QS47S4ywuEKWMVx4ydi8nueMoL8npFbFRN-Tyc6fIsFj2w6Ug5nW0aVRzU697-o-Cc5Lkyrb7mJkBf6LkhhxwOoFRRHAZG7vHIFY8eWFuPxvsjedEDicCFt6DrAoUbq10quRMjv6lOr8c/4ef/k1gI6Po3TVuxIPj15VQmrw/h0/h001.vJeFZXc-qNeJVE6VqUilJlZS0sacv8lesrsBqGDoAWM) You don’t want to miss it. Lateefah Simon, this fight is _personal_ , Peter. She’s not a career politician — she’s an organizer, a mother, and a leader who has spent her life fighting for justice because she’s lived the struggles so many families face. Born legally blind and raised in public housing in San Francisco, Lateefah became a mom at 19, juggling school, work, and the daily hustle of trying to make ends meet. She spent years as an ordinary transit rider, rushing to catch the BART train after dropping her daughter off at school — watching firsthand as working people struggled just to get where they needed to go. That’s what fueled her to run for the BART Board of Directors, where she fought for affordable, accessible transit for all — **and it’s what drives her now as a member of Congress.** Her story is one of resilience — and _action_. And right now, the stakes couldn’t be higher. [**Join us on March 4th at 8:30 PM ET/ 5:30 PM PT to hear Rep. Lateefah Simon lay out a vision for a government that works for _all of us_ — not just the few.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxhQ3A1i_f6xd1i1rk79rtB_K-3eyCR_zu5Jbqd88W1uZ_Zo0o_VxitePD4wIaIx46-I4ag5-79lIV-NJDEelS5c_tXRSgtoZCwMMSKQYSI8JXuwZrfOZ-IpJAXHQ_Bek38UjbmYyBp0HFMhn22af6NWaH8SyN5-nB6VK9xNSIxkPH_A5olnzDM_LMG7f9Z3BYG4Onx6THHHL2f_gKQvrRbUPh73i0IPmamPoIWKhZscoQkRGYRAQHkWCbwiZ_gkyz2OjmngEprTI-yrX1NrWdIa12Shqrd5zbuY3d2CBtQVk/4ef/k1gI6Po3TVuxIPj15VQmrw/h3/h001.dhalynzpD7y1_pGB8cak3hob6TXjZSZvp1izS7R3Vw8) clean_body: | | | Trump and his billionaire allies are waging war on working people, Peter. They’re slashing services so many of us rely on, trying to gut Medicaid, attacking fundamental rights, and funneling even more wealth and power to the ultra-rich — while millions struggle just to afford rent, food, and health care. And next week, Trump will stand before Congress and lie to the American people — spinning his cruel agenda and attacks on our communities as if they’re making us stronger. But we won’t be fooled. His policies are devastating working families while rigging the system for the elite. That’s why, before he takes the stage, we’re taking the truth to the people. You don’t want to miss it. Sign up now or text SOTU to 30403 to tune in live on Tuesday, March 4th at 8:30 PM/ 5:30 PM PT. For Rep. Lateefah Simon, this fight is personal , Peter. She’s not a career politician — she’s an organizer, a mother, and a leader who has spent her life fighting for justice because she’s lived the struggles so many families face. Born legally blind and raised in public housing in San Francisco, Lateefah became a mom at 19, juggling school, work, and the daily hustle of trying to make ends meet. She spent years as an ordinary transit rider, rushing to catch the BART train after dropping her daughter off at school — watching firsthand as working people struggled just to get where they needed to go. That’s what fueled her to run for the BART Board of Directors, where she fought for affordable, accessible transit for all — and it’s what drives her now as a member of Congress. Her story is one of resilience — and action. And right now, the stakes couldn’t be higher. Sign up now or text SOTU to 30403 to be part of this moment. Peter,
Before I start: If you chipped in any amount at all toward my February end-of-month fundraising goal, I hope you know how much I truly appreciate it.
**Sadly, it wasn't enough to close the last $924 gap to my $20,000 goal.**
I am hearing non-stop from folks in Washington state about how the mass firings have ripped the rug out from under their families, how the illegal freezing of federal funding has stalled important projects to make our communities safer, and how Trump and Musk putting the squeeze on scientific research will have long-term consequences for patients and medical care.
_I want our fundraising numbers to show that Democrats are fired up and ready to fight back. We’re close, but I need YOUR help to get us over the finish line._

If we don't close this gap, Republicans will take it as a sign that we don't have the momentum to stand up to their pro-billionaire, anti-middle-class, anti-abortion, and sometimes downright unconstitutional agenda.
**But if everyone reading this pitches in $5 before midnight, we can prove them dead wrong –** so I'm extending the deadline for one night only to make up the difference.

name: State Dem HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: Before Trump addresses the American people next week
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
As working families struggle to afford groceries, Trump is focused on gutting the federal government and renaming the Gulf of Mexico. He’s shameless. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Next week, Trump will deliver his first address to Congress of his second term – **likely spewing lies about cutting costs, protecting children, and _"making America great."_ ** **But here’s the reality:** As working families struggle to afford groceries, Trump is focused on gutting the federal government and renaming the Gulf of Mexico. He’s shameless. Let’s face it – we have a washed-up reality TV star who is a convicted felon and his right-wing billionaire backer running the country. They don’t have America’s best interests in mind. clean_body: As working families struggle to afford groceries, Trump is focused on gutting the federal government and renaming the Gulf of Mexico. He’s shameless. | | | | | ---|--- Next week, Trump will deliver his first address to Congress of his second term – likely spewing lies about cutting costs, protecting children, and "making America great." But here’s the reality: As working families struggle to afford groceries, Trump is focused on gutting the federal government and renaming the Gulf of Mexico. He’s shameless. Let’s face it – we have a washed-up reality TV star who is a convicted felon and his right-wing billionaire backer running the country. They don’t have America’s best interests in mind. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: What happened yesterday in the Oval Office
body:
If electing a House and a Senate that will stand up to Donald Trump, here's something you can do today:
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=428%2E2563979%2EcpahL-)

If you have yet to see the video of Donald Trump and JD Vance ambushing President Zelensky in the Oval Office yesterday, you should find it and give it a look.
It was a disgrace.
It was also a clear demonstration of what Kamala Harris warned us about during her debate with Donald Trump:
How quickly Trump -- after everything the American people have done and sacrificed to preserve Ukraine's ability to fight for the independence -- would give in for the sake of favor and what he thinks is a friendship with Vladimir Putin.
What happened yesterday was not good for Ukraine, it was not good for our allies in Europe, and it was not good for America.
And watching Republican after Republican celebrate the president and vice president's behavior, it was a clear demonstration that we need a Congress that can be a check on this administration.
If electing a House and a Senate that will stand up to Donald Trump is important to you, here's something you can do today:
[**Rush a contribution of $5, $50 or anything that feels right to the Democratic National Committee. They will put your support right to work electing a Congress that will stand up to Donald Trump.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250301&refcode2=428_2563979_cpahL-&akid=428%2E2563979%2EcpahL-)

It was a disgrace. It was also a clear demonstration of what Kamala Harris warned us about during her debate with Donald Trump: How quickly Trump -- after everything the American people have done and sacrificed to preserve Ukraine's ability to fight for the independence -- would give in for the sake of favor and what he thinks is a friendship with Vladimir Putin. What happened yesterday was not good for Ukraine, it was not good for our allies in Europe, and it was not good for America. And watching Republican after Republican celebrate the president and vice president's behavior, it was a clear demonstration that we need a Congress that can be a check on this administration. If electing a House and a Senate that will stand up to Donald Trump is important to you, here's something you can do today: - If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | - ** | - | | - | - | | - | - Thank you, Team Kamala - Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.

In a sit-down meeting with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, Donald Trump and J.D. Vance chose to make excuses for Vladimir Putin and attack our allies. Their decision is wrong and dangerous. It is indefensible to side with Putin over our allies in Ukraine. Our allies desperately need our help. If Ukraine falls, the United States will be pushed into a global conflict. It is a choice that the administration would rather appease the Kremlin than bring substantive national security measures through Congress. Even the most conservative Republican presidents knew Russia was not an ally to the United States. **We cannot ignore the lessons learned from history.** February marked the third anniversary of the Russian invasion of Ukraine. Bickering with our allies won’t fix this conflict. Siding with Russian aggression won’t fix this. The United States must defend democracy over authoritarianism. **[I will exhaust every legislative option to support our allies, deliver humanitarian assistance, and push back against these attacks from the administration. If you agree, please make a donation today to help me continue this work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103035800/531006506/-1544467485?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZlNWJhMC1iZWY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAFCfsS9_MrBTDF-aK1-EpXaqtxIfycxJEv3TlzuVqw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103035802/531006536/-1544467485?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZlNWJhMC1iZWY2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAFCfsS9_MrBTDF-aK1-EpXaqtxIfycxJEv3TlzuVqw=)

name: Daniel Cameron
subject: I want to tell you a story about America
body:
I'm fine without a pat on the head from the Left and the media
| | | | |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9294b421a5ff4f608d2099046a5cf1cf&_e=zbOKow0S7t-MhceirmOk8uixn_FbLhVUhmv7aT_TEBRToS-Gs_55VnUbch4rJaM8q4Dd85YN45_Q-xYDMFDO4_RTdqxCkdSCkGQ5Gh8HcQl3V_AxX-KOiz5gJHXsYaaO9Q3T5odtx2JEVUJPgBqL6U7NsZQFu3P1vM8_zCwsjKtax113dhIXbX6bHeIfyA6cOSFWoqvjkrs03aMGdpkMRYy34Zn1_pntFpMqAplzibxk68b2aZn74ERae70tF5Ni9naybTRyYVJtk-NUgwpToOtSckA3koYCHlR9PQU0Jcw%3D)
|

Peter,
I want to tell you a story about America.
My name is Daniel. I'm a 39-year-old, black American from Kentucky.
Just a few generations back, slavery and Jim Crow dominated my state.
We've come _so_ far – yet we can't seem to stop arguing with each other about it.
To the Left, I should be angry, beset by victimhood, and out for retribution.
**Fortunately for me, I was raised by patriots who taught me about God, grace, and the genuine goodness of America.**
I decided that our country and our founding values were worth defending, and in 2019, became the first black American elected to statewide office in Kentucky's history.
**I didn't hold my breath waiting for this "historic first" to be celebrated by the Left, because as Attorney General, I immediately went to war against DEI, the Green New Deal, radical trans surgeries for minors, and the insane open borders policies of the Biden Administration.**
_And then, in 2023, I committed my worst crime yet – I became the first elected leader in Kentucky to endorse President Trump._
I'm fine without a pat on the head from the Left and the media.
**Instead, I'm looking to deal a lethal blow to their toxic DEI obsession and ensure this truly becomes a Golden Age for every American of every race.**
**[That's why I'm reaching out to you today – to announce that I'm officially running to replace Mitch McConnell and bolster President Trump's majority in the U.S. Senate.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9294b421a5ff4f608d2099046a5cf1cf&_e=zbOKow0S7t-MhceirmOk8uixn_FbLhVUhmv7aT_TEBRToS-Gs_55VnUbch4rJaM8q4Dd85YN45_Q-xYDMFDO4_RTdqxCkdSCkGQ5Gh8HcQl3V_AxX-KOiz5gJHXsYaaO9Q3T5odtx2JEVUJPgBqL6fHtUMqZF3HxX6qYmyBfMlVq9BlmuzypnD77Zq0swlEbwgvURku5wr7j_GGDkh-OugmNfr-FS86M_lQTfsTZ04jTDv2k9Q7RHPT0dpns2Spv7YI9-WBmmzaBkPs-d_ns-DIIWI04HAVjVQ1rRJDm58k%3D)**

clean_body: I'm fine without a pat on the head from the Left and the media | | | | | | Peter, I want to tell you a story about America. My name is Daniel. I'm a 39-year-old, black American from Kentucky. Just a few generations back, slavery and Jim Crow dominated my state. We've come so far – yet we can't seem to stop arguing with each other about it. To the Left, I should be angry, beset by victimhood, and out for retribution. Fortunately for me, I was raised by patriots who taught me about God, grace, and the genuine goodness of America. I decided that our country and our founding values were worth defending, and in 2019, became the first black American elected to statewide office in Kentucky's history. I didn't hold my breath waiting for this "historic first" to be celebrated by the Left, because as Attorney General, I immediately went to war against DEI, the Green New Deal, radical trans surgeries for minors, and the insane open borders policies of the Biden Administration. And then, in 2023, I committed my worst crime yet – I became the first elected leader in Kentucky to endorse President Trump. I'm fine without a pat on the head from the Left and the media. Instead, I'm looking to deal a lethal blow to their toxic DEI obsession and ensure this truly becomes a Golden Age for every American of every race. | | I'm a true believer ready to help CEMENT the America First Agenda INTO LAW, and I'd like to ask for your personal endorsement. We're looking to lock in 1,000 supporters from just this one message alone. Sincerely, Daniel Cameron | | | | | | | | | | Paid for Cameron for Senate, Inc. Cameron for Senate, Inc. 736 Tremont Ave, Lexington, KY 40502

Last week we talked about the nuts and bolts of [running America like a modern CEO or private equity fund would run a major company](https://substack.com/redirect/e4c2fbb9-b920-4de8-9bb5-ba294eb7c720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including the strategy of gutting the institution to juice short term gains by converting assets into cash for the top shareholders.
A major tool of this management strategy is financialization: the shifting of the focus and resources of an enterprise [away from producing goods and services and toward financial engineering](https://substack.com/redirect/bda9df0f-5012-40de-87fc-3507fce9f0ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Our politicians, funded and educated by the same financial engineers running hedge funds, big businesses, and Wall Street, embraced this management strategy for our country and, over the last few decades, have enacted policy that transitioned the American economy away from production and toward financial instruments.
Today, we are going to talk about the damage financialization has done to our country and, more importantly, how it has impacted politics in America and created a vacuum of opportunity for any organized party that wishes to take it.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ohGUrUyAjrGkeSETAlYUL9K0Tg0U9gjTBV8XoSLz-zY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=158172370)
To begin with, we need to recognize that financial instruments, based on money making money, are a zero sum game. Meaning that while they can be used to facilitate wealth creation, they do not themselves create wealth. If I lend you $100 at 5% for a year, you have to pay me back $105 at the end of the year. If you did nothing with that money for the year, you are five dollars poorer and I am five dollars richer. Wealth is transferred not created.
This is very different from products and other services where wealth is created because the value of the final product is greater than the sum of its parts. Take manufacturing, where inputs like metal, plastic, and ingenuity are turned into a car or a computer. Or agriculture, where dirt and seeds become food. Or even education, where a building, teachers, students, and time combine to create knowledgeable and productive workers. Etc.
That doesn't mean that there isn't value in financial services. Running a system that makes capital accessible to manufacturers, farmers, teachers, and others, so that they can effectively turn basic parts and ideas that they can't afford into more valuable products or services is important. If a producer, given the capital, can take basic inputs and create an output that is 10% more valuable than the original, then that's a win for society. The financial industry's job is to make capital available and charge the right amount of interest (or set the right stock price) so that producers can affordably access capital and the financial industry can survive a reasonable failure rate and continue allocating capital.
But as financialization grows relative to production, it exceeds its value in allocating capital and the excess financialization serves to do just one thing: transfer wealth to those who already have it.
This is best illustrated by imagining the extreme: a country whose GDP is 100% finance. Now perhaps this could work if the lending is external to other countries, but if the full internal economy is just one person lending money to the next person and then to the next person, it fails. Those who started with money will continue to accumulate more capital through interest on their lending, and those who didn't start with money will continue to accumulate debt. Wealth inequality will grow with every compound interest calculation and, with no one creating wealth, the whole system becomes mathematically impossible.
Many people are familiar with interest payments on an individual level or relatively short time period and, through car or home loans or credit cards, have experienced how hard it can be to keep up with interest. But, to understand what high levels of financialization do to inequality at a national level, we need to look at things on a different scale.
Instead of thinking in dollar terms (which are technically infinite, an important point later), we are going to use a finite resource that can stand in for dollars: gold. In this experiment, gold is lent out and the interest, compounded annually, must be paid back in gold.
For example, if someone with a pound of gold were to lend it out at a 5% interest rate for 20 years, when all is said and done the lender should have 2.65 pounds of gold. Which means that the borrower or borrowers would have had to use the original pound of gold to generate enough to both pay back that pound plus 1.65 pounds of interest gold.
That may not seem insurmountable, but what happens if you stretch it out to 100 years? Now the borrower would have to come up with the original pound of gold plus another 145 pounds. Just five times the number of loan years, but nearly 100 times the amount to pay the loan off. Let's hope they had a good idea!
That's compound interest, and it gets even crazier at larger scale.
What if, for example, in 1492 Christopher Columbus had taken a pound of gold from the Americas and, on behalf of Ferdinand and Isabella, promised that Spain would pay it back at 5% annual interest. The descendants of the original indigenous lenders just produced the note, how much gold would Spain owe them?
Well, let's just say the Spanish monarchy should have invested that pound of gold in grander exploration adventures than voyaging across the Atlantic, because it's going to require a serious interstellar voyaging and mining capability to scrape together the _196 billion pounds_ of gold they would owe today when Earth is estimated to contain only 538 million pounds of accessible gold-- a mere .027% of the total due.
One more example, just to show how impossible this gets as the scale becomes larger:
What if, to commemorate the death of Jesus, one of his followers had set aside just 1 measly gram of gold--about 1/5 of the gold in a wedding ring and an amount that would cost about $93 today, so a totally accessible amount-- what if one of his followers had set that gram of gold aside and directed that it be invested with a 5% gold on gold return for 2000 years, after which the gold hoard would be built into a statue in honor of the lord. Can you guess how big that statue would be?
Its mass would equal 1.2 billion suns.
Yes, in just 2000 years, a relatively low five percent interest rate on a gram of gold consumes 4 million times more gold than exists in the entire galaxy (scientists estimate there are only about 300 sun masses worth of gold in the Milky Way).
This is the absurdity of financialization at scale.
We obviously aren't at these extremes, but multiple studies of over-financialization in an economy have found that as financialization reaches a certain threshold, the economy begins to suffer because interest at scale is unsustainable. [One study found](https://substack.com/redirect/e6a1f26f-e405-4930-b4c8-87da6ae9975b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that, as private debt (a proxy for financialization) exceeds 100% of GDP, the economy becomes more volatile, growth is restricted, and the country is worse off.
In the US, private debt as a percentage of GDP reached that threshold in the early 1980s-- and has well exceeded it since the early 2000s.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/03b8d5e9-e27d-4cd4-aa92-ccb1eb8f4096?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you compare the percentage of private debt chart to a wealth inequality chart covering the same period, you can easily see that as the US crossed that threshold and continued to exceed it, income inequality in the US grew by leaps and bounds.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/299e4c0e-3870-4566-8f6b-69c328a04ff4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In other words, as expected, inequality accelerated rapidly alongside the deregulation and growth of the financial sector in America. And with trillions of dollars out on loan between those who have wealth and those who need it, the impact is getting more real with every passing year.
Which brings us to the politics of it.
In politics, the over-financialization of our economy has caught up to us and created two things: a group of people who are primed to rage against the institutions that squeeze and betray them every day, and an apathy among younger generations who see no hope as the system continues to snowball out of control.
When I was recruiting for the Marine Corps [the other day at Mizzou](https://substack.com/redirect/99ddc6b2-2818-4094-9b14-fd884ad55272?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one of the benefits that I was asked about the most was the VA Home Loan(!). Out of all the benefits, reasons, and other things to ask about, that one came up over and over again. Because our younger generation doesn't think that they will ever be able to buy a home. Literally. And they're not wrong.
[The median age of a home buyer in the 1980s was 31. Today it's 56](https://substack.com/redirect/bf6c0e7a-3010-4c8c-9d3e-f84a1d649534?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Someone in the comments of my last post thought it wasn't fair to call out boomer politicians for giving their generation the hookup over and over again and passing the buck to the rest of us. I get how that could make the boomers upset, but they were the ones buying houses in the 1980's and they're STILL the ones buying houses forty years later while my peers are frozen out. Because of the way the system has been transformed.
It's the same with student debt. Almost none for that generation while my peers are buried beneath it with no hope in sight.
No one my age or younger thinks we will get social security, certainly not the way that everyone up until now has gotten it.
In a financialized era where money now equals speech, entire generations who have been boxed out of the ownership class's wealth feel like they have no voice.
You saw that in 2024, when younger voters were lost or disenchanted and acted like it.
And, of course, we all know where those raging against the institutions and establishment [turned politically](https://substack.com/redirect/568945a6-e261-45b7-8481-feab9beed1b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The thing is, that the answer to turning things around could be in the question that people of all types asked me repeatedly on the campaign trail: why do we have inflation and what we can do about it.
We have inflation for two reasons:
First, because our financial sector has ballooned and the excess operates a zero-sum game that takes money from people who don't have it and transfers it to those who do. As inequality continued to accelerate and all the "gold" began accumulating at the top, the problem that was temporarily solved by our country "printing" more money through deficit spending/quantitative easing and other tools at its disposal, to keep the system from toppling over.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a418b4c6-eee9-47c6-a44a-9fa1f2b2ec94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The money supply in the US [quadrupled](https://substack.com/redirect/25b79a34-2198-475d-8478-d86ccb88fe2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 20 years
But more money chasing goods (particularly when paired with a monopolized economy designed by the financial engineers) eventually creates inflation.
The second reason we have inflation is because politicians refuse to pull money out of the economy through taxation on those who are hoarding it at the top. Instead, they do the opposite and, like a modern CEO, shower the top "shareholders"--corporations and the wealthiest Americans--with tax cuts, the equivalent of national share-buybacks and dividends.
Other factors like corporate greed, monopolization, supply chain woes, are just byproducts of the above.
It would be simple to reverse.
Instead of taking an axe to our country and those who serve it, take the axe to the financial sector and chop it in half. Maybe we should have a financial sector "DOGE" run by federal employees showing them what efficiency actually looks like: the number of civil servants is the same as it [was in the 1960s despite the population of the US growing by 68%](https://substack.com/redirect/ff8c503e-ceae-49c0-a282-d9ee071aab72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Instead of printing money to solve for the gold-interest problem (the fact that it's impossible to have enough of a finite resource to maintain interest at scale), and to solve for the fact that excessive financialization redistributes money upward and creates an ever increasing demand for more cash in the economy to meet impossible interest demands, we should pull money out of the top of the economy the old fashioned way and re-inject it down below or into productive efforts.
Instead of running our nation using a managed decline philosophy--stripping it for parts and passing the windfall to the top through massive tax cuts for the rich--we should invest in ourselves, our production, and our future.
People will support politicians who they think are going to do one of two things related to the current economic situation: tear it all down, or fix it.
Right now, they don't believe any politician is capable of or willing to fix it, so by default voters are turning to the tear-it-down strategy.
People don't believe in the fix-it camp because they have been betrayed so many times. Anyone running on a fix it/change it mentality is going to have to take real steps to prove they are serious and, I know I've said it before, but that likely begins and ends with who they take their campaign money from. If they can do that, though, the reward politically-- and in saving our country will be immense.
The next few years the door on the political front is going to be wide open because the real problems aren't going to be solved through tearing everything down (at least not what is currently being and likely to be be torn down). And people's needs will continue to be unmet as the financial sector continues to consume everything like a massive growing black hole -- or even scarier, a 5% loan at scale!
A movement focused on this, and proving that it means it, has a real chance. I say a movement because it can't just be one person. It needs to be a movement because it will require the resources to go against a machine that grows more powerful with every single compound interest period.
Emotionally, the people in our country are already there. They just need something to believe in.
Lucas

name: Jackson McMillan
subject: Re: ours is more important than any other politics emails
body:
Last night I emailed you with an aggressive but factual subject line. This is not hyperbolic. This has opportunity has never happened before and is completely unprecedented in American history.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---

| | | | Team,

Last night I emailed you with an aggressive but factual subject line.
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nWhs0nni11biSvx8_HcQ2tr1-XjzBu1JfirITTxMud1Ashz8qsMdYoR1LDzWU_MsRr8HC_CRdCG-7MQv5r_uFmXg6qOOGUjPFozMMV9j_nUiZTLGokDWE8jOl36GWLa4Yrl119-yom5NH4QNDzSsHC_BXuO1lzQ_y_79YFEWBuR1VDYFtvMrFrURYn0uXl9eFMrOjkNZasJjJM4BO2CUqRTfyoErQUu7&c=2oxGKbbY-AW_VJbrKn9I2tWXhlOsOyW65HPSC8CuYiT_U0BMH8J4HA==&ch=rzySLaayYGpc2wWRwgFlm4Xy8Vcovjh7QS0cShVOaHybH5nmw-ZmDg==)
---
| | | | This is not hyperbolic. This is true:

* The GOP House Majority is so tiny that If Dems win each of the three upcoming special elections we can steal the house back and paralyze Trump's ability to pass anything through Congress.

* Pulling this off is contingent on Josh Weil, my boss, the democratic nominee for the FL-06 special election winning his election in 31 days.

* This has never happened before in American history, an incumbent president losing his party's house majority in the midst of his term but we have the power to bring this fluke of history into reality.

With that in mind, tell me any other political email (outside of those from the two other democrats in special elections right now) is more important than ours. You cannot.
Trump and MAGA are throwing everything and the kitchen sink into preventing a devastating defeat here. Our district is already blanketed with their ads. That's why my team and I are leaving nothing left in the tank.
We've raised $6,000,000 in two months - more than what most sitting members of Congress raised in their two years cycles, but we'll need to raise a helluva lot more to keep rolling with MAGA's punches and win this thing.
[You have the power to write American history and neuter Trump's legislative agenda before the 2026 midterms. Can you make a donation to power our final push as we barrel towards our April first election in 31 days? ](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nWhs0nni11biSvx8_HcQ2tr1-XjzBu1JfirITTxMud1Ashz8qsMdYoR1LDzWU_MsRr8HC_CRdCG-7MQv5r_uFmXg6qOOGUjPFozMMV9j_nUiZTLGokDWE8jOl36GWLa4Yrl119-yom5NH4QNDzSsHC_BXuO1lzQ_y_79YFEWBuR1VDYFtvMrFrURYn0uXl9eFMrOjkNZasJjJM4BO2CUqRTfyoErQUu7&c=2oxGKbbY-AW_VJbrKn9I2tWXhlOsOyW65HPSC8CuYiT_U0BMH8J4HA==&ch=rzySLaayYGpc2wWRwgFlm4Xy8Vcovjh7QS0cShVOaHybH5nmw-ZmDg==)

name: David Hogg
subject: What I spoke about in Chicago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is what I think, Peter...
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250301-1&t=1&akid=1806%2E587540%2EvPJPvQ)
Peter, a few days ago I got to speak at the UChicago Institute of Politics.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250301-1?refcode=em20250301-1806&amount=5&refcode2=1806_587540_vPJPvQ&akid=1806%2E587540%2EvPJPvQ)
I talked about my history of activism over the past few years and how I helped lead young people across the country to demand real action on gun violence.
I also talked about the future of activism under the second Trump administration – and the role that young people can and must play in defeating MAGA for good.
Historically speaking, the Democratic Party is at an incredible low when it comes to public support. We should have reckoned with that fact well before Election Day. We should have understood that for most voters, costs were too high and President Biden was too old. They wanted real change that we weren’t offering.
Going forward, we have to tell people the truth – not what we think they want to hear. **We have to listen to people’s problems and offer meaningful solutions.**
That’s the _only way_ we’ll rebuild trust with young people and bring them back into the Democratic Party’s big tent. **We can either do this – or we can keep losing.**
I helped start Leaders We Deserve because we need to bolster and support the next generation of leaders by helping them win elections and hold elected office.
We need young, bold candidates who aren’t beholden to corporate money and special interests, but who are real advocates for the change we all want to see.
**[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help us carry out our important mission?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250301-1?refcode=em20250301-1806&amount=5&refcode2=1806_587540_vPJPvQ&akid=1806%2E587540%2EvPJPvQ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250301-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250301-1806&refcode2=1806_587540_vPJPvQ&akid=1806%2E587540%2EvPJPvQ)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250301-1&t=2&refcode2=1806_587540_vPJPvQ&akid=1806%2E587540%2EvPJPvQ)**

name: Steve Daines
subject: I don’t have the luxury of time

Fellow American,

I spent all of 2024 leading the fight to retake the Senate Majority, ending the Democrats’ four catastrophic years in the Majority.

Here is the good news - _WE WON!_

Now, here is the bad news - **This made me the Democrats’ #1 target in 2026.**

If we’re going to hold our Senate Majority, we need to keep this Montana seat RED in 2026, and Democrats have already rushed a candidate into this race. **Chuck Schumer is going all in to defeat me in 2026.**

[**That’s why I’m asking you to become one of the founding donors for my 2026 re-election campaign. Your founding support today will give my team the resources they need to plan and execute what will be one of the most expensive Senate races in the Country.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ada6192bcc7f455ca53f2970abde0f5d&_e=wh2LHtdT6aydpsWGaF0430BFh3dQnI13-hYkh7liGVZdsMOkFQGThpU8xXTgUOZaOBZl9jlIkk67chPVBfeiXEej79qQ4gpJ7ZfeZjG_JMM71-nY7iISkH5zv0TcmIU8tVKwOYNnu3MZTjE6CM-HOHVxHHeZD3WOgGcifA2jIK-dk_jkux9CWXUZCeHMjNGQd-iM_r-JrVrC-qfWW2mPr-TsEhgzPt4dP7uCo9BG4sF_S9IX_NocICGVzAq4fXAz1v3oKopdblICIgQrKcuuVUAcHnFOktXJU-TvKuseEl6RYVr5ldtReCneNXMLY-WrHfJFSKzlHor5yJV7mUpcCBDQWgithJ0GRG1wihsGYoMW_Ez8Bbz7RW1RK9xTw4GWgsXQws4PuNDKRQW9Q10NiLD_XQY9DBppBiX2F7ZWWZSi4HeSWzYXP2-8QMOSJUaI)

# [Dear Ukraine: Sorry that our president is an idiot](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ec44c55-137c-461b-b64a-4e03c3cb9046/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6663093b-e5ba-42f1-bd01-8596db60c3e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Dear Ukraine: Americans stand with you, and support your brave fight against the Russian invasion. Unfortunately, our President is an idiot. As you saw for yourselves in his meeting with your far better president, Volodymyr Zelenskyy. And we're sorry. If it's any consolation, more than half of us did NOT vote for him. And we're counting the days until he is gone. [**Sorry that you (and we) have to deal with this idiot until then.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00544c83-3e12-4c77-beb4-213add6dc7a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Support Ancient Christianity
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=747aaa43d5cc48b9a201c3a85b430466&_e=PB7SoJYeadXao959FLnmcqmH-JFJqDQjUI9yt2vG16YoJhjJhWlpbH8BHyRq-tZy43qTFdbADz2uOBilx_gpFz1gdwbydkb6-fQ36X8CkEzghmDi6-Sg0JD0NfGnMfnH4_-2EeWI40lGVcaOK-NeTgl60zebwlAz6yfTNIvBccYGtCIL6IQ0GO6fxgtKMKzka0Q1FQdDw3OGuDCK4b_aop1x7HJgT9iEwFl83H3vQTe1HTFd-M6oeqTpHvJp-I7ySmguIz5ZT3DVgeMY4_i60Z6uK_sj5PZJ_KrarXsW1HXt4An6swAv0-qNWyf59h_H8PCYFcIT3JMD266i7BI1kl86E-7Ba16ctf0-UDXkwxEbcywZCVGGFlq5YomccT09liEItEc0w6-4Dg4vC-FUkSANnA-mWy9UttBX1pAGAkdNaml2iGxaZ1Nu_XmOdGDG)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=747aaa43d5cc48b9a201c3a85b430466&_e=PB7SoJYeadXao959FLnmcqmH-JFJqDQjUI9yt2vG16YoJhjJhWlpbH8BHyRq-tZy43qTFdbADz2uOBilx_gpFz1gdwbydkb6-fQ36X8CkEzghmDi6-Sg0JD0NfGnMfnH4_-2EeWI40lGVcaOK-NeTgl60zebwlAz6yfTNIvBccYGtCIL6IQ0GO6fxgtKMKzka0Q1FQdDw3OGuDCK4b_aop1x7HJgT9iEwFl83H3vQTe1HTFd-M6oeqTpHvJp-I7ySmguIz5ZT3DVgeMY4_i60Z6uK_sj5PZJ_KrarXsW1HXtOr-BnDsC5Xcy2vYn84_NwzTCbDjtw36bJ8wwHcErSHPoRcQmLegwQu8L5Pkn46weR0M3lnuukf9XfoJwAPQwsdAxQ57or5jExI60THQKqPaxCy5Dx4XyZVIdF6AHMZQuNHP02TRc4q2CS1GekaAe)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

clean_body: A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Friend, Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "," now available on DVD. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below: ) Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | |

name: AOC
subject: We did not vote for Starlink
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
"I voted for Trump, not Elon Musk"
#
If you ask the American people what they think about Elon Musk and DOGE, they are vehemently opposed.
The reactions right now are not just in Democratic districts, they’re in Republican districts saying, "**I voted for Trump, not for Elon Musk**."
We did not vote for mass buyouts of the federal workforce.
We did not vote for gutting NASA, and then having the contracts go to SpaceX. We did not vote for Starlink to start replacing critical FAA operations.
There is a very, very deep corruption at the core of this.
If Elon Musk wanted to divest himself of his businesses and enter public service with his so-called ‘business expertise,’ that is his prerogative.
But so long as he maintains a vested financial interest in gutting the federal government, **he is acting in his own self-interest and not those of the American people**.
We're not witnessing the start of an oligarchy — we are fully here.
But we do not have to comply with illegal activity, **even if that illegal activity is coming from the President and his billionaire donors**.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250301.u-dE0y&refcode=em20250301-8254-P_FND_RES_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8254%2E2526796%2EskSCdY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250301.u-dE0y&refcode=em20250301-8254-P_FND_RES_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8254%2E2526796%2EskSCdY)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

clean_body: "I voted for Trump, not Elon Musk" If you ask the American people what they think about Elon Musk and DOGE, they are vehemently opposed. The reactions right now are not just in Democratic districts, they’re in Republican districts saying, "I voted for Trump, not for Elon Musk." We did not vote for mass buyouts of the federal workforce. We did not vote for gutting NASA, and then having the contracts go to SpaceX. We did not vote for Starlink to start replacing critical FAA operations. There is a very, very deep corruption at the core of this. If Elon Musk wanted to divest himself of his businesses and enter public service with his so-called ‘business expertise,’ that is his prerogative. But so long as he maintains a vested financial interest in gutting the federal government, he is acting in his own self-interest and not those of the American people. We're not witnessing the start of an oligarchy — we are fully here. But we do not have to comply with illegal activity, even if that illegal activity is coming from the President and his billionaire donors. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Ukraine did not ask for this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
An American president berated one of our allies in public at the White House while the entire world watched. He aligned our country — our people, our military, our strength — with Putin and against President Zelenskyy and the people of Ukraine.
#

Peter, I have to tell you — what happened in the Oval Office yesterday was a disgrace.
An American president berated one of our allies in public at the White House while the entire world watched. He aligned our country — our people, our military, our strength — with Putin and against President Zelenskyy and the people of Ukraine.
So, I want to get a few things straight here:
This is a war that Russia started.
Ukraine did not ask for it.
They did not ask to go to war with a nuclear superpower.
They did not ask for their cities to be reduced to rubble.
They did not ask for their children to be displaced and families to be torn apart.
Donald Trump is turning his back on an 80 year alliance that brought unprecedented peace and prosperity to Europe and the United States.
We are the most powerful nation on earth. What we say and do matters, and the signals the president and his administration are sending out right now do not reflect our values.
**They do not speak for me.**
I, for one, believe that NATO is one of the strongest forces for peace in the world, and it must be upheld. I believe that the people of Ukraine deserve our support, and I am going to continue working towards a just and lasting peace. And I continue to believe that the United States must oppose murderous dictators like Putin, and back democracies like Ukraine and leaders like Zelenskyy.
This shouldn’t be controversial, but that’s not the case today. That makes it more important than ever for us to speak out and defend our values.
That’s what I’m going to do, and I hope you’re with me.
Thanks,
Ruben

Please, don’t click away just yet.
As Ruben stands up for what’s right in the Senate, he’s going to need a massive team backing him up.
[**If you can afford it, please: Chip in to Ruben's campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar25.cQPUMp&refcode=em250301-1-120&t=1&akid=3739%2E734936%2EnLBYkW)
CONTRIBUTE
Thank you!

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.
