* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas measles outbreak reaches nearly 150 cases** ," Dallas Morning News'**Jaime Landers** -- "[The measles outbreak in Texas](https://substack.com/redirect/39566c17-b73a-4151-af05-a5371b936549?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has reached nearly 150 cases, according to a Friday morning update from the state health department.

Health officials said 146 cases have been identified since late January, up from the 124 cases reported earlier this week. Twenty of those patients have been hospitalized, and one school-age, [unvaccinated child has died](https://substack.com/redirect/a015c6af-9bd8-4399-a18c-8bce1f30d073?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Measles is one of [the most contagious viruses in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/0a5e85da-861b-45a2-9694-2963808c4692?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and spreads mostly among unvaccinated people. Of the 146 cases in Texas, 141 cases were in people who were either unvaccinated or whose vaccination status was unknown, according to the state health department.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/29aa71c6-7578-427b-81a8-39ee7084ad18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/29aa71c6-7578-427b-81a8-39ee7084ad18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The outbreak started in Gaines County, near the New Mexico border. At 98 cases, it is still home to a vast majority of patients. Terry County is next at 21 cases, and Dawson County follows at eight.

Texas' count doesn't include nine measles cases [reported in New Mexico](https://substack.com/redirect/956b4cd4-089b-4da8-9a05-2628f528d315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which officials have said were likely connected to the West Texas outbreak." TOP NEWS "Texas measles outbreak reaches nearly 150 cases ," Dallas Morning News'Jaime Landers -- " has reached nearly 150 cases, according to a Friday morning update from the state health department. Health officials said 146 cases have been identified since late January, up from the 124 cases reported earlier this week. Twenty of those patients have been hospitalized, and one school-age, . Measles is one of , and spreads mostly among unvaccinated people. Of the 146 cases in Texas, 141 cases were in people who were either unvaccinated or whose vaccination status was unknown, according to the state health department. The outbreak started in Gaines County, near the New Mexico border. At 98 cases, it is still home to a vast majority of patients. Terry County is next at 21 cases, and Dawson County follows at eight. Texas' count doesn't include nine measles cases , which officials have said were likely connected to the West Texas outbreak." | I wanted to reach out to thank you for your support of my campaign. It’s been a whirlwind couple of weeks, and many of you have reached out to express your concerns about funding cuts for critical programs like Medicaid and Social Security.

That’s why this past month, I introduced the CLEAR Act so that temporary agencies like Elon Musk’s DOGE are subject to the same Freedom of Information Act rules as permanent government entities.

This is only the beginning of our efforts to push back against Elon Musk and the Trump administration. **On the ground, we’re building the foundation to hold this seat and take back the House in 2026. Budgetary decisions belong strictly to Congress, and House Republicans know they can’t pass a budget without Democrats.**

[_**That’s why defending this seat is so important. Will you join us in fighting back with a contribution of any amount right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103040148/531019114/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-03-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDEzYjI0Ny1jN2Y2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y7RnhHimU7vvoFEo0d8fNFSQhcKAlJ3ZVq3QGfoCTBw=)

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas measles outbreak reaches nearly 150 cases** ," Dallas Morning News'**Jaime Landers** -- "[The measles outbreak in Texas](https://substack.com/redirect/4d5427fe-4acf-4fa7-b1d5-4ed36453ec3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has reached nearly 150 cases, according to a Friday morning update from the state health department.

Health officials said 146 cases have been identified since late January, up from the 124 cases reported earlier this week. Twenty of those patients have been hospitalized, and one school-age, [unvaccinated child has died](https://substack.com/redirect/a065fb4a-4c1f-4d06-a7c5-a626f1122a67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Measles is one of [the most contagious viruses in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/7d490a3d-3d45-48b4-9a31-6e4c44bfdb0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and spreads mostly among unvaccinated people. Of the 146 cases in Texas, 141 cases were in people who were either unvaccinated or whose vaccination status was unknown, according to the state health department.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/8825232b-43dd-4382-9264-0c213091de3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/8825232b-43dd-4382-9264-0c213091de3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The outbreak started in Gaines County, near the New Mexico border. At 98 cases, it is still home to a vast majority of patients. Terry County is next at 21 cases, and Dawson County follows at eight.

Texas' count doesn't include nine measles cases [reported in New Mexico](https://substack.com/redirect/7a102f10-f717-4347-8d6d-3f28ac2e9ff8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which officials have said were likely connected to the West Texas outbreak." TOP NEWS "Texas measles outbreak reaches nearly 150 cases ," Dallas Morning News'Jaime Landers -- " has reached nearly 150 cases, according to a Friday morning update from the state health department. Health officials said 146 cases have been identified since late January, up from the 124 cases reported earlier this week. Twenty of those patients have been hospitalized, and one school-age, . Measles is one of , and spreads mostly among unvaccinated people. Of the 146 cases in Texas, 141 cases were in people who were either unvaccinated or whose vaccination status was unknown, according to the state health department. The outbreak started in Gaines County, near the New Mexico border. At 98 cases, it is still home to a vast majority of patients. Terry County is next at 21 cases, and Dawson County follows at eight. Texas' count doesn't include nine measles cases , which officials have said were likely connected to the West Texas outbreak." Measles is one of , and spreads mostly among unvaccinated people. | | Dear Fellow American,

Your benefits are expiring, and time is running out to activate your [Heritage Foundation membership for 2025](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/RRbFZ_h142JlZFi8OVygTpcIlWkePyBa2JaMZUqy-CGVo6yhwoeyx5rgYkUlwxi5CWfEz8qaV-4Znp3FROtufM_VZxA8PQgm_Ljb7C3j1Y1Bz9uSey0Mxmra4RYmkgUxytZkYBUFClmiDqZRY_4miGtLRB85gedb8d-gsijV5MZl2fuKSxhODYC6_M5ABMTFYyVEijrM2-Xg7oXvEAYDpPbTHWfosXeMxg-TIF3zYA7xORdXOD9RpMT1yWUAzLwC131Nh8QjumdfrwrmFRCP_RShYRDCnp1T3El2AiI8-BnVrnEa6rlCHmCt0yuOVuqQVLKxBNG2ZC2a-kGPo7cAozBNevMwZ_eoevnOV_JK0WV8R5y9T7eBpwvyKCwtx0TiXDP7PdxMq-RaXZfM/ck0kFSsN04FvseXcSr18m9u0vxZglPQT/6).

If you don't act now, you could lose out on your member benefits like:
* **Your official Heritage Foundation membership card:** Heritage Foundation members are proud to stand for their conservative principles and we recognize each member with their own exclusive membership card.
* **Special invitations to virtual Heritage events:** As a member, you will be invited to attend virtual gatherings where you can hear from and interact directly with Heritage experts and other conservative movement leaders.
* **Exclusive Updates from Heritage Leadership:** We want you to be constantly informed about the impact of your membership. Every member receives regular updates from the front lines of policy battles happening in Washington D.C. and across the country.

Most important, by activating your membership today, you'll be supporting our effort to rescue the American Dream and defend America's founding principles.

Right now, we are working with the Trump Administration to advance the policy priorities that matter most to you--like dismantling the Deep State, securing our borders, eliminating woke ideologies, and promoting economic opportunity for all.

subject: Trump just attacked me (again) in the Oval Office meeting with Zelenskyy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, we just
witnessed a truly shocking moment in the Oval Office. And in our history.

Just 24 hours ago, Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr
Zelenskyy met to discuss the future of U.S. aid to our partner and ally.
It took just minutes before he and J.D. Vance tag-teamed, attacking our
Ukrainian allies, appeasing Russian dictator Vladimir Putin, and
name-calling me – all effectively in the same breath.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]Yesterday's Oval Office meeting

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]I’ll share more about what happened below, but first, will you rush in
a donation right now to help fight back against Donald Trump’s betrayal of
everything America stands for? As the lead impeachment manager in Trump’s
first impeachment trial, I know what it takes to stand up to bullies like
him and protect our national interests. We need to stand up against these
lies and the assault on our Ukrainian partners right now.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]DONATE

During the press conference, a reporter asks Trump: “What happens if
Russia breaks the ceasefire? What happens if Russia breaks peace talks?”

It’s a fair question,
Derek.
Vladimir Putin is a ruthless dictator who has invaded his own neighbor and
killed tens of thousands of people to try and remake the map of Europe.

I want to share the full, unedited transcript of how Donald Trump
responded, because his answer is truly disturbing:

“What if anything?! What if a bomb drops on your head right now? What if
they broke it? I don’t know, they broke it with Biden because they didn’t
respect him. They didn’t respect Obama. They respect me. Let me tell you:
Putin went through a hell of a lot with me — he went through a phony
witchhunt where they used him and Russia. Russia, Russia, Russia. Did you
ever hear of that deal? That was a phony Hunter Biden, Joe Biden scam.
Hillary Clinton. Shifty Adam Schiff, who was a Democrat scam. And he had
to go through that. And he did go through it. We didn’t end up in a war.
And he went through it. He was accused of all that stuff — he had nothing
to do with it.”

I’ll cut to the chase:

President Zelenskyy is bravely fighting to save his country, and our
western allies need support more than ever.

Instead of offering our support at the darkest moment, Donald Trump
cowardly kneeled to appease Vladimir Putin.

And after this meeting between a true hero and a cowardly appeaser, the
hero will return to Ukraine.

The president’s conduct was despicable, but it’s no wonder Donald Trump
holds so much sympathy for Russia. Putin has been one of his most loyal
allies since Trump ran for president in 2016. Russia hacked the Democratic
party, stole a bunch of emails, and leaked them. They set up a troll farm
to push out misinformation on social media to divide Americans and get him
elected.

And now that he’s back in office, the President of the United States is
abandoning our alliances — all to Putin and Russia’s benefit. This is
exactly the chaos and abandonment our adversaries want to see.

This is not the road America should be going down. All of us — Democrats,
Republicans, elected officials and ordinary citizens — must push back with
every tool we have to save democracy as we know it.

This is not the time to back down. We must stand up and fight back.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]Please rush in an emergency donation to help push back against Donald
Trump, and his abandonment of America’s allies and values.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q12025_abs_em.sOF3cu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q12025_abs_em.yoPhsC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q12025_abs_em.rGpVdd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em.zzYphW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q12025_abs_em.KUIsEV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8336%2E5257348%2EKV1I0N ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: It’s Vivek – I’m running for Governor!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter – with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine – at the helm in battleground Ohio.
I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy.
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dfd291633f6d4be8920b6ceaf39f4d02&_e=A8OzWpgBh9YiglnOTlPVHAfem010PhEbpiHlwv9orP0X3A5WfkxXkJqJF5ISWXRFXqCWBgEv6IJc4teVdJXqB326gNmCnRiqse9g9V6eAFThtTuXsA-VIJ-J_aH3_BlXk2VZjkCXn_jKo3djPH70KPDR1jzWTY6sh6BPn0-yBMjO7aUCNhiHtqWuFf7DrRTxdBxgsLw-PzVpbM0-qHqByj9yDt8MYuCpy6GXqHxFnAAYMJpYap8i143oZNikm7KkfZ0fje8XGTveF4zd2OMJ1Ixx4Fh5Nqd0TcpaQXVzBAyg5LV086uBDl2J66tRV_tDW3JS7T3UbHQpQd_yekHBa4fau63DgzBvXm7oi-zgxXBXOEFqvSbJU2NkPT60GjR30Am0hzJPnLUxlR2iLoMZGDWfehI5LaPbK8rdOQ4PO4Q%3D)
---
My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It's official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

**[If that's all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dfd291633f6d4be8920b6ceaf39f4d02&_e=A8OzWpgBh9YiglnOTlPVHAfem010PhEbpiHlwv9orP0X3A5WfkxXkJqJF5ISWXRFXqCWBgEv6IJc4teVdJXqB326gNmCnRiqse9g9V6eAFThtTuXsA-VIJ-J_aH3_BlXk2VZjkCXn_jKo3djPH70KPDR1jzWTY6sh6BPn0-yBMjO7aUCNhiHtqWuFf7DrRTxdBxgsLw-PzVpbM0-qHqByj9yDt8MYuCpy6GXqHxFnAAYMJpYap8i143oZNikm7KkfZ0fje8XGTveF4zd2OMJ1HLFwJUCmuP6b5zthoRDncIkPiWPHlfzcCaSX-jowjUMX93i8QDJSJQuavGHMAaAic8qAGAKDuX1FbquGI_xi8QO1lO5yNY7e_RlfukgpsNTjNZvWGOvITXJDMiBA05OtDNljS4vk5Y5cC5THSpVkSo%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**
---
| | [**PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dfd291633f6d4be8920b6ceaf39f4d02&_e=A8OzWpgBh9YiglnOTlPVHAfem010PhEbpiHlwv9orP0X3A5WfkxXkJqJF5ISWXRFXqCWBgEv6IJc4teVdJXqB326gNmCnRiqse9g9V6eAFThtTuXsA-VIJ-J_aH3_BlXk2VZjkCXn_jKo3djPH70KPDR1jzWTY6sh6BPn0-yBMjO7aUCNhiHtqWuFf7DrRTxdBxgsLw-PzVpbM0-qHqByj9yDt8MYuCpy6GXqHxFnAAYMJpYap8i143oZNikm7KkfZ0fje8XGTveF4zd2OMJ1HEB9S_bI5j847B8BQ0qDtDQgbhgLY5MHdiLa9HNDNEarwhZvFIi_KfwUgc_C5mr_9VwVInZE2nVzc485hE1MPwByI4mm5rWDLvBYW_qkPREWJAZadEChugE1nmDdpEorqR3G29V0X0hcXinbdFNWRw%3D)
---
My platform is simple:
1. **Tell folks the truth** - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak
2. **Support Trump 100%** - he will have no better partner at the state level
3. **Overhaul failing schools** - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers
4. **Restore national identity** - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood
5. **Deport every illegal alien** - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office
6. **Roll back transgenderism** - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors
7. **Slash taxes and lower prices** - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it
8. **Gut all DEI programs in the state** - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda
9. **Secure elections and prosecute fraud** - our elections will be the safest in the country
10. **Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy** - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat

I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running.

I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio.

**[If you agree, I'd be honored to have you aboard.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dfd291633f6d4be8920b6ceaf39f4d02&_e=A8OzWpgBh9YiglnOTlPVHAfem010PhEbpiHlwv9orP0X3A5WfkxXkJqJF5ISWXRFXqCWBgEv6IJc4teVdJXqB326gNmCnRiqse9g9V6eAFThtTuXsA-VIJ-J_aH3_BlXk2VZjkCXn_jKo3djPH70KPDR1jzWTY6sh6BPn0-yBMjO7aUCNhiHtqWuFf7DrRTxdBxgsLw-PzVpbM0-qHqByj9yDt8MYuCpy6GXqHxFnAAYMJpYap8i143oZNikm7KkfZ0fje8XGTveF4zd2OMJ1Ehh0C7fUitny3upPspWe0S5WYMAw8MEwoe1sO4I0gETAxcEVzzhB4Ew-EXn-_M7fJMjOcE26K735oE1r4Q3s50DPCzhKVHF9OPhwV57-ipHBHvZVHoImWfSIoXYt-R9RA89zKLpxrlZo0qJfQ0rnLQ%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

So here's my final pitch to you:

The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state." On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too.

Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot.

**But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win.** **[So with all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dfd291633f6d4be8920b6ceaf39f4d02&_e=A8OzWpgBh9YiglnOTlPVHAfem010PhEbpiHlwv9orP0X3A5WfkxXkJqJF5ISWXRFXqCWBgEv6IJc4teVdJXqB326gNmCnRiqse9g9V6eAFThtTuXsA-VIJ-J_aH3_BlXk2VZjkCXn_jKo3djPH70KPDR1jzWTY6sh6BPn0-yBMjO7aUCNhiHtqWuFf7DrRTxdBxgsLw-PzVpbM0-qHqByj9yDt8MYuCpy6GXqHxFnAAYMJpYap8i143oZNikm7KkfZ0fje8XGTveF4zd2OMJ1IM61Euzzfc8m7Xk2QMRWcxrOE7WU-Nrvz7xRvFep5yaX3-NPPxHqp4SYuI3NzquGlw78h7HMK-TduO2tma7ch2KpzEdFL3rGb4fBwEWe3r8eLaeu-ZS2y4HnJTgnVANW6X3oyk4jhpzF77JOfOT-wE%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

clean_body: I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter – with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine – at the helm in battleground Ohio. I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy. It's official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." | | My platform is simple: 1. Tell folks the truth - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak 2. Support Trump 100% - he will have no better partner at the state level 3. Overhaul failing schools - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers 4. Restore national identity - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood 5. Deport every illegal alien - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office 6. Roll back transgenderism - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors 7. Slash taxes and lower prices - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it 8. Gut all DEI programs in the state - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda 9. Secure elections and prosecute fraud - our elections will be the safest in the country 10. Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running. I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." So here's my final pitch to you: The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state." On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too. Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot. But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." Whether it's $4, $40, or $400 - whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in. So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? | | | | | | | | Regardless, thanks for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans in Congress. I hope you'll consider joining my campaign today so we can win Ohio and help save America. Together, we'll make history! God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39476%2E3422442%2EhWbB9a)
Hey Derek,
We just wanted to send a quick note of gratitude for all the folks who donated to Truth to Power recently. **Thanks to more than 5,000 people who chipped in last month, we met our February fundraising goal!**
Many of the candidates we’ll eventually support in key swing seats have not announced their campaigns yet, but having early resources to support them is critical. Thanks for being part of our movement to stand up to Trump and flip the House in 2026.
–Team TTP
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250301?refcode=em20250301-39476&refcode2=39476_3422442_hWbB9a&akid=39476%2E3422442%2EhWbB9a)

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250301-39476&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39476_3422442_hWbB9a&akid=39476%2E3422442%2EhWbB9a)**

subject: 🎉we did it!🎉

body:
# [#] Team, we did it!

I just got off the phone with Daniel, my finance director, and he told me we met our February end-of-month goal!

Meeting this goal means we can invest in the resources we need to put ads on the air, talk to voters, and more before primary day in just a few months.

Together, we will continue the fight for lower taxes, lower costs, and protect our Jersey Values as your next Governor. We can make New Jersey a place where everyone can afford to live, work, and raise a family.

Your support truly means the world.

Yours,

Josh

P.S. The end of the quarter is just weeks away, which means we can’t slow down. If you’re able, can you chip in $ to help us have a strong showing when our numbers go public? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Happy Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
On the first day of Women’s History Month, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on two of the women who helped pave the path for me to be here today.
I have been beyond fortunate to count Senator Barbara Mikulski as a personal friend and mentor to me ever since my first State Senate run back in 2018. As I begin my time in the House, I’m truly lucky to have her in my corner -- gaining her wisdom with every lunch date -- as I lean on her sage words of advice.
[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXd_IlhV8nv724Q4Oy0ukYDyca6gnYC_OehMogzmi4pHzTL3H-UTgRuEe4iq0hmzyoHBcqfE4khk26MrH3YH6490-1kHu1lw6Ho6mDltPChWVAagyT_CPzMNB-d9qiCY5sM7kjhcUA?key=hptc8QHa_ZPa7OfcAyEKyuvH]
Congresswoman Beverly Byron was another steadfast leader for Maryland who we sadly lost earlier this year. She was a fierce advocate for Maryland, servicemembers, and military families while serving on the House Armed Services Committee and the Naval Academy’s Board of Visitors. I look forward to following in her footsteps.
Being just one of 396 women to ever serve in the U.S. House of Representatives is an honor that I take a moment to reflect on daily. But I know full well that my path was paved by strong, passionate, and compassionate leaders like Senator Mikulski and Congresswoman Byron. And I know my obligation to hold the door open for others throughout this work. Because when women are in office, we get things done. Just like the women who have come before me, I’m committed to supporting Democratic women up and down the ballot.
Will you work with me to pave the way? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-03-01]
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-03-01&amount=5.00]

Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b55df36058084b4faf2d02e82130cf69&_e=Z-PMmrTZ1yxPpYtuGS6X2EGrlSRaxBNiq2D9RHjr6lvLHrdUk_a0e82KvJp0yJfp7HgzCChA1AzE6D_tbDi4chROkoLU0MGjK4ce9ntJH7L8IFK3El-RX-y7hpx0jRs_eBPMv4gLGhiZLqoVcKKdIAo1FlP99JG-hWyyph1hdnKgubvc9zKntBD62reynbJJ5bbfGqPcydcR5tVql2v6YjUA9c7SeLmtR7eyeDpMvynQAwHue_g2fuMxAYK4DL-KUuvZPAjbqv13n2SM5WpshE3QSMI6jiyZwg-n52tqfL1yeCA6t7jr_twJHWGR8-dG)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b55df36058084b4faf2d02e82130cf69&_e=Z-PMmrTZ1yxPpYtuGS6X2EGrlSRaxBNiq2D9RHjr6lvLHrdUk_a0e82KvJp0yJfp7HgzCChA1AzE6D_tbDi4chROkoLU0MGjK4ce9ntJH7L8IFK3El-RX-y7hpx0jRs_eBPMv4gLGhiZLqoVcKKdIAo1FlP99JG-hWyyph1hdnKsiL8XDH3bs-jAhg3ZQ2MuNaq7DIR6LJ8jGjoyCtEK_s1ydP3F1NYiJ9Dfz6jzn5872CjwsmTCcoITEvOyZOYLt9cIzqskAzlLApb9CMWUABe9K6-lzbNRL74wjjS10M0_8mCNX3hoL6sC4FMxUnOP)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b55df36058084b4faf2d02e82130cf69&_e=Z-PMmrTZ1yxPpYtuGS6X2EGrlSRaxBNiq2D9RHjr6lvLHrdUk_a0e82KvJp0yJfp7HgzCChA1AzE6D_tbDi4chROkoLU0MGjK4ce9ntJH7L8IFK3El-RX-y7hpx0jRs_eBPMv4gLGhiZLqoVcKKdIAo1FlP99JG-hWyyph1hdnJEIMPeqAgzTAWR0cDablEs9uGOTt1NNdVmTV6Jw6c4hs1idGjHyDVKtVYif3arBUhkhCO6kZA7yFZuN7zDrlWImyp8Krmc0StC1RbgjAq9n7lAIZpFGOieCb1O4oYItlXJwy54vajc11WVbLtPJ8S2)**_

Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b55df36058084b4faf2d02e82130cf69&_e=Z-PMmrTZ1yxPpYtuGS6X2EGrlSRaxBNiq2D9RHjr6lvLHrdUk_a0e82KvJp0yJfp7HgzCChA1AzE6D_tbDi4chROkoLU0MGjK4ce9ntJH7L8IFK3El-RX-y7hpx0jRs_eBPMv4gLGhiZLqoVcKKdIAo1FlP99JG-hWyyph1hdnIX0x9XRvJGWPdvxzxyp7rFroVeITwZ0N8innABFNvV6Ivps9AOuR1juXeWcLPXdXpf62nsbPEj-2yDm80LPIS4X0UrIs6y2_gTKdyyM5YClRJbjmJLSX3Bgz5zQYJz1h_NtDo-j8Na7-aJJFEVqHUC)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. Peter, It’s the Illinois and Indiana state Democratic parties. Even as families in both our states struggle with the cost of living and rising prices, Indiana’s Republican-dominated legislature is moving forward with a bill to try and “annex” over 30 counties in Illinois. _**Sounds crazy, but it’s true.**_ **Put simply, this is a waste of time, resources, and an insult to Hoosiers who expect their lawmakers to work on issues that actually matter to them. It’s the definition of putting Hoosiers last.** Thousands of Illinois residents would instantly be in danger of losing their healthcare coverage and nutrition benefits if they became part of Indiana. And Hoosiers would be on the hook for millions more in taxpayer subsidies. _**It’s a make believe proposal that benefits no one. **_ **[That’s why we’re asking: would you split a donation today name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Did you miss my message?
body:
I didn’t see your response to my question below, and I wanted to make sure your answer was recorded. |
---
Fellow American,

**Did you miss my message?**

I didn’t see your response to my question below, and I wanted to make sure your answer was recorded. Please take a moment to look over my message and submit your response -- _it’s an important one!_

Thanks!

- Lindsey Graham

* * *
**From:** Lindsey Graham
**Date:** February 7, 2025
**Subject:** It’s time to act.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=afb26a5c56df4b19bb8006c37a53ee7f&_e=TMgUfY57gkQZBSAMfjOlQzAKuYcQZfYHNcjIcjK6awr1Iqul7LCa5s7igewMAZQ9treRA6KFCRwPMldRYsz3V2zVNlIQwyxmq63clIciR9XNhWJrN5oIV6P1B4hr2tCh2eXXdRNHYfKKyH7tWweOyAcZYY5ZMjIrEAG5CiPUXlCzpybnah5VNMq3LLrcU22Tt7BCcbXRDatm-_eCsI4AKB1GldFKgOjC8hnnLHUwlGG9gsrveqFgBM9uTlhIvs0PiVMwp4UFkhheeAV7j4__CbMht0vSzlbTn0a8iyYDL8ocjVTae5JabZZ_oGz04ZMCJmuPKCur0oOxq4LC2_b4IuADJjW24uPCsA8eZbOpPoIgZM9yAxPVVp_M2Kppkg3TC_NO61QWVB_zsWfQY6aQmA%3D%3D)
Fellow American, if you believe that Republicans should fulfill their promises on border security and mass deportation of criminal illegal aliens: _**I agree.**_

With President Trump in the White House, Tom Homan as the new Border Czar, and a Republican-led Senate, we have the ability to secure our nation and protect people.

_**The time to act is NOW.**_

**As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I will ensure Tom Homan has the money he needs to finish the wall, hire ICE agents to deport criminal illegal immigrants, and create more detention beds so that we do not release more dangerous people into the country — NOW!**

| [** DO YOU AGREE? **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=afb26a5c56df4b19bb8006c37a53ee7f&_e=TMgUfY57gkQZBSAMfjOlQzAKuYcQZfYHNcjIcjK6awr1Iqul7LCa5s7igewMAZQ9treRA6KFCRwPMldRYsz3V2zVNlIQwyxmq63clIciR9XNhWJrN5oIV6P1B4hr2tCh2eXXdRNHYfKKyH7tWweOyAcZYY5ZMjIrEAG5CiPUXlCzpybnah5VNMq3LLrcU22Tt7BCcbXRDatm-_eCsI4AKB1GldFKgOjC8hnnLHUwlGG9gsrveqFgBM9uTlhIvs0PujfhiFlNawLwoH0K4WRIvURrKfFqtbhFNryz0vxxgK9golmbsNOiMk3aHYN-sQBegIx3sKqVGuy_UcRHnE8rwj9-e0JYxLSN0DKHkmONbfpzuFnwm_8pFlwR70VYgOyLHj8jcS4HIPh3eKDH4nnYsw%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American, we will create the most transformational border security bill in the history of our country.

_**There is no time to waste; it’s time to take action.**_

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

clean_body: I didn’t see your response to my question below, and I wanted to make sure your answer was recorded. | Fellow American, Did you miss my message? I didn’t see your response to my question below, and I wanted to make sure your answer was recorded. Please take a moment to look over my message and submit your response -- it’s an important one! Thanks! - Lindsey Graham From: Lindsey Graham Date: February 7, 2025 Subject: It’s time to act. Fellow American, if you believe that Republicans should fulfill their promises on border security and mass deportation of criminal illegal aliens: I agree. With President Trump in the White House, Tom Homan as the new Border Czar, and a Republican-led Senate, we have the ability to secure our nation and protect people. The time to act is NOW. As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I will ensure Tom Homan has the money he needs to finish the wall, hire ICE agents to deport criminal illegal immigrants, and create more detention beds so that we do not release more dangerous people into the country — NOW! | Fellow American, we will create the most transformational border security bill in the history of our country. There is no time to waste; it’s time to take action.** Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. | | Here’s the truth, Peter: Donald Trump is trying to set up an imperial presidency where the executive branch can bypass Congress and the courts and have full control over our government. Look at unelected billionaire Elon Musk — Trump’s “special employee” who has been given the power to dismantle and undermine our government. Trump and Elon have cut several critical federal programs that hardworking Americans rely on, and they’ve put a freeze on hiring in the federal government — **and House Republicans are falling right in line with them.** Just this week, nearly every House Republican voted to move forward a budget bill that will rip healthcare away from millions of Americans — all to pay for tax breaks for billionaires like Musk. My office has received thousands of calls from people affected by Trump and Elon’s reckless decisions. That’s why I’m fighting in Congress to stand up to the Trump administration, protect our democracy, and defend hardworking Oregonians. **[But I can’t do it alone. I’m counting on you to chip in a few dollars to fuel my fight against the Trump administration. So what do you say, Peter? subject: 📢 An attack on immigrants is an attack on all of us! Demand your state take action:
body:
Now more than ever, state officials must look out for us. | | | Peter, In Virginia and all across the country, immigrants make our communities feel like home. 🧡 It’s no joke that Trump is doing all in his power to target and terrorize immigrants, even directing ICE to raid our schools, hospitals, and places of worship. **Now more than ever, our state leaders must look out for us.** In only a month, Trump has dismantled countless protections our communities fought hard for and has put a target on immigrants’ backs. **With Trump threatening to tear our communities and families apart, it’s time for state leaders to take bold steps to protect immigrants and fight back against his extremism.** ****Peter, can you take action to demand your state implement policies to protect immigrants? **[✍️ Send a Letter Today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0irzYDkzBsH24mvI0xVUztk0ciDYQmsw0kxqguDnkcAcVxuJQ4eUOzSioIYmip55cYv2BhMe-7gNT_Ev62ylmxSIBQulhX-X9nFbZlOYY9QMC9lQl-RHJG4ck3XSdkACbjmdx6jiCQq0dKvw3oQ86GpSWiZuBokyWJt-vW9sSTs3KPNRvfIMW_aNq__2sQm0iSvePHi4aJJ8-fmMzUaz1CTJ-Sv-kH3GOWfJlv8ESaToU34vfbZPl7FMDtxykmxrrNA9xjoPvXNXWmPbKAzdQCmse4-xv7WA7zoSTAEk0uh23tw_ph2IIcWeazxB1sa542lw/4ef/Rf9GkCC2SF-CKGURzSDflA/h0/h001.SdIOCb1VrnUgCruvcHUEVpyXdSC9Z3WH6ECbRVE7PCg)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0irzYDkzBsH24mvI0xVUztk0ciDYQmsw0kxqguDnkcAcVxuJQ4eUOzSioIYmip55cYv2BhMe-7gNT_Ev62ylmxSICCq6qTnLDsVg7yIi5UQCJMCabcO0f763WN1rWcRAT8XY8Y1vwjhnAncZhwDd6IF3oQk2Nm4gdjbCf-vJn6LadYXLiTmdVJPtSWvOuYj045kiDisv5xg19BRiFxX4YLvnLMrOeTSITQjnUW3f7WqRETe_vU8btoEKeWLolxIbxN1oeIMS-wEJSqVhriTqtUH0M6NB3-VQr7nWWTRQ7mIvmOG167XW5CRcaaddeeHxzO-A/4ef/Rf9GkCC2SF-CKGURzSDflA/h1/h001.p6qfAmTkepGA2nEquu0XtdZt_NYCzv1w9zJ0K4A2PFY)
Immigrants should be able to feel safe driving to school or while working to provide for their families — our state leaders can serve as a first line of defense against Trump’s attempts to uproot our communities by passing policies that:
* ⛔ Prohibit local law enforcement from collaborating with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents.
* ⚖️ Ensure universal access to legal representation for people facing detention and deportation
* 🚫 Bar ICE presence from courthouses, allowing immigrants to access courthouses without the fear of arrest and deportation looming overhead.
* 🚙 Expand access to valid forms of IDs to protect immigrants who must drive to school, work, or the doctor.

**An attack on immigrants is an attack on all of us.** From the teachers who educate our children to our neighbors next door, immigrants are the backbone of our communities. It’ll be working-class communities, like ours in Virginia, who will bear the consequences of mass abductions and deportations — not Trump and his billionaire allies. Can you join me in taking action? [**Send a letter to your state leaders today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SLdqY4re9NRChJwFnQ0irzYDkzBsH24mvI0xVUztk0ciDYQmsw0kxqguDnkcAcVxuJQ4eUOzSioIYmip55cYv2BhMe-7gNT_Ev62ylmxSIC-gwZoOHZ-8tdznqCH4V_BybBXdLJ69SYfqNbgB7FQEvNDrArYwkkd3YLegUoh5SoRULDSwTuE1rAKos1oD2GoFTFcRuzIX4jEF60JuBNCYi2nN1K1EcZvSgvsci3au3rmD6RJ-SNV7iulq66ytpta5hVFY7fJ1Q1eF5Tpr7bA89n3essApPYMHAuSjGX7tXkE86Sy5dcJUFCEeERBFywpqQbd33IVU8wC0T3b4a8ENg/4ef/Rf9GkCC2SF-CKGURzSDflA/h2/h001.rUjv8E2vnlICpb9qqr11YXPSkB-noZxnksGabvUXXPE)**** ✊ In unity, Juanjo and the rest of the United We Dream Team

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to stop Medicaid cuts and end medical debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
In addition to stopping Republicans’ cuts to healthcare, we need to transform our broken system. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWvD99O_7A35PfMlVW_9V2tBv3PWtD_4Ufc3xipbuheIfUxxHLdvkRmwK52Ih4zWUU-93F30_aT_4VXaUlYYruMqmqah7h0O_nUW6UyyyT-YV24FHtGIDZ98JY_nlqcXx6jRYIfeON0IMjPby6yE3k-FYk_0_ieX18VuKRQbrpzs1dhg_ulX4ublrjQeLVHx51ssyxaJ1cj6a5u2VlP_iTew/4ef/U1qX-lK6Qcal4LU6IAL7AA/h0/h001.PXxzuwDjXGYOiyoO1TJ024wdNWV_mK7oNk1atHmKpVo)
---
Friend, This week, I voted NO on House Republicans’ budget, which would make massive cuts to programs that millions of lower-income and disabled Americans depend on every day—including $880 billion in cuts to Medicaid and threats to the _Affordable Care Act_. **As negotiations continue in the House and Senate, right now is the time to keep pushing back against planned cuts to healthcare.** Some Republicans in Congress and the presidential administration have signaled that they may be susceptible to pressure from the public in support of Medicaid. 2.6 million Michiganders benefit from Medicaid coverage. If these attempts go forward, 36,000 residents of my Congressional district who receive coverage under the _Affordable Care Act_ would see increases in their insurance premium payments. In my district alone, nearly 260,000 people who are on Medicaid and CHIP (Children’s Health Insurance Program) would be at risk of losing their healthcare—including 100,000 children under 19 years old and 22,000 seniors over 65 years old. **I’m working alongside organizations to stop these proposed cuts, and to defend the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s plan to change the lives of 15 million Americans by removing $50 billion in medical debt from their credit reports.** After passing policies to address medical debt, I worked with the CFPB to secure this much-needed relief, which was set to happen this month. Now we must protect this victory: Republican members of Congress are trying to overturn it, and the Trump administration is trying to dismantle the CFPB altogether. [**Will you join me in demanding the leaders of our federal government stop cuts to healthcare and keep medical debt off credit reports?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNXj6TSp3tt3JWrwkBDn-fDobSwdI9luObEN0xnkQMl89_bOQV1sJ07Ec6U6zt36_PJccr__edfAdn75wmzROeXwVURx9qkm-B04BvOUV7kPtKIAu8kuwwIGmyCafwYLZEbECqbm41S3-Uk0EzmLklcHu6-_y2keLsxzNkhDzHY6PhGfv5RQHbiE_UWPhOk2PuuE2qypODq6WdAHPKFGEZ9JWjyvizH4XNGNyRozWqtM7sOFh7eiovgFqoRUGCJt2oOEYnkm0_Iqn2SaSyQ-KnxM/4ef/U1qX-lK6Qcal4LU6IAL7AA/h1/h001.bjQj2JktXe-x_Yp0-bgFPYTCox9SRApykNAnpet5fAs) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNQBXpStbzKBdVEPODZHB8Y-xdDIDWFQmapBOZ-X7D1_gn3Qb9brOOgODzs__0zAb1w9SHgvIALyw9p4VuTu0PLofMvm7M7Gi55Y7BglUpRfkdhlvmi1ESjeMO7xNhe2Pt9BA_oBzBuv-aKMY4RehYCRSvEvHeY0anuJ-t1bGT9I0XQhkiPgrTE0amQo7ML0_Nzt6dHgGRIRA4TKQzmNlHywvOOueewweJRUIyACXqzLaM6ZP6_3sSeljYDpMJtHon69raLO0N3k7e_kL_iwqj6U/4ef/U1qX-lK6Qcal4LU6IAL7AA/h2/h001.s5Yt4AOoZIxb0r6xqXzUdVCcDV4RdvpnhL6K2s_doTY)
---
**No one chooses to get sick, and getting sick should never haunt someone financially. But 90% of****bankruptcies are due to extreme medical debt** , and thousands of Americans die each year just because they can’t afford healthcare—including people who have health insurance.
Nearly 1 in 5 U.S. adults have medical debt on their credit reports, which means they may be denied housing, employment, transportation, or other necessities because of a sudden health crisis or visit to the emergency room. In addition to pushing to ban medical debt from credit reports, I’ve also co-led legislation to go further and cancel all medical debt.
**Healthcare is a human right—not a commodity. That’s why I’m advocating for Medicare for All** , including within the Congressional Medicare for All Caucus.
Instead of letting corporations profit off our pain, the U.S. government must end medical debt and ensure universal healthcare for all. We have the money to do this. This money could come from the Pentagon budget, which takes nearly $1 trillion of our tax dollars each year, even though the Pentagon has failed to pass audits for 7 years in a row.
[**Please sign if you agree: Our federal government must stop cuts to healthcare, but we can’t end there. Federal leaders must also transform our healthcare system so everyone can get the care they need—by ending medical debt and ensuring universal healthcare.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNdzU308qgbKdId_Bo7ylO1Gea3v08h6i617NqmGkci3tm0Xkvb6e8LVuOTeH7vb4Fpo8LYZhqSgT0IqhDUO-UKn8IfEbl9R20CZdB-OkUgZ_zeED00H8-Vorc8k7m8S44_zyk-gA5JJ32DgJCc-Q3YOn5Cjmbl5i0rezDPDkZcUsj9ZHCcqXQ2ud_fR793z0Bt4X3DfTM2KTetFQ3zZD2et2dFFqMwT46mbJBo-b3I7dIaz3GbOXmqkYqlyWsnowkdA2XI9-gnsdY9Eac0MpnwQ/4ef/U1qX-lK6Qcal4LU6IAL7AA/h3/h001.7SghxTZGI37Zkcn8P9aIq9Y_xSZ0l6w_xPxFJLCEcKw)
Thank you for demanding the government we all deserve.
In response to the massive public outcry against attacks on essential services and programs, some Republicans and members of the Trump administration have walked back their harmful plans. So we must keep pushing—not only _against_ attacks, but also _for_ the world we need.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: In addition to stopping Republicans’ cuts to healthcare, we need to transform our broken system. | | | Friend, This week, I voted NO on House Republicans’ budget, which would make massive cuts to programs that millions of lower-income and disabled Americans depend on every day—including $880 billion in cuts to Medicaid and threats to the Affordable Care Act. As negotiations continue in the House and Senate, right now is the time to keep pushing back against planned cuts to healthcare. Some Republicans in Congress and the presidential administration have signaled that they may be susceptible to pressure from the public in support of Medicaid. 2.6 million Michiganders benefit from Medicaid coverage. If these attempts go forward, 36,000 residents of my Congressional district who receive coverage under the Affordable Care Act would see increases in their insurance premium payments. In my district alone, nearly 260,000 people who are on Medicaid and CHIP (Children’s Health Insurance Program) would be at risk of losing their healthcare—including 100,000 children under 19 years old and 22,000 seniors over 65 years old. I’m working alongside organizations to stop these proposed cuts, and to defend the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s plan to change the lives of 15 million Americans by removing $50 billion in medical debt from their credit reports. After passing policies to address medical debt, I worked with the CFPB to secure this much-needed relief, which was set to happen this month. Now we must protect this victory: Republican members of Congress are trying to overturn it, and the Trump administration is trying to dismantle the CFPB altogether. | No one chooses to get sick, and getting sick should never haunt someone financially. But 90% ofbankruptcies are due to extreme medical debt , and thousands of Americans die each year just because they can’t afford healthcare—including people who have health insurance. Nearly 1 in 5 U.S. adults have medical debt on their credit reports, which means they may be denied housing, employment, transportation, or other necessities because of a sudden health crisis or visit to the emergency room. In addition to pushing to ban medical debt from credit reports, I’ve also co-led legislation to go further and cancel all medical debt. Healthcare is a human right—not a commodity. That’s why I’m advocating for Medicare for All , including within the Congressional Medicare for All Caucus. Instead of letting corporations profit off our pain, the U.S. government must end medical debt and ensure universal healthcare for all. We have the money to do this. This money could come from the Pentagon budget, which takes nearly $1 trillion of our tax dollars each year, even though the Pentagon has failed to pass audits for 7 years in a row. Thank you for demanding the government we all deserve. In response to the massive public outcry against attacks on essential services and programs, some Republicans and members of the Trump administration have walked back their harmful plans. So we must keep pushing—not only against attacks, but also for the world we need. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Mark Meckler
subject: Mitch McConnell does NOT want us to do this…
body:
Urgent Update
URGENT: Members of Congress have leveraged their influence to prevent Convention of States from succeeding in calling an Article V convention.
| | | |
---
| | | [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c1f549673a82483e8f5ec029c430ad3c&_e=s5VgOE4ggkcz0F5F6YlEALxpAL-mCMygr2_kKp0ItHt3LYNY5VotMR4d1n-gOzn91TnQQa_jjOxBivWOMyBnfJTlGV2tWOJP--mmyNK6XO4nm8PW2i6laIJepf74U4RI8oEGy3RGr2kwfiAGWrl8fld1ZWF2Rxn86ydQcwi65O2fjK5fgL_YjrbEf52ZLNT-aRKoPC4JRAJGmvA5hENaSnJwTnrU_sbJKNqr4gBuP2kq8rdlG2OcApYzxZ1Q5cUX-KnD6OL5FEi-gM7e00QElTZc3ZPMzxp6hxZ_ID0EoTc%3D)
---
| | | Peter,

**URGENT: Members of Congress have leveraged their influence to prevent Convention of States from succeeding in calling an Article V convention.**

It makes sense. For decades, they have benefited from the lack of restraints on our federal government –– and after we succeed in calling the Convention, We The People will be able to...

++ Get the federal government out of our healthcare system.
++ Impose term limits on Congress.
++ Balance the budget.
++ Take back our education systems.
++ Limit federal power.

That’s why corrupt members of Congress are fighting tooth and nail to stop us in our tracks, joining with ultra-progressives like George Soros to combat our efforts to call a convention.

_Even Mitch McConnell fought to stop his own home state of Kentucky from passing the Convention of States Resolution when he was in power._

But what these corrupt politicians don’t know is that Convention of States is backed by the biggest grassroots movement this nation has ever seen. Americans from every corner of the nation are paying attention to what’s happening in Congress, are strong supporters of COS, and will hold their representatives accountable.

**In fact, polling in Pennsylvania found that _69% of Republicans, 70% of Democrats, and 77% of Independents would cross party lines to vote for a candidate who supports COS_!**

We know that career politicians in D.C. will never permanently limit their own power. Thankfully, Article V gives We the People the authority to call a convention where the states can propose amendments that force the feds back inside their constitutional box.

_It takes only 34 states to call a convention, and we’re already more than halfway there_ – and as we’re in the midst of legislative season, we have a unique opportunity to make serious progress in the coming months.

But as a non-profit, we can’t do it alone.

[Will you consider chipping in $25 today to help us sprint across the finish line and call the nation’s first Article V convention to place much-needed constitutional restraints on Congress?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c1f549673a82483e8f5ec029c430ad3c&_e=s5VgOE4ggkcz0F5F6YlEALxpAL-mCMygr2_kKp0ItHt3LYNY5VotMR4d1n-gOzn91TnQQa_jjOxBivWOMyBnfJTlGV2tWOJP--mmyNK6XO4nm8PW2i6laIJepf74U4RI8oEGy3RGr2kwfiAGWrl8fraUEVGYGCRKHK5RheKdZTeyxqfjHFGgBNJfqq_AZZmP4mTpZx8FMA4gC7qfVRDMXID1x_Vicvsuj1PKk35eT-XkHT4hgrSFmHgwC_rcr_K3D4tJiUSSQgN1BTpbiz7aglwJlm4XuaegF7uhMA65FSc%3D)

We’re a budget-conscientious organization, and every dollar goes a long way. Give before midnight tonight and every dollar will be matched — up to $100,000!
---
| [DOUBLE MY IMPACT](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c1f549673a82483e8f5ec029c430ad3c&_e=s5VgOE4ggkcz0F5F6YlEALxpAL-mCMygr2_kKp0ItHt3LYNY5VotMR4d1n-gOzn91TnQQa_jjOxBivWOMyBnfJTlGV2tWOJP--mmyNK6XO4nm8PW2i6laIJepf74U4RI8oEGy3RGr2kwfiAGWrl8foARt-kUDogMzNJGig39BawFtMm5vjBErpVg0jjnGvysFEYgcwhZ7IRq-BfpzhTS2ikhr07H7IczHIeRDm-_ifXLfUzXx3lZfgeIOuthpqgj7HRyRbSthTCRCWzX_pNFQBAyZYEv7Lrojs_CaT33Gf0%3D "DOUBLE MY IMPACT")

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: 1 mission, 10,000+ students
body:
Join me in inspiring thousands of students to love America again on campuses nationwide.

\- Join me in inspiring thousands of students to love America again on campuses nationwide. - I’m crisscrossing America for Turning Point USA’s AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR. - Thousands of young people have told me they never before heard a POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA message — until I spoke at their school.
| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, There’s never been ANYTHING like this.
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, I’m crisscrossing America for Turning Point USA’s AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR — and I can’t wait to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again through these special events. **[Can I count on your support of $25, $50, $100, or even more to make Turning Point USA’s AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR the BIGGEST and MOST EXCITING patriotic campus outreach EVER?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ **Yes, Charlie — I support Turning Point USA!**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
My previous campus tour shattered every record in Turning Point USA’s history and inspired MILLIONS MORE young people to believe in AMERICAN GREATNESS again in 2024. Now you and I can do EVEN MORE with this ONCE-IN-A-GENERATION chance to WIN BACK Gen Z from the lies of the Left and restore FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM in our country again. **[**Your support today will help me bring the AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR to EVEN MORE campuses ... reach 10,000+ young people IN PERSON ... and impact MILLIONS MORE students through our powerful online content.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, Turning Point USA’s campus tours make a HUGE IMPACT with young people ... _because they aren’t like any other events._ I take questions directly from ALL students, friendly or foe, and I EXPOSE the Left’s anti-American lies and explain why America is instead the GREATEST country in the history of the world. **[Will you give $25, $50, $100, or more today to help me reach 10,000+ students in person and MILLIONS MORE online with Turning Point USA’s game-changing AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ **Yes, Charlie — I support Turning Point USA!**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Please let me explain why these campus events are so powerful — and so game-changing.After each event I do on campus, I hear from many young people who tell me that they’ve never heard these ideas before. But when they discover the TRUTH about AMERICAN GREATNESS — and the TRUTH about FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM — their lives, and our country’s future, change for good. **[Please make your most generous gift RIGHT NOW to help make America’s young people the MOST CONSERVATIVE and the MOST PATRIOTIC youth generation ever through Turning Point USA’s AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a56E/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

For America, Charlie Kirk

Turning Point USA

name: Quentin Wathum-Ocama, Young Democrats of America  via yda.org
subject: Elevating Equity: YDA’s D&O Toolkit
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGRA_J6jtCqYTGf9TBARmggSPVbT9acGv-q3fuGkH5fpWKqqPlmD81G2Ja6cSXR_GQGr7irGGwY2TUsaA4tbOwnS_oVl-SCOjaRBBb7gBAOG9Z_D2-VrUhbjSbtGz2uvmTKXFvDLwhRYcRs4h08kxXVYgGrw3kz3sx7SoLieLEyYAUkFDeeddA_APoTWcuwRL0wMKWTgXGtgXv9qJk1T1OpOMz0YKKibndmVsvEWi-IxMnv97_MkyPe1YLdauQ6V3pvBDBRhDtwJc3_uHKYkVq5eqa8kaeHpccsz9m3c5QIe30QggMdM0_UJQshiDr-oAthYKYZHmtEeSJZCLOAsxo/4ef/rnxnPfVpRBuARtKKzlOwUw/h0/h001.q2Y0nwtr37Z-jFnQrXwFlLcnToXubqkvwuDY5bq6j4o)

---
Dear Derek

I’m excited to share the**Young****Democrats of America****Diversity & Outreach Committee’s Toolkit**—a powerful resource dedicated to making our organization a more inclusive, equitable, and accessible space for all members.

_A huge shoutout to RaeVen Ridgell, our incredible Chairwoman of Diversity & Outreach, for her leadership in putting this togethe_r. This toolkit provides guidance, strategies, and resources to help us strengthen our movement and ensure every Young Democrat has a voice in our work.

name: Heritage Membership Team
subject: Don’t lose your benefits
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9crm3p1sv9ma1zzuleb9enuma00o09ltg7axt31bbx6xry9kahapaoe6bit4bx0ugxfdayw3wb4vlyspo&__stmp=ssgl9l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssgl9l&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6df31t9lqkk79ts7tzn9507840f7zqx0f1jzss87vjjtql4ntibrqdg9t93s5q3bryv51p28xijcnlxxf3fdgshxtma9xnv2r9rcv7u89havzls3ve6b3l5o14j19atwoc741j2x5ltdji6rsc5bb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssgl9l&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssgl9l&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssgl9l&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssgl9l&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6df31t9lqkk79ts7tzn950784msm3yokzfggi5qx74m39fr1ryj2wkpblryvggb4tus7ppxaslxwznbnzikhc3th7lx2w8tpr66xq208i84x6mpecg3ecy4kmfgn75n3j2sfqbv85gvtzphudzg53&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssgl9l&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssgl9l&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Stop Musk via Our Revolution
subject: Social Security is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1011?refcode=email-030125_v&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Nothing is safe from Elon Musk.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1061&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ][IMG]

As Musk sprints to slash our social safety net, he’s managed to FORCE his
way into the Social Security Administration, moving at breakneck speed to
make cuts.

He’s already eliminated essential jobs and closed local offices, but he’s
not stopping there. Now he’s busy spreading lies about ‘fraud’ in order to
confuse the public, trying to burrow into the system to seize our
sensitive personal data.

We CANNOT let him get away with it. Our Citizen Action Team is fighting
back with everything we have to protect Social Security from Musk — and we
need our entire movement behind us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Right now, we’re organizing folks on the ground in Washington DC and
congressional districts across the country — training and mobilizing a
rapid response team to pressure lawmakers to stand up to Trump and Musk
and save Social Security. Will you chip in to fuel this vital work?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

It’s straight out of an authoritarian playbook. Trump and Musk are trying
to scare us by saying – with ZERO evidence – that the Social Security
Administration is infested by widespread fraud. Then they’ll use those
lies to justify slashing vital services that millions rely on to survive.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1060&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ][IMG]

Why? All so they can save money and push through MASSIVE new tax breaks
for billionaires and corporations.

The scary truth is that thanks to Musk, cuts are already happening. By
closing local Social Security offices, thousands will suddenly be cut off
from the benefits they’ve earned. Many Social Security recipients rely on
in-person service – 119,000 people have to visit Social Security offices
every single day! And often, it's the most vulnerable folks who don’t have
access to a computer or need help navigating the system.

One thing is for sure – we’re quickly going to see the horrific
consequences for seniors and disabled Americans if their Social Security
benefits are interrupted, slashed, or ripped away. And Musk is nowhere
NEAR done yet.

Democrats and the grassroots are OUTRAGED, rallying outside the SSA
offices and demanding answers. But Musk isn’t slowing down. We’re going to
need EVERYONE to join in to pile pressure on Congress to save Social
Security.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21472?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-030125nd&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is working overtime, jamming phone
lines, organizing nationwide protests, and unleashing powerful lobbying
pushes to Congress. Will you rush a donation to help us stop Musk?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7774%2E5885482%2EzVTGGJ

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Are we still the “last best hope of Earth”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
As Trump and Musk attempt to destroy the constitution, incite political violence, reward corruption and rewrite history and the truth so boldly that Orwell would blush (the “dictator” Zelensky started the war?), Lincoln asks: will we remain the last best hope of earth?
That question is up to all of us.**As long as we can remain a government of, by, and for the people, then it is the people who will have the power.**
We’re facing serious challenges, not just in Texas but across the country. Voter suppression is on the rise, bold and progressive voices are under attack, and we have key competitive congressional races on the horizon that can help us take back local power.
[In this video, I discuss specific steps with journalist Scott Dworkin that each of us can take to grow our power.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64250?t=1&akid=239999%2E444211%2EHoFNbJ)
From holding our leaders accountable and emboldening Democrats to fight back, to reaching and registering the many voters who will decide the balances of power — our hard work can make a difference.
[**If you’re ready to help us turn the tide, join us in the field. Volunteer with Powered by People today.**](https://www.mobilize.us/poweredxpeople/event/664441/?source=ema20250301-239999&utm_source=email)
**[Volunteer](https://www.mobilize.us/poweredxpeople/event/664441/?source=ema20250301-239999&utm_source=email)**
Thank you for being in this fight with me,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250301-239999-footer&t=2&refcode2=239999_444211_HoFNbJ&akid=239999%2E444211%2EHoFNbJ)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239999%2E444211%2EHoFNbJ), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=239999%2E444211%2EHoFNbJ).

subject: thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

Our finance team has great news: **we met our February end-of-month fundraising goal!**

Meeting this goal is critical for the future of our state. From local elections to our state Supreme Court elections, democracy, and our rights are on the ballot this year. Your generous donations will help us fight back against extremism, from November’s elections to whatever the Trump administration throws our way.

Thank you for standing by our side in this fight.

PA Dems

**[P.S. We have two special elections coming up THIS MONTH, and we need to keep up our momentum. Friends, I'm Josh Weil, a public school teacher and proud Democrat running for Congress in Florida's 6th District. I'm reaching out because our democracy is at a critical juncture, and we have a unique opportunity to make a significant impact. My opponent, Randy Fine, has been handpicked and endorsed by Donald Trump. Fine's track record aligns with the most extreme elements of the MAGA agenda:
* **Book Bans:** Advocating for censorship in our schools.
* **Attacks on Reproductive Rights:** Working to undermine women's autonomy over their own bodies.
* **Erosion of Democratic Norms:** Supporting policies that threaten the very foundation of our democratic institutions.

This special election is more than just a contest between two candidates; it's a battle for the soul of our nation. A victory here would not only flip a crucial seat but also send a resounding message that we reject the divisive and destructive politics of Trump and his allies. However, confronting a Trump-endorsed candidate means we're up against significant financial resources and national attention from those who wish to see our progressive values defeated. To counter this, we rely on the strength and generosity of grassroots supporters like you. [**And here’s the truth: Your contribution DOES make a tangible difference in our fight. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today -- split with Serve America -- to help me DEFEAT Randy Fine, Donald Trump, and all of the MAGA Extremists who are rooting for our downfall >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103044273/531031980/-423390815?refcode=250301_Serve_Weil_TrumpEndorsed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTBlZDc5NC1kM2Y2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yr-7KD6Y8zcWfaVkRUCdnh3FMmv6xH5ich17UvvedOM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103044274/531031981/-2031701896?refcode=250301_Serve_Weil_TrumpEndorsed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTBlZDc5NC1kM2Y2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yr-7KD6Y8zcWfaVkRUCdnh3FMmv6xH5ich17UvvedOM=) Together, we can defeat Randy Fine and show that our district stands for inclusivity, integrity, and progress.
