name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Those in power want us to feel despair and defeat, but by working together we can build solidarity and create change.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250301-4812-footer&t=1&akid=4812%2E420207%2EY_Nc8E)
Hi Peter, it's Pramila Jayapal.
I want to take a moment to say thank you for all of your support this past month. Because of people like you, we were able to reach our ambitious February fundraising goal.
Your contributions and the organizing they support are how we build stronger communities and grow this movement committed to building a better world.
Those in power want us to feel despair and defeat, but by working together we can build solidarity and create change.
I don’t take a cent from corporate lobbyists. I spend my time legislating (not fundraising) because of you and your support.
I cannot thank you enough for continuing to fight for our values — for Medicare for All, a liveable planet, dignity for all workers, trans equality, and so much more.
[**If you’d like to help us get a head start on our March fundraising, you can chip in to support our movement here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250301?refcode=em20250301-4812&amount=3&refcode2=4812_420207_Y_Nc8E&akid=4812%2E420207%2EY_Nc8E)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250301?amount=3&refcode=em20250301-4812&refcode2=4812_420207_Y_Nc8E&akid=4812%2E420207%2EY_Nc8E)**
I look forward to working alongside all of you to build the world we know is possible.
With gratitude,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250301-4812-footer&t=2&refcode2=4812_420207_Y_Nc8E&akid=4812%2E420207%2EY_Nc8E)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4812%2E420207%2EY_Nc8E)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c2aa85f-7b7b-45db-954c-7bd87da111fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
What we saw in the White House the other day was a disgrace--an absolute disgrace. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky stood there, in front of the media,**[sparring with President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance](https://substack.com/redirect/707fa3b2-165e-4a3f-91d5-3712996764d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** like he's some kind of equal. Let me tell you something: he's not.
This is the leader of a nation that's been on life support for years, kept alive by the blood, sweat, and hard-earned dollars of the American people. And what does he do? He shows no respect--no gratitude--for the leaders of the country that's been carrying him. It's outrageous!
From the jump, Zelensky walked into the Oval Office with an entitled attitude, like the United States owes him something. He's been getting a free ride from Biden and the other spineless Democrats for too long, and President Trump--God bless him--finally put his foot down. It was a beautiful thing to see. Trump told Zelensky straight to his face: no more blank checks, no more Biden handouts. The days of coddling are over. There's a new sheriff in town, and his name is Donald J. Trump. Zelensky didn't like it? Too bad. He's lucky he even got a meeting.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/707fa3b2-165e-4a3f-91d5-3712996764d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Vance, that man is a patriot. He called out Zelensky without hesitation as soon as he took a combative tone, challenging him on "what kind of diplomacy" JD was talking about in front of the cameras like some kind of grandstanding publicity stunt. This is where the meeting went down hill and it was Zelensky who prompted it.
The Ukrainian president is a vassal, biting the hand that feeds him while billions of our tax dollars prop up his war. Vance isn't afraid to say what we're all thinking--America First means our borders, our cities, our people come before some endless sinkhole in Eastern Europe.
Let's get real - Ukraine's been a mess--a disastrous war dragging on for years--and who's been bankrolling it? You, me, every American taxpayer. Zelensky should've walked into that room with one phrase on his lips: "Thank you." Thank you to Trump, thank you to Vance, thank you to every single one of us who've kept his country from collapsing. Instead, he picks a fight, whining about Trump's plan to end the war in a day. Trump could do it--nobody negotiates like him. But Zelensky? He'd rather keep the gravy train rolling than face reality.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43cee358-4ade-4744-83c0-8550ca082264?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I cleaned up New York when it was a war zone itself. You don't fix problems by begging for handouts--you roll up your sleeves and get tough. Trump gets that. Vance gets that. Zelensky doesn't. He's been spoon-fed by Biden's weak-kneed crew, and now he's shocked there's a new boss in the Oval Office who won't play along. Trump put him in his place, and it was about time. No more free rides, pal. You want our help? Show some respect--or figure it out on your own.
This clash wasn't just a spat; it was a wake-up call. America's back, and we're not here to be Ukraine's ATM. Zelensky better learn quick: Trump and Vance aren't messing around. They're here to win--for us, not him.

clean_body: Zelensky should've walked into that room with one phrase on his lips: "Thank you." | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Zelensky should've walked into that room with one phrase on his lips: "Thank you." Mar 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- By Rudy W. Giuliani What we saw in the White House the other day was a disgrace--an absolute disgrace. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky stood there, in front of the media, like he's some kind of equal. Let me tell you something: he's not. This is the leader of a nation that's been on life support for years, kept alive by the blood, sweat, and hard-earned dollars of the American people. And what does he do? He shows no respect--no gratitude--for the leaders of the country that's been carrying him. It's outrageous! From the jump, Zelensky walked into the Oval Office with an entitled attitude, like the United States owes him something. He's been getting a free ride from Biden and the other spineless Democrats for too long, and President Trump--God bless him--finally put his foot down. It was a beautiful thing to see. Trump told Zelensky straight to his face: no more blank checks, no more Biden handouts. The days of coddling are over. There's a new sheriff in town, and his name is Donald J. Trump. Zelensky didn't like it? Too bad. He's lucky he even got a meeting. Vance, that man is a patriot. He called out Zelensky without hesitation as soon as he took a combative tone, challenging him on "what kind of diplomacy" JD was talking about in front of the cameras like some kind of grandstanding publicity stunt. This is where the meeting went down hill and it was Zelensky who prompted it. The Ukrainian president is a vassal, biting the hand that feeds him while billions of our tax dollars prop up his war. Vance isn't afraid to say what we're all thinking--America First means our borders, our cities, our people come before some endless sinkhole in Eastern Europe. Let's get real - Ukraine's been a mess--a disastrous war dragging on for years--and who's been bankrolling it? You, me, every American taxpayer. Zelensky should've walked into that room with one phrase on his lips: "Thank you." Thank you to Trump, thank you to Vance, thank you to every single one of us who've kept his country from collapsing. Instead, he picks a fight, whining about Trump's plan to end the war in a day. Trump could do it--nobody negotiates like him. But Zelensky? He'd rather keep the gravy train rolling than face reality. | | ---|---|--- I cleaned up New York when it was a war zone itself. You don't fix problems by begging for handouts--you roll up your sleeves and get tough. Trump gets that. Vance gets that. Zelensky doesn't. He's been spoon-fed by Biden's weak-kneed crew, and now he's shocked there's a new boss in the Oval Office who won't play along. Trump put him in his place, and it was about time. No more free rides, pal. You want our help? Show some respect--or figure it out on your own. This clash wasn't just a spat; it was a wake-up call. America's back, and we're not here to be Ukraine's ATM. Zelensky better learn quick: Trump and Vance aren't messing around. They're here to win--for us, not him. Thank you PolitiBrawlers, for your support! Support Mayor Giuliani and PolitiBrawl 's by becoming a paid subscriber today. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Hide N' Seek
subject: The GOP’s Latest Strategy??
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Hello Friend, have you seen the latest?
Republican leaders are now advising their lawmakers to avoid town halls — dodging the very people they claim to represent. They don’t want to face the tough questions. They don’t want to be held accountable. And they certainly don’t want to explain why they keep putting their own interests ahead of yours.
This is not leadership. This is cowardice.
And it is up to us to stop it.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6A696D426B53664755384F785A6630762B51365A4D596A4E6B494E543161556A58624D38656B324E37334C6943745A48514D7A41314C426464566B6B5A6B3261/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-01%20at%2011.28.18%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I believe in something different. Over the past few weeks, I’ve been showing up— everywhere . At the 3rd Annual Community Prayer Breakfast, talking with local leaders. At Tranquil Villas, hearing from our seniors over coffee. At the Walton County NAACP Freedom Fund Dinner, celebrating progress and discussing the work ahead. At protests, meeting families who just want a better future for their kids.
I’m here because this is my job —to listen, to show up, and to fight for you.
With just 35 days until the special election, we have to make a choice: Do we want more representatives who hide from the people they serve? Or do we elect leaders who will stand in front of their communities and answer to them ?
I’m ready to be that leader.
But I need your help. I’ve missed my February goal by $1,500, and if that is not met today, I stall out. Help me restore leadership to Northwest Florida. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6A696D426B53664755384F785A6630762B51365A4D596A4E6B494E543161556A58624D38656B324E37334C6943745A48514D7A41314C426464566B6B5A6B3261/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-01%20at%2011.47.06%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Join in the fight for thousands to feel proud to be Floridian and American.
Thank you,
Gay Valimont
Candidate for Congress, FL-1
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]

We can't let them buy this election. I'm running to put the people of Florida first, not a corrupt political agenda. That means:

* Protecting your freedoms, not stripping them away.
* Standing up for public education, not dismantling it to push right-wing ideology.
* Fighting for working families, not giving handouts to the wealthy and well-connected.

[But to take on Trump's handpicked candidates, I need you in this fight. Take a look: | | | | | == | | | | Randy Fine just made it crystal clear: He's not running for the people of Florida--he's running for Donald Trump. In his own words, he's Trump's warrior--not yours. We can't let them buy this election. I'm running to put the people of Florida first, not a corrupt political agenda. That means: Protecting your freedoms, not stripping them away. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

We don’t like writing with bad news.
But – unless you’re super rich – House Republicans just passed a budget that’s nothing but BAD.
There’s simply no way for them to pay for the massive tax breaks for our nation’s billionaires prescribed in this bill without hurting the rest of us.
Medicaid and healthcare subsidies? Cut.
Food assistance? Cut.
Programs to lower home energy costs? Cut.
Education grants and loans? Cut.
In fact, the only thing that goes up under this bad budget is the federal deficit.
Will you contribute to Johnny’s efforts to ensure this budget isn’t codified in the upcoming appropriations process? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3] He stood up for Marylanders by voting against this bad budget. And there’s still an opportunity to pass spending bills that work for ALL Americans, with your help.
Working families can’t afford to give billionaires yet another tax cut that they don’t need. Johnny will keep fighting to make sure their voices are heard.

Elon Musk is neither elected nor appointed — yet he’s single-handedly DESTROYING the federal government and even going after Social Security.

**But House Democrats’ NEW bill would hold Musk liable for ANY damage he inflicts on the United States.**

_This is our chance to finally STOP him and his attacks on our democracy!!!_

[**But if we fail to reach our 35,000 signature goal by MIDNIGHT, momentum for this bill could come to a screeching halt. We need YOU with us: Add your name to pass the Nobody Elected Elon Musk Act »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stop-musk/?source=VPP_20250301_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19107%2E878179%2Emiq3P8)

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19107%2E878179%2Emiq3P8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19107%2E878179%2Emiq3P8).**

name: LTC (Ret.) Alex Vindman
subject: Remember how weak Donald Trump looked in the Oval Office yesterday.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump threw a temper tantrum in public while the entire world was watching, and he did it because President Zelenskyy did the one thing every Republican in Congress should be doing right now: He told Donald Trump that his ego isn't more important than our shared security and western values of freedom and democracy.
#
Peter, President Zelenskyy met with President Trump in the Oval Office yesterday.
What followed was a spectacle that only Russia could enjoy.
Trump and Vance berated Zelenskyy for having the gall to defend his country. They demanded him to bend the knee and kiss the ring. They parroted Kremlin talking points. Trump even expressed camaraderie with Putin, that they went through the Russia “hoax” together.
Trump threw a temper tantrum in public while the entire world was watching, and he did it because President Zelenskyy did the one thing every Republican in Congress should be doing right now: He told Donald Trump that his ego is less important than our shared security and western values of freedom and democracy.
Trump and Vance thought they looked strong yesterday. Instead, they looked like two impulsive toddlers. But now we know beyond any doubt: Trump is a friend to our enemies and an enemy to our friends.
Just because Trump has bowed to Putin does not mean the American people will. I know there are millions of Americans who will continue to stand with Ukraine — and that is going to be essential as we work against Trump over the next four years.
VoteVets will work relentlessly to promote leaders who will oppose Trump, like my brother Eugene. Every dollar we raise today will go towards electing strong leaders from Military and National Security backgrounds to positions of power.
And every leader we get into office is another check on Donald Trump and Russian influence in the White House.
[**Please, if you can, make a donation to VoteVets and help us lead the charge against Trump.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar25.WvYIqH&refcode=em250301-1-f&t=1&akid=34213%2E3013755%2Ebsa4LL)

Trump threw a temper tantrum in public while the entire world was watching, and he did it because President Zelenskyy did the one thing every Republican in Congress should be doing right now: He told Donald Trump that his ego is less important than our shared security and western values of freedom and democracy. Trump and Vance thought they looked strong yesterday. Instead, they looked like two impulsive toddlers. But now we know beyond any doubt: Trump is a friend to our enemies and an enemy to our friends. Just because Trump has bowed to Putin does not mean the American people will. I know there are millions of Americans who will continue to stand with Ukraine — and that is going to be essential as we work against Trump over the next four years. VoteVets will work relentlessly to promote leaders who will oppose Trump, like my brother Eugene. Every dollar we raise today will go towards electing strong leaders from Military and National Security backgrounds to positions of power. And every leader we get into office is another check on Donald Trump and Russian influence in the White House. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Alexander Vindman PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6ed944d454ba47038dddd3a1a6409470&_e=pLq8vgN3aAWo-RGodYZfz3IRIa8YSfZU9WyaJCmVETtX7UGxRf7ufIifSwPgXNb5o3EsdU4bZqhcw3fEMJ45tqecxy43QblWBPWMHDOKdxgdxftnjay044DnOpQeMriZARKk6YIyPFaAxAz7frRsvM56gYJXDvpsXxcw_Xx8Men-AJWDllVtPs_CUs1dRnu2u6cKS1PTzoOkrqkfOQ5EVeSI4IPNba3VCPqsbuU8i3Aelo1pXT-Jq0TMEad7iPY7Qjo0tGv3nrzEf7ws1lE895r0HvVay4Xkyd3eeg_FLGxCj1xMU6p7BAMHl26lIK2Wv5WdoLj5xNfatRHFXngjb4CEV5mPR48VZbRbN3qpiWhedJtlRd4VytqxtWjg4rp7u8ekQcv2dfo2cZ6x9TjrTA%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6ed944d454ba47038dddd3a1a6409470&_e=pLq8vgN3aAWo-RGodYZfz3IRIa8YSfZU9WyaJCmVETtX7UGxRf7ufIifSwPgXNb5o3EsdU4bZqhcw3fEMJ45tqecxy43QblWBPWMHDOKdxgdxftnjay044DnOpQeMriZARKk6YIyPFaAxAz7frRsvM56gYJXDvpsXxcw_Xx8Men-AJWDllVtPs_CUs1dRnu2u6cKS1PTzoOkrqkfOQ5EVeSI4IPNba3VCPqsbuU8i3A7P8FXYcItU3gKl8cxymBNuMRn0zxyeeZlFNJyUUsXGA_oTFn2rd--M3So_BeQTKWG6VuM9Szzr-ppNl0fVuWtqmhxFkw2UoIgC7sl7GvMHmT_bjoQVwvWuSpDCqrxOpsxSjIvKfLvO-bnS6HLV6mst7XSiIEpd8100cQRJvIIOg%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6ed944d454ba47038dddd3a1a6409470&_e=pLq8vgN3aAWo-RGodYZfz3IRIa8YSfZU9WyaJCmVETtX7UGxRf7ufIifSwPgXNb5o3EsdU4bZqhcw3fEMJ45tqecxy43QblWBPWMHDOKdxgdxftnjay044DnOpQeMriZARKk6YIyPFaAxAz7frRsvM56gYJXDvpsXxcw_Xx8Men-AJWDllVtPs_CUs1dRnu2u6cKS1PTzoOkrqkfOQ5EVeSI4IPNba3VCPqsbuU8i3BOayH-h7w0X55OdEK-LVOAPDxiMM0Zn257nMUfPoZe-GFaYF3W0ZomhwvEL_lv6Ruat16E931D9TYrZmnJgUCm7mQMPuojApNJof-LKm2z6bBY257Y8Pwx4zEoIQjRn051cOMTo3UCxEz3nlhuGHbNogX9s8gJtUGRQ0k3NrxtEw%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6ed944d454ba47038dddd3a1a6409470&_e=pLq8vgN3aAWo-RGodYZfz3IRIa8YSfZU9WyaJCmVETtX7UGxRf7ufIifSwPgXNb5o3EsdU4bZqhcw3fEMJ45tqecxy43QblWBPWMHDOKdxgdxftnjay044DnOpQeMriZARKk6YIyPFaAxAz7frRsvM56gYJXDvpsXxcw_Xx8Men-AJWDllVtPs_CUs1dRnu2u6cKS1PTzoOkrqkfOQ5EVeSI4IPNba3VCPqsbuU8i3AMtDcYJa0lg_w-UlHBKGcJl6vsvUTwNhYJ1wQZUMXSIxZf91sXlsKH6mbfi2Xe7FyC9aaVRVHnBM9oo-H7bEtTqu_kqvX2tE_ZgG7YrNYWxIxO0E2xMoFQChOhkp-bBcuhw0WdR2agdKA8Gxe5W0y8craOCQ53CC-ESrskfgWWBw%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6ed944d454ba47038dddd3a1a6409470&_e=pLq8vgN3aAWo-RGodYZfz3IRIa8YSfZU9WyaJCmVETtX7UGxRf7ufIifSwPgXNb5o3EsdU4bZqhcw3fEMJ45tqecxy43QblWBPWMHDOKdxgdxftnjay044DnOpQeMriZARKk6YIyPFaAxAz7frRsvM56gYJXDvpsXxcw_Xx8Men-AJWDllVtPs_CUs1dRnu2u6cKS1PTzoOkrqkfOQ5EVeSI4IPNba3VCPqsbuU8i3Di8ru9fu4Nn2KkrZL_ecWviFJSOEuIQUcWp69uoySVhKeZFFlp4gv8KgnlxXYcTiw_QR-NejJ8LNUpMTwwkBoXADzKBlKO9m_S52xgl0cMDa29WHCu7MvouLEAUVAFx39V22AWwtaP1pbPxyydmtWVnwwMr-aicLJAu-pdk3fbwA%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Hi, do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love.
I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.
I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.
| |
---
| | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy.

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: _I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. _
---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=26b05eaed0bc495495a9680e5c2076c1&_e=Ff62URYtBHIDcnhYk8gjDEJh29uuLqdMFJWkm2Ng2oU4TFduLiIwKs3ABfiRq7pbFc11YMPzv5GTj3gFA2DBUbiQmtqmPVoW8ZIoC9TR47ZtVLFmKiihgSJi1QLuoPDTTegPteyfvgZ1uIWuokLW7NcauUZRp-dz11zzpwO0VD5TtF-H-DWlcgxsomiITXeYNgO0cD7CEM0ArmmIQgO0mtsrnnp3asPIbU1CKuGFAtZRg2IbxYH30Tf2aJgHM8LBZiULr0r6oyzJYNQSc8CoPDy21yFToU34G5kBXKPiRjI5q8y0O6ZmyYMeYtKy75ExrqHCgZ1ToIOTfRI0uDlVe1ImBYTdYtB26v0st5pjrLqrgviTzvPk9O8FyyazQop4ljPyoyhqYm2A8e9vHJqVL0HfoFaC6Y0TVy-hHWInLFw%3D)
---
**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=26b05eaed0bc495495a9680e5c2076c1&_e=Ff62URYtBHIDcnhYk8gjDEJh29uuLqdMFJWkm2Ng2oU4TFduLiIwKs3ABfiRq7pbFc11YMPzv5GTj3gFA2DBUbiQmtqmPVoW8ZIoC9TR47ZtVLFmKiihgSJi1QLuoPDTTegPteyfvgZ1uIWuokLW7NcauUZRp-dz11zzpwO0VD5TtF-H-DWlcgxsomiITXeYNgO0cD7CEM0ArmmIQgO0mtsrnnp3asPIbU1CKuGFAtZRg2IbxYH30Tf2aJgHM8LBZiULr0r6oyzJYNQSc8CoPCCwTO8ux0r8ZdOEGb8Oom5fd72pavEy5lrGQ9nQuWESpWVj4PFbwsVHrAArHW8rS5AodV-fJp1iQ8avShsFC2-s0MTTxSuInjbTgRnoaqS6JbPMbvawaR7_ZwvT-AjYVl1oe2_zuspZfsNIPVhZaxE%3D "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103048353/531041688/34830148?refcode=ea.a8864b0a-e3f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ms=ea.a8864b0a-e3f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4ODY0YjBhLWUzZjYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNiNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UpKvhyQLH4uBzGNCApYv3CqOEURvpi_OGPWLbUxkDSc=&emci=a5864b0a-e3f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=a8864b0a-e3f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=4823105) Empathy isn’t weakness. It’s power. The greatest movements in history didn’t come from apathy. They came from people who gave a damn and refused to back down. That’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC — to build a movement of people who refuse to let politicians and Big Oil corporations sacrifice our environment for their greed. But this isn’t just my fight. _It’s ours._ Now, I want to turn this over to you. **_What do you give a damn about?_** Maybe for you, that means fighting for clean air and water. Maybe it’s protecting voting rights or fighting for reproductive freedom. Or maybe it’s something deeply personal — something that keeps you up at night and pushes you forward every day. **[Whatever it is, I want to know. What’s the one thing you refuse to stop fighting for? body:
In last month’s special elections, we defended every Democrat-held seat, winning four key races in Connecticut, Delaware, and Maine. Those victories help Democrats block the MAGA agenda in the states. | | |
---
| |
---|---
February was a big month for state Democrats, and a huge part of our success is thanks to contributions from this online team. In last month’s special elections, we defended every Democrat-held seat, winning four key races in Connecticut, Delaware, and Maine. **Those victories are meaningful because they help Democrats build a blue firewall to block the far-right from implementing their agenda in the states.** This month, we’re facing majority-defining special elections in Minnesota and Pennsylvania. [We’re relying on grassroots support to help our candidates compete and win elections like these. Can we count on you to make your first donation of the year today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD-0Fr2Pgyy2ET802uj5Jd3-reyU6SQmBpj3M80EmwwG-XRKFBG_njNBewno1eelPfKF0Y7ad5UD7LtjIt6SsTDmfqBP0lFR_XDcIWhQxMZzofoJjO2YKVwJ1pS26T7h2XcnOMQb42Yw2iiCIBRlWf4DURuUAyNIRWJId2kb4Pv3kpF8mRHtd1ksZzsTUtVJawQiVraVbAzXOH_zn_xvWn-dRsBDnHO407HWREaARbW0LSPcDAOY3oEWRRaXm-09yUznhGCDkwOVVigCW8s5SWDjQOTFcCa963MOaxP2QAVF5_8aDCPQlXy91C5lALmhG8_MLo0l7GOJbn4i1aAAEuEVRoqTuV68dUh7dkLdPYXhbj1lwZY3xyF76owDFevReijbSE7M-TJhg84V4n2eHdwjtjHzv9yfBO4brMP3Qo5Fw0wfkn5JDccWzpzUcX0t2GWGPoN8H9LgZKs6VCJk-5XsaNl8MPAiaQgl0kaS1ZqvV1eyNeqvo_KU97YCH80c2BcaiZEz8MMmZhkz1vauW-nmZU5Ek8otAvMQqcEJU3cL0/4ef/2OPANWZPTy250EJLVRYQ7A/h0/h001.CMkF1I16_Y99XDucXVZz7RXcatkT-f3lJXZ9ydFTRik) Thank you for all you’ve done, and all you’ll do to support state Democrats. name: Mark Kelly
subject: A reality check
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
After that horrendous display in the Oval Office yesterday, Putin and his cronies in Russia are popping champagne, America is weaker on the world stage, and we are all less safe.
#

Team, it’s Mark Kelly.
It might seem like everything is spinning out of control right now, but the truth continues to be the truth. Here’s a reality check:
Russia invaded Ukraine, and Putin is a dictator. That’s the truth.
President Zelenskyy is defending his people, and Putin is targeting and killing them in schools and hospitals. That’s the truth.
Ukraine is fighting for their right to freedom and democracy, and Russia is fighting to reclaim the empire they lost when the Soviet Union fell. That’s the truth.
And, after that horrendous display in the Oval Office yesterday, Putin and his cronies in Russia are popping champagne, America is weaker on the world stage, and we are all less safe.
**That is the truth.**
I’ve been to Ukraine. I’ve met with President Zelenskyy many times, including yesterday. Ukrainian pilots have trained on the F-16 in my state. I’ve hosted those pilots in my office. One of the pilots I met was killed in action, defending his country.
Everyone wants to see this conflict end, including me. But the kind of peace that emerges matters, and it’s essential that it leaves Ukraine in a position of security and that the aggressor — Putin — pays a price for his crimes. After yesterday, it feels like we’ve almost fully switched sides. It’s incredibly disappointing, but it’s not over.
I am going to continue pushing help to the Ukrainians. I am going to continue to press the Trump Administration, including Secretary Rubio and National Security Advisor Waltz, to get back in the room and work this out. And I’m going to need you to continue to speak out about this, and be public and vocal in your support for Ukraine. It’s not only essential to their future, but to our own national security.
A free, unoccupied, and democratic Ukraine not under constant threat from Putin will make all of us safer, and each of us needs to do whatever we can to help them win this war.
Thank you, really, for reading.
Mark

Wait! Before you go:
[**If you can afford it, we are humbly asking you to make a donation to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1420?c0=mek-em-mar25/.nIAmPy&refcode=em250301-1-120&t=1&akid=5986%2E6688874%2E60n_7I) As Mark holds the line, it’s on us to defend him and make sure he has the resources he needs to fight back. Any amount helps, and it adds up fast when tons of us are chipping in together.
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mar25/.ukJcqc&refcode=em250301-1-120&t=2&akid=5986%2E6688874%2E60n_7I)**
Thank you!

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5986%2E6688874%2E60n_7I).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

* * *
**Please read the following message from our sponsor.**
| **Oh no! We're embarrassed...** **Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuedo9Iteknop5IgITm7r2pt2y&s=ACDIPEICAEGLOCPK), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuedo9Iteknop5IhITm7r2pt2y&s=ACDIPEICAEGLOCPK) [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuedo9Iteknop5IiITm7r2pt2y&s=ACDIPEICAEGLOCPK) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuedo9Iteknop5IjITm7r2pt2y&s=ACDIPEICAEGLOCPK) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuedo9Iteknop5IkITm7r2pt2y&s=ACDIPEICAEGLOCPK)

[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuedo9Iteknop5IpITm7r2pt2y&s=ACDIPEICAEGLOCPK) The Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US political landscape as well as the economy. You know that the political and economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic and international matters, both political and financial, so we can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

As Republicans go after key programs – like Social Security, Medicare, Meals On Wheels, and MORE – we need strong Democrats like you leading the charge more than ever! That’s why with critical special elections approaching and the American peoples’ patience running thin with the GOP’s negligence, we have a real opportunity to take back control and flip the GOP’s slim MAGA majority! = | = X Peter Willis -Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. # [It's Women's History Month--Men, We Must Do Better](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=158174974&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTc0OTc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA4Njg3MzAsImV4cCI6MTc0MzQ2MDczMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.rNY63g5Epo9tWYtjwP_-OsLRbsI4e6FLK2WbSUs-WLg)
### The best way to celebrate women's history is to elevate women and to shut down the men working to deny women equal justice
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Mar 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=158174974&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTc0OTc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MDg2ODczMCwiZXhwIjoxNzQzNDYwNzMwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.EDGTrRUDuwDW031VfW_TxOU9pDvSeOUrDiBhNBCnMAA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=158174974&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTc0OTc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA4Njg3MzAsImV4cCI6MTc0MzQ2MDczMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.rNY63g5Epo9tWYtjwP_-OsLRbsI4e6FLK2WbSUs-WLg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=158174974&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTc0OTc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA4Njg3MzAsImV4cCI6MTc0MzQ2MDczMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.rNY63g5Epo9tWYtjwP_-OsLRbsI4e6FLK2WbSUs-WLg)
---
| | [](https://substack..wyhz0oWO4w0ul-40jppSwDAJqvEw-Ij4R2k2HOPDocc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/its-womens-history-monthmen-we-must?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

March is Women's History Month, a time to honor the incredible contributions of women throughout history. But I want to challenge men to go a step further and also make this a time to recognize the systemic injustices imposed by men that have long kept women from true equality. I challenge men to not just acknowledge that reality, but also work to counter that oppression with meaningful action. And if you're a guy and reading the above makes you a bit uncomfortable--good. Push yourself out of your comfort zone for a moment and read the receipts I provide below. They will be eye opening. **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join more than 121,000 fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..iB6ahQqdFMDblp7djFcgfN1DiAP7JfMakULzmAlaNxM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=158174974)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f5dfd5e7-8c36-4a6e-88f8-c77668d9546b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: City of Lakewood, CA
### **A Timeline of Injustice**
From the very founding of this nation, men have excluded women from the promise of equality. The same Constitution that declared "all men are created equal" was written by (wealthy white land owning) men, for men, without any regard for the rights of women. For centuries, men ensured women had no say in the laws that governed them, no right to vote, no protection from violence, no economic autonomy, and no recognition of their full humanity. Every single right women have today--every single one--was fought for, clawed back from a system designed by men to exclude them. And that fight is far from over.
Let's look at some of the major milestones in women's rights--milestones that should have never required a fight in the first place:
* **1776** - Our founding documents declare "_all men are created equal_ ," ignoring women entirely. This foundation codified centuries of men oppressing women.
* **1848** - The Married Women's Property Act finally allows (white) women to own property. The mere idea that women could own property, and not be property, did not exist for the first 72 years of our nation's existence.
* **1920** - Beating women is finally criminalized. Yes, for the first 144 years of the USA's existence, men could physically abuse women and face no criminal consequences. As Law Professor Carolyn B. Ramsey writes, "_Although wife beating was formally illegal in all U.S. states by 1920, it was not until the 1970s that efforts by the women 's movement to recast DV as a public concern began to succeed_." She then cites fellow Criminal Law Professor Melissa Murray, who reports, "_Historically, spousal violence was exempted from state intervention and criminal prosecution_." Think about this as you realize that even today, the NIH reports that 1 in 3 women in America still suffer gender based violence from men.
* **1921** - Women finally gain voting rights through the ratification of the 19th Amendment--but only white women. Asian women had to wait until **1952**. Native women had to wait until **1962**. Black women had to wait until **1965**. And Latino women had to wait until **1975** in many parts of the country.
* **1970** - No-fault divorce is legalized, leading to a 20% decrease in female suicide. The nostalgic 1950s family unit some men dream of was a torturous era for women of zero financial autonomy, gender based violence, and high suicide rates.
* **1974** - The Equal Credit Opportunity Act finally lets women have independent credit. Finally, women could purchase a home, a car, anything on credit--without a man's approval. Just sit with this for a moment -- men controlled every aspect of women's financial existence for the first 198 years of the USA's existence.
* **1981** - Sandra Day O'Connor becomes the first woman appointed to the U.S. Supreme Court--205 years after the country was founded. For more than two centuries, every final interpretation of the law ever passed, even those laws that explicitly addressed women, was done through the lens of male approval.
* **1993** - Marital rape is finally criminalized across all 50 states--meaning husbands could legally rape their wives for the first 217 years of American history.
* **2022** - The Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade, stripping women of reproductive rights and setting back progress by 50 years. Subsequently repeated studies have shown a rise in infant and maternal mortality due to women being denied the basic healthcare they need and is medically required.
* **2025** - The Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) still isn't law in 2025, meaning that 249 years after America's founding on documents that stated "all men are created equal," **women still do not have constitutional equality.**

And this is just a snapshot of the incredible obstacles and barriers men have placed before women in the fight for women's equality. Women didn't create this system--men did. And it's men who must do the work of dismantling it.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..iB6ahQqdFMDblp7djFcgfN1DiAP7JfMakULzmAlaNxM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158174974)
### **Men, We Must Step Up -- Here's What That Looks Like**
Because it isn't just the Supreme Court--of which 94% throughout American history have been (white) men. 100%of all U.S. presidents have been men (98% white men). 98% of the U.S. Senate has been men. 90% of U.S. Fortune 500 CEOs have been men.
And while impact of these systemic injustices are still here and now, perhaps even worse, the federal government and red states are working to revive those systemic injustices. How? By rushing to criminalize abortion, restrict contraception, roll back protections against workplace harassment, eliminate Affirmative Action, eliminate DEI initiatives, and more. Sadly, we are watching history repeat itself.
Therefore, men must step up to undo this imbalance and instead ensure meaningful justice. Women have spent centuries fighting for the rights men were simply given. This fight cannot be viewed as a "woman's issue." These are human rights issues, and men must play our part.
Here are three examples of what that looks like:
* **Listen to women, and challenge other men** - Women's experiences demand representation, and by the way, they save lives. For example, while men cause more car accidents than do women, women are more likely to die in car accidents because car safety measures [are designed with men in mind, not women](https://substack.com/redirect/d7139524-d320-4668-8642-b9d1d4703a39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When corporations refuse to hire women, they both ignore more than half the population and also literally cost lives. Therefore, sexism isn't just a "women's issue," it's life and death. As men we must actively challenge spaces that deny women access and representation. It isn't enough to be not misogynist. We must be anti-misogynist. We don't get a gold star for clearing the very low bar of treating women as equal human beings. We must go beyond to break down the systems of misogyny and sexism (as listed above) with our words and actions.
* **Support policies that protect women 's rights** - Pay attention to local, state, and national laws that impact women's rights and vote accordingly. We must both elect more women to public office, and counter any law that regulates women's bodies over the advice of doctor's and women themselves. Men should be at the forefront of that fight. If you want to see what this looks like, for example, pre-order former Congresswoman [Marie Newman](https://open.substack.com/users/108375358-marie-newman?utm_source=mentions)'s forthcoming book, A Life Made From Scratch, about her life journey and experience in Congress. Marie won her seat by taking down an anti-choice (male) corporate politician. Her lived experience is an example for men to read, learn from, and follow. So men in particular, click below and pre-order her book.
[Order A Life Made From Scratch](https://substack.com/redirect/07107da7-d517-4684-84a3-af6de6c52f92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Amplify women 's voices -** Whether in media, politics, or everyday life, use your platforms and (male) privilege to amplify the women leading the fight for justice. Here are five amazing women I highly recommend you follow and support:
* [Ayesha Noor](https://substack.com/redirect/f0b6dbea-7f4e-43c4-8cc2-794065855e9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Dara Starr Tucker](https://substack.com/redirect/ec5c645f-821e-4508-89c6-bed163c0868f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Sylvia Salazar](https://substack.com/redirect/902deddb-e5c4-425e-8caa-8c296cf120aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Pari and Eve](https://substack.com/redirect/110a3ec4-cab1-4d96-a9b6-9e008a2956d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Lindsay Meyer-Harley](https://substack.com/@andstillwerise)

And to be sure, I am not just mentioning these thought leaders for the sake of it, I am also a paying subscriber to each of them. I say this only to make clear that given the financial injustices imposed upon women for centuries in this country, those men of means who are able to elevate women with their platforms and their pocketbooks absolutely should. Doing so is a good first step towards advancing justice.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..iB6ahQqdFMDblp7djFcgfN1DiAP7JfMakULzmAlaNxM?&gift=true)
### Conclusion
Equality shouldn't have to be a fight. Women have fought too hard and sacrificed too much to continue doing this alone. Men--we must do better. This Women's History Month, let's commit to more than just words. Let's commit to action, to change, and to finally building a society where women don't have to fight for what should have been theirs all along.
It starts with us. Let's go.
**Before you go! Help us fight against class warfare. Subscribe below to help us grow our platform and join the movement for justice and human rights.**
